name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: If I were a Republican sitting in a battleground seat right now, I would be terrified.
body:
When Democratic pro-choice women have our full support, they win. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603361/583637586/-1510725204?sourceid=1057353&refcode=WUEFEK48_20251119_JMCloserTGBF_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWU5ODc3MS1hNGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xB-fTa7rrXCiXMlR_sacqGrw5PVdIwQWjkccunoyyVY=) Hi Peter, it's Jessica Mackler.

I'm reaching out because our **Take Back the Gavel Fund is closing soon.** Our earliest and strongest chance to put a real check on the Trump administration is by winning back the U.S. House in 2026. But that mission depends on us starting early, organizing early, and investing early — which is exactly what this fund allows us to do. [**Donate toward our $75,000 goal and support Democratic pro-choice women everywhere.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603362/583637587/-1510725204?sourceid=1057353&refcode=WUEFEK48_20251119_JMCloserTGBF_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWU5ODc3MS1hNGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xB-fTa7rrXCiXMlR_sacqGrw5PVdIwQWjkccunoyyVY=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603363/583637588/-1403821653?sourceid=1057353&refcode=WUEFEK48_20251119_JMCloserTGBF_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWU5ODc3MS1hNGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xB-fTa7rrXCiXMlR_sacqGrw5PVdIwQWjkccunoyyVY=)
---
When 2025 began, we knew the road to a Democratic House majority would require early action and aggressive strategy. That's why EMILYs List immediately put 46 House Republican districts "On Notice" as top recruitment targets — we moved fast and started building the infrastructure to win.

Since then, we've endorsed 26 women _(and counting!)_ who will be the driving force behind flipping the House. That includes supporting strong incumbents, like **Emilia Sykes** in Ohio's 13th Congressional District, and backing challengers in some of the most competitive districts in the country, including **Jasmeet Bains** in California's 22nd Congressional District, and **Denise Powell** in Nebraska's 2nd Congressional District. These women are stepping up to run in some of the toughest, most important races of the cycle, and EMILYs List is right there with them.

If I were a Republican sitting in a battleground seat right now, I would be terrified.

EMILYs List has a long history of winning even in the toughest political landscapes, and we’re already laying the groundwork to do it again. Early momentum is everything, and we can only build it with supporters who show up now, not later.

That is why I'm asking you to make an early investment in this work before our **Take Back the Gavel Fund** ends tonight. Your support will put Democratic pro-choice women in a position to flip the House and finally hold the Trump administration accountable.

clean_body: When Democratic pro-choice women have our full support, they win. | = Hi Peter, it's Jessica Mackler. I'm reaching out because our Take Back the Gavel Fund is closing soon. Our earliest and strongest chance to put a real check on the Trump administration is by winning back the U.S. House in 2026. But that mission depends on us starting early, organizing early, and investing early — which is exactly what this fund allows us to do. = | = When 2025 began, we knew the road to a Democratic House majority would require early action and aggressive strategy. That's why EMILYs List immediately put 46 House Republican districts "On Notice" as top recruitment targets — we moved fast and started building the infrastructure to win. Since then, we've endorsed 26 women (and counting!) who will be the driving force behind flipping the House. That includes supporting strong incumbents, like Emilia Sykes in Ohio's 13th Congressional District, and backing challengers in some of the most competitive districts in the country, including Jasmeet Bains in California's 22nd Congressional District, and Denise Powell in Nebraska's 2nd Congressional District. These women are stepping up to run in some of the toughest, most important races of the cycle, and EMILYs List is right there with them. If I were a Republican sitting in a battleground seat right now, I would be terrified. EMILYs List has a long history of winning even in the toughest political landscapes, and we’re already laying the groundwork to do it again. Early momentum is everything, and we can only build it with supporters who show up now, not later. That is why I'm asking you to make an early investment in this work before our Take Back the Gavel Fund ends tonight. Your support will put Democratic pro-choice women in a position to flip the House and finally hold the Trump administration accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us when it matters most, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: ANTIFA tried to shut it all down
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, they tried to break us.

At UC Berkeley — one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in
America — ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of
2025.

They showed up hours early.

Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and
glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags.

They mocked Charlie’s assassination... pointing to their own necks
where he was shot.

They chanted: _“F*** Charlie Kirk”... “No safe space for fascist
scum”... “Fascists out of Berkeley.”_

And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt
our final campus tour stop of the semester.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance.

Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located
their exit and continued to meet them with violence.

The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear
a message of faith, family, and freedom.

A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall
of protesters screaming profanity in her children’s faces.

Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety
after being struck in the chaos outside the event.

These out-of-control Leftists weren’t satisfied with merely being
heard in protest —_ They wanted to pick a fight._

Police made multiple arrests.

UC BERKELEY, A SO-CALLED “BASTION” OF FREE SPEECH, TURNED INTO A
WAR ZONE.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

But still...

The event went on.

A packed house. Our students didn’t retreat.

They stood strong.

Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of
empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways.

And they gave Charlie’s legacy the tribute it deserved.

Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek
brought clarity and conviction.

What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: TRUTH IS
LOUDER THAN HATE.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

PATRIOT, I NEED YOU TO HEAR THIS NEXT PART — BECAUSE IT’S ABOUT
PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

This tour? This fight?

These students who keep showing up — even when it’s dangerous?

They didn’t get here on their own.

They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them.

Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in...

When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political
“experts” said Gen Z was lost to the Left...

And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built...

People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive.

And showed our young people that they’re not alone.

That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has
defenders.

That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future.

So if you’ve ever wondered if it’s working... If it’s worth
it...

LET ME BE CLEAR: PATRIOTS LIKE YOU ARE WHY WE’RE WINNING THE
AMERICAN CULTURE WAR.

And now this is your chance to be part of something rare — a moment
in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture,
one campus at a time.

Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation,
but they need to know we have their backs.

WILL YOU MAKE A GIFT RIGHT NOW TO SEND BACKUP TO THE FRONTLINES AND
STAND WITH THESE YOUNG PATRIOTS WHO REFUSE TO QUIT?

EVERY DOLLAR YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS US PROTECT OUR STUDENT LEADERS, SEND
ACTIVISM KITS TO CHAPTERS, DEFEND FREE SPEECH, AND FUEL OUR REACH TO
CHANGE MORE HEARTS AND MINDS.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

SEND BACKUP TO THE FRONTLINES
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They
tried to drown us out.

But we didn’t blink. Our students didn’t blink.

The mob at Berkeley couldn’t stop us.

_Because we didn’t come to Berkeley to be liked..._

WE CAME TO SPEAK TRUTH.

We came to finish what Charlie started.

That’s exactly what happened. AND THAT’S EXACTLY WHY WE’RE
WINNING.

Friend, thank you.

Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope...
And grief into grit.

Let’s keep going...

FOR CHARLIE,

JUSTIN STREIFF
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

P.S. Fellow patriot, when the Left screamed in our students’
faces... When they mocked Charlie’s murder...

Our students held the line.

If you believe in what they’re doing... If you know this fight is
just beginning...

Your support means more than you know.

YOU CAN HELP BY SENDING BACKUP TO THE FRONTLINES. HELP THESE BRAVE
YOUNG LEADERS FIGHT FOR FREEDOM AND EQUIP OUR STUDENT CHAPTERS ACROSS
THE COUNTRY.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/d8b04d9a-60d4-4282-87a6-cf65cf1a9ff9?source_code=MAWCO75694&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=lrm-active]

SEND BACKUP TO THE FRONTLINES
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=334811&trkid=1100086789&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily's Notes: We deserve so much better (CORRECTION)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs.

| Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! (With corrected links.) Here’s what I’ve been up to: **• Before I go on** – I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603782/583645284/-803653937?v=zIzxYYr0PoA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFkZWUzZS1hNmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKGqL1u8oIDnJ88-0b3__84qYIY4jGcUvlnPWhRvYJ8=&emci=9870de6b-98c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=961dee3e-a6c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **• My four amendments** – Before the vote, I flew back to D.C. early to testify before the Rules Committee and [offer four amendments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603783/583645285/-803653937?v=zIzxYYr0PoA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFkZWUzZS1hNmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKGqL1u8oIDnJ88-0b3__84qYIY4jGcUvlnPWhRvYJ8=&emci=9870de6b-98c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=961dee3e-a6c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) to the “deal” passed by the Senate:

1\. Reverse cuts to Medicaid passed under the Big Ugly Law.
2\. Repeal cuts to SNAP passed under the Big Ugly Law.
3\. Extend tax ACA credits so premiums don’t skyrocket.
4\. Prohibit the mass firing of federal workers through 2029. House Republicans rejected all four. • **Keeping everyone fed** — My team and I worked a shift at the [North Mason Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603784/583645286/138801785?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFkZWUzZS1hNmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKGqL1u8oIDnJ88-0b3__84qYIY4jGcUvlnPWhRvYJ8=&emci=9870de6b-98c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=961dee3e-a6c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) in Belfair. Just like the other food banks we’ve visited in recent weeks, they’re seeing more federal workers walk through their doors — people who have never had to ask for help before. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603785/583645287/138801785?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFkZWUzZS1hNmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKGqL1u8oIDnJ88-0b3__84qYIY4jGcUvlnPWhRvYJ8=&emci=9870de6b-98c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=961dee3e-a6c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) I visited the Multicultural Center in Tacoma, spoke with the Port Gamble S’Klallam Tribal Head Start Policy Council, and held a Resource Fair in Bremerton for federal workers and military families affected by the shutdown. Across the 6th District, communities are mobilizing to feed their neighbors and help those in need. We deserve a government that works as hard as you do!!! **• We’ll do it live** – I used every channel I could to communicate the truth about the GOP shutdown and the avoidable health care crisis. I [went Live](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603786/583645288/1302349921?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFkZWUzZS1hNmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKGqL1u8oIDnJ88-0b3__84qYIY4jGcUvlnPWhRvYJ8=&emci=9870de6b-98c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=961dee3e-a6c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) on YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook with my colleague, Rep. Julie Johnson of Texas, and our outstanding Attorney General, Nick Brown. **• Bienvenida Adelita!** – After stalling for 50 days, Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in Adelita Grijalva, who immediately signed the discharge petition to release the Epstein files. (That story is developing quickly as I write this, so stay tuned.) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603787/583645289/-2104125169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFkZWUzZS1hNmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKGqL1u8oIDnJ88-0b3__84qYIY4jGcUvlnPWhRvYJ8=&emci=9870de6b-98c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=961dee3e-a6c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **Now is the part where I ask you for a donation.** I hear you. The "deal" to reopen the government was awful. You deserve so much better from your leaders. That’s why Team Emily continues to work inside AND outside Congress. Last week, I endorsed three new Democratic candidates in competitive districts. I want to do everything I can to take back the House and bring a new generation of bold, tenacious leadership to Congress. We’re able to organize because of our powerhouse team of grassroots donors – and right now, we’re well behind our fundraising benchmarks. **During the shutdown crisis, I’ve been talking to my neighbors, rather than calling donors._That’s the way it should be_ – but it also means we need our grassroots team to help close the gap.** [_**If you’re able, can you please chip in $25 or any amount to bolster our organizing efforts, or even start a monthly donation? clean_body: We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. | Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! (With corrected links.) Here’s what I’ve been up to: • Before I go on – I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. • My four amendments – Before the vote, I flew back to D.C. early to testify before the Rules Committee and to the “deal” passed by the Senate: 1\. Reverse cuts to Medicaid passed under the Big Ugly Law. 2\. Repeal cuts to SNAP passed under the Big Ugly Law. 3\. Extend tax ACA credits so premiums don’t skyrocket. 4\. Prohibit the mass firing of federal workers through 2029. House Republicans rejected all four. • Keeping everyone fed — My team and I worked a shift at the in Belfair. Just like the other food banks we’ve visited in recent weeks, they’re seeing more federal workers walk through their doors — people who have never had to ask for help before. I visited the Multicultural Center in Tacoma, spoke with the Port Gamble S’Klallam Tribal Head Start Policy Council, and held a Resource Fair in Bremerton for federal workers and military families affected by the shutdown. Across the 6th District, communities are mobilizing to feed their neighbors and help those in need. We deserve a government that works as hard as you do!!! • We’ll do it live – I used every channel I could to communicate the truth about the GOP shutdown and the avoidable health care crisis. I on YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook with my colleague, Rep. Julie Johnson of Texas, and our outstanding Attorney General, Nick Brown. • Bienvenida Adelita! – After stalling for 50 days, Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in Adelita Grijalva, who immediately signed the discharge petition to release the Epstein files. (That story is developing quickly as I write this, so stay tuned.) Now is the part where I ask you for a donation. I hear you. The "deal" to reopen the government was awful. You deserve so much better from your leaders. That’s why Team Emily continues to work inside AND outside Congress. Last week, I endorsed three new Democratic candidates in competitive districts. I want to do everything I can to take back the House and bring a new generation of bold, tenacious leadership to Congress. We’re able to organize because of our powerhouse team of grassroots donors – and right now, we’re well behind our fundraising benchmarks. During the shutdown crisis, I’ve been talking to my neighbors, rather than calling donors.That’s the way it should be – but it also means we need our grassroots team to help close the gap. = = Thank you for reading 💙 I’ll never stop fighting for you. – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v) _Team – we’re in SHOCK. We’re DISGUSTED._

[**Because Donald Trump’s handpicked Supreme Court just ruled that ICE can stop ANYONE solely based on _race,_ _accent,_ _job,_ and _location._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=3&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v)

This is pure evil, team! But luckily, we have Justices like Sonia Sotomayor on the right side of history: [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=4&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v) [**Team, we couldn’t agree with her more! Please sign our petition right away to represent local Democrats and STAND with Justice Sonia Sotomayor against Donald Trump’s far-right Supreme Court →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=5&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v) | [SIGN NOW: STAND WITH JUSTICE SONIA SOTOMAYOR →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=6&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v)
---
Justice Sotomayor is REFUSING to put up with this racist Supreme Court ruling, and has shined a light on the conservative Justices’ HORRIFIC opinions time and time again.

She even said that the ruling was **“unconscionably irreconcilable with our Nation’s constitutional guarantees.”**

She couldn’t be more correct, team!

But unfortunately, Justice Sotomayor has taken a lot of heat for her comments... _and she needs to know that Democrats across the country stand with her!_

[**We need to gather [15,000] signatures before 8 AM tomorrow to show the Supreme Court that America AGREES with Justice Sotomayor!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=7&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v)
[ **Team, you have been chosen to represent Democrats from your area. Before 8 AM tomorrow, please sign our petition to STAND with Justice Sonia Sotomayor against Donald Trump’s far-right Supreme Court →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=8&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v)
[SIGN NOW: STAND WITH JUSTICE SONIA SOTOMAYOR →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70088?t=9&akid=23640%2E4449941%2EDtW12v)
---
We know this will make her proud,

Fight For Reform

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez

body:
| | Peter – Three years ago today, I was on a plane back from New Member Orientation in D.C.:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603947/583651088/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251119_1_1&refcode2=9eecb4bf-a7c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVjYjRiZi1hN2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwYq7NRxFotQU2gmPIu8dwtN4jx93uPLKm4wdnwDjnY=)
After days of counting ballots, we won this race by a razor-thin margin: _**less than one percentage point, or just two votes per precinct.**_ Our upset victory shocked the analysts and pundits who counted us out from the beginning.

It sent a powerful message: everyday people here in Southwest Washington and nationwide want representatives who will seek to build rather than destroy, who will listen and do the work rather than bask in celebrity, and who will focus on substance, not slogans or sound bites.

That’s still true three years later, and it remains central to my work in Congress.

**But now that we’re less than a year out from the next election, pundits and pollsters are counting us out once again – let’s prove that we’re not going anywhere.** [If you can, pitch in $10 or more towards our $30,000 November goal right away:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603949/583651093/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251119_1_1&refcode2=9eecb4bf-a7c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVjYjRiZi1hN2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwYq7NRxFotQU2gmPIu8dwtN4jx93uPLKm4wdnwDjnY=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119603950/583651094/-1425100085?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251119_1_1&refcode2=9eecb4bf-a7c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVjYjRiZi1hN2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwYq7NRxFotQU2gmPIu8dwtN4jx93uPLKm4wdnwDjnY=)**

Our upset victory shocked the analysts and pundits who counted us out from the beginning. It sent a powerful message: everyday people here in Southwest Washington and nationwide want representatives who will seek to build rather than destroy, who will listen and do the work rather than bask in celebrity, and who will focus on substance, not slogans or sound bites. That’s still true three years later, and it remains central to my work in Congress. But now that we’re less than a year out from the next election, pundits and pollsters are counting us out once again – let’s prove that we’re not going anywhere. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for sticking with us, Peter. Let’s keep fighting. – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Unlike President Trump, I will never play politics with our children's futures
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)
**[President Trump just announced his plan to shutter the Department of Education, and our children’s futures are on the line. I’m ready to fight back and stand up for public education, but I need your help to get to Washington. Pitch in now so I can get to work.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2042?t=6&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2042?t=7&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)**
---
Despite the pleas of parents, teachers, and students, and despite the fact that such a move would require congressional approval, Trump is following through on his threat to dismantle the Department.
_Peter, nothing good can come of this decision._
I am a graduate of public schools from first grade through law school. I know firsthand that public education can be the launching point for any future a child can imagine. But to ensure all children have an excellent education, our public schools must have the resources they need to deliver what every individual student needs. And students with special needs rely on federal help.
Our students need federal funding. They need access to data to make the best decisions about programming and resource allocation. They need research and guidance on issues that schools are facing across the country.
Dismantling the Department of Education puts all that and more at risk, and the students who will be hit the hardest are the ones most in need — including low-income children and children with learning differences.
Peter, I will not back down when the future of our students is on the line. I have a long record of fighting for public education because I know that it can make the difference in a child’s life, and I firmly believe that every child deserves the kind of quality education I had.
While Republicans are playing political theater over the Department of Education, I will make public education a priority in the U.S. Senate. I will do the hard work of getting students, teachers, and administrators the resources they need to succeed. But first, I need your help to get to Washington.
**[I’m asking you to pitch in now because my opponent is a far-right Republican who will toe the party line on key issues like this one. We can’t trust him to fight for children here in NC or across the country. We must defeat him together — but the polls are tight, and he has allies investing heavily against me. Help me fight back by chipping in whatever you can.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2042?t=8&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)**
**[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2042?t=9&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)**
---
Thanks,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2042?t=10&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=54%2E124072%2EkjaU6j)

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S Senate
subject: today is a big day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**Wednesday, November 19th.**
That’s today, Peter. It’s also the day we’re hoping you’ll make your first contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign.
We’re asking because during Jon’s last Senate campaign, hundreds of thousands of people donated to help flip this seat, and we didn’t take a DIME of corporate PAC money.
That’s something we’re really proud of.
But winning this time around is going to be incredibly difficult, Peter. **Jon is unquestionably the GOP’s #1 target** in the midterms because they know that without winning in Georgia, it is basically impossible for Democrats to take back control of the Senate.
What that means is that you can expect lots of Super PAC money and Trump visits to defeat Jon. You can expect wild attacks from conspiracy theorists online. And then, of course, the things we can't expect that we'll have to be ready for...
It’s going to take a massive team effort to re-elect Jon in 2026. And that work has to start right now.
[**Here’s the link to make your first donation to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign. Anything you can give will go a long way, and Jon and our whole team are incredibly grateful to have you on our team.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251119-2-subs&t=7&akid=1115%2E5691347%2EdW0JpC)
Thank you,
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=8&akid=1115%2E5691347%2EdW0JpC) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1115%2E5691347%2EdW0JpC) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

subject: All the signs are pointing to this:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Cook Political Report just sent a shock through the political world -- shifting multiple House seats in Virginia and New Jersey toward Democrats after this month’s wins!
Many of these are districts Trump carried, districts thought to be out of reach, that are suddenly back on the board.
This is what the early stage of a wave year looks like. The map is widening fast, and Democrats have a real shot at rebuilding a battlefield as large as 2018, but we only can if we act now.
Republicans will flood these races with outside money the moment they see these shifts.
GOTV PAC is built for moments like this and to meet the surge in opportunity with turnout, voter education, and organizing.
Chip in $25 today to help us seize this wave-year moment.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11192025]
— GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Mark Takano
subject: This is why I rely on your support, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=6570112f4b&e=9a636fd341)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
Peter, it’s Congressman Mark Takano. Today, I want to tell you a little more about myself.
I’m a lifelong Californian and grew up in a working-class family in Riverside.
Despite spending their early years in Japanese American internment camps, my parents and grandparents never gave up on their American dream. My mom and dad worked hard and provided a wonderful childhood for me and my brothers:
---
[|
---](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=018ebee267&e=9a636fd341)
| | _Me and my three brothers – I’m on the bottom left!_
---
| |
Thanks to their support, I graduated from high school as valedictorian and entered Harvard University. Inspired by my own experiences in the classroom, I came back to Riverside and began my teaching career.
When I decided to run for Congress, it was because I wanted to serve the community that had given so much to me and my family in a different way than I had been in the classroom.
For 23 years, my only income was a modest teacher’s salary. I never had a fancy stock portfolio, and I definitely do not come from generational wealth.
Half of my colleagues in Congress are millionaires, but I’m proud to represent the vast majority of Americans who make up the working and middle class.
[**If you believe that everyone should have a seat at the table – not just millionaires and billionaires – can you chip in $25 or anything you can afford to help keep me in Congress?**](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=882c76fcfb&e=9a636fd341)
---
| | _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=82c3963e9f&e=9a636fd341)

| [EXPRESS DONATE: $25 >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=fa9bb095dd&e=9a636fd341)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $50 >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=2c9d6b17d6&e=9a636fd341)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $100 >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=5617bcb710&e=9a636fd341)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $250 >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=66246b068a&e=9a636fd341)
---
| [DONATE A CUSTOM AMOUNT >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=af139679b3&e=9a636fd341)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
Thank you for standing with me, Peter.
Mark Takano
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.
Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here.](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=9b20d9bf29&e=9a636fd341) Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a [monthly contribution by clicking here.](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=021a7d098e&e=9a636fd341)
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [**unsubscribe**](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=1b41a7f4d4&t=b&e=9a636fd341&c=66f7f6daf2).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, it’s Congressman Mark Takano. Today, I want to tell you a little more about myself. I’m a lifelong Californian and grew up in a working-class family in Riverside. Despite spending their early years in Japanese American internment camps, my parents and grandparents never gave up on their American dream. My mom and dad worked hard and provided a wonderful childhood for me and my brothers: | | Me and my three brothers – I’m on the bottom left! | | Thanks to their support, I graduated from high school as valedictorian and entered Harvard University. Inspired by my own experiences in the classroom, I came back to Riverside and began my teaching career. When I decided to run for Congress, it was because I wanted to serve the community that had given so much to me and my family in a different way than I had been in the classroom. For 23 years, my only income was a modest teacher’s salary. I never had a fancy stock portfolio, and I definitely do not come from generational wealth. Half of my colleagues in Congress are millionaires, but I’m proud to represent the vast majority of Americans who make up the working and middle class. | | If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with me, Peter. Mark Takano | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. ---
If you ever wonder whether your support makes a difference, let me assure you — it absolutely does. On November 4th, people like you delivered some of the most decisive rejections of Trump's agenda this country has seen:
* **In Virginia,** _every_ single JanePAC-endorsed candidate won. We flipped nine Republican districts and helped elect Ghazala Hashmi as the state's first Muslim woman to statewide office after she defeated an opponent bankrolled by Dominion Energy.

* **Georgia** delivered something we haven't seen Democrats pull off since 2006: Alicia Johnson won statewide and flipped the Public Service Commission.

* Then there's **Pennsylvania** , where we flipped the Luzerne County Council from a 10-1 GOP supermajority into a pro-environment majority after two years of on-the-ground support. And Joe Khan made history as Bucks County's first Democratic District Attorney since 1965.

These are just a handful of the victories _you_ made possible.
But the truth is, we can’t rest on our laurels. Year after year, our candidates are up against the fossil fuel industry, dark-money super PACs, and corporate interests that would rather buy elections than let communities choose their own future.
We win because there’s a powerful movement behind us – including more than 1,000 whose steady support gives my team the ability to plan ahead, dig in deeper when our candidates are under attack, and invest in races other operatives write off.
**That’s what makes my Grassroots Cabinet so special. They’re the backbone of every single win we deliver. And I would love for you to be a part of it.**

✅ Updates from me, straight to your inbox

name: Team DNC
subject: Take a look at this chart:
body:
We've got two choices:
---
Derek — **Here’s the good news:** Democrats just won BIG in elections across the country — from Virginia to New Jersey to Georgia to California. Momentum is on our side, and we have a real chance to take back Congress next year. **Here’s the bad news:** Our team relies on donations from supporters like you to fund our work to organize across the country, but since Election Day, our fundraising has really slowed down. It’s understandable — especially as the holidays approach and we just won big — but we need to keep going. We need to sustain the momentum we’ve built heading into the midterms. Take a look at this chart: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251119_5331_fr&amount=15&refcode=em_20251119_5331_fr&refcode2=5331_22930333_gmMvGZ&akid=5331%2E22930333%2EgmMvGZ) You can see the dropoff we’re talking about this month — and with our end-of-month FEC deadline coming up, the timing isn’t great. **That means we have two choices to catch up.** Either we need more people to chip in, or we are hoping people can give a few more bucks when they donate. Derek, normally, we ask people making their first donation of the year to give $3 or $7. But today, we are asking you to give a bit more — $15 if you can. Your contribution today would help us reach our fundraising goals and lay the groundwork to win next year’s midterms. **[**Please, if you can, chip in $15 directly to the Democratic Party today. Help us stay on track to reach our fundraising goals, so we can keep electing Democrats who will check Trump’s power:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251119_5331_fr&amount=15&refcode2=5331_22930333_gmMvGZ&akid=5331%2E22930333%2EgmMvGZ)** _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $15](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em_20251119_5331_fr&refcode2=5331_22930333_gmMvGZ&akid=5331%2E22930333%2EgmMvGZ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251119_5331_fr&refcode2=5331_22930333_gmMvGZ&akid=5331%2E22930333%2EgmMvGZ)**
---
****
Thank you,
The Democrats
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251119_5331_fr&amount=15&refcode2=5331_22930333_gmMvGZ&akid=5331%2E22930333%2EgmMvGZ)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: Registration work never stops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Here's the deal, team: Voter registration work happens all year long, not just in the lead-in to the deadlines ahead of Election Day.
There's no better way to fix our democracy than by registering a ton of new voters and winning critical local, state, and federal elections. Our fundamental right to vote and access to the ballot depends on being able to pass laws that are pro-voter, not pro-incumbent politician.
As little as $3 supports our work to register a new voter. Please, RUSH $24 or more right now to help us register 8 new voters >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111925_3&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The 2025 elections showed us a valuable truth, folks: Civic participation is increasing in all the right ways.
Voter registration activity increased across the country. According to the team at National Voter Registration Day, New York recorded more registrations for their 2025 events than in 2024, and California saw similar increases. Earlier this fall it looked like voter participation was going to make a real jump, even in a so-called "off-year".
Then Election Day came. New Jersey had more voters turn out for a gubernatorial election than they had in 20 years. Crucial counties in Pennsylvania saw their highest turnout levels in almost 15 years. New York City reached a turnout percentage unseen in over five decades.
We can inspire even higher levels of participation when voters understand the stakes and feel like their vote matters , just like it did a few weeks ago. That's why our voter registration efforts are so important.
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you step up with $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111925_3&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111925_3&amount=36]
The key is getting young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights across the country -- to see the importance of voting now more than ever. Pundits in Virginia said they could have called the election results when they saw the first turnout numbers from the major college campus locations around the state. That's the kind of impact these young voters can have.
Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The 2026 midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at a cost to us of just about $3 per new voter -- can be game-changing. Can you pitch in with $24 or however much you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters ahead of next year's voter registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111925_3&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111925_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111925_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=E%2FrQTIgQH0gKwhSNWXRzl9snvx1E9hbOXEQPSYxN45SXYhUpDdXskbUSsaFtSx6jhq5G7V5vTPYqFSJuZS3aHUMK%2BZKVu7T%2BooDSr7rA%2Byi5MzrC1yqt24KnqXhVgk3yyPOcJGlI7QsUs1jUAMAcprIlojR52JdRhmQkUvf%2FQHaqLxTjiEiU9mC5MW42poKKGfVGa9C%2FB4l%2FVSfFLK8lF5QUJ7xpBUmWVPIDGClF8WuPi%2Ft3X21%2Bbb2W%2BmfsyB8i4XSF9rB7NyUQTC9Syrsb46dTI6YMm8Leci4tIi%2Ffo2DfFB303B%2Bw5nHwFe%2B7HiACtGSasOba0keJO3axKZk4OJtK3ByOV2ZLegb7LYSXl2G5Oq1KbSfdCJuGvVVKRNRZhc%2BgeN8I2028oN1pfjOwpv%2FKBWGu%2FfbypJRlYeMrhjU%3D .

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: four toss up races to watch in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina.
#

**Cook Political Report has FOUR U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026:** _Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina._
---

**Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff** — _the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections._ The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. **[DEFEND GEORGIA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97751?refcode=em20251119-9734&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9734%2E614464%2EPQkKVt)**
---

**Maine’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Susan Collins** — _the most vulnerable Republican in the 2026 midterm elections._ Cook Political Report recently UPGRADED this race from Leans Republican to TOSS UP, signaling that Democrats have a major opportunity to flip this seat. Now, we need to make sure we carry the momentum we've seen for Democrats in Maine + across the country all the way to next November. **[FLIP MAINE: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97751?refcode=em20251119-9734&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9734%2E614464%2EPQkKVt)**

---

**North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026.** We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. _But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race_ — a year away from the actual election! If this is any indication, the GOP will spend BIG to stop Democrats from flipping this Senate seat next year. **[FLIP NORTH CAROLINA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97751?refcode=em20251119-9734&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9734%2E614464%2EPQkKVt)**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The Democrats message for 2026 - spend, spend, spend! In case you missed it, this week the New Hampshire Department of Education released their findings that despite plummeting public school enrollment, school budgets and spending continue to increase. | | | | | | State Democrats, however, saw this report and said it’s still not enough. Even though working families are struggling, their answer is always the same - more taxes to pay for even more spending. Sen. Rebecca Perkins Kwoka (D-Portsmouth) and Rep. Alexis Simpson (D-Exeter) even accused Republicans of "choosing cuts to education" despite the record spending on per pupil education. While every day Granite State families struggle to pay their heating bills and put groceries on the table,the Democrats just want to squeeze every penny that they can out of your wallet. The Republicans are the only thing standing in the way of the Democrats' income tax and higher property taxes. Will you stand with us against higher taxes and even more burden on working families? Thank you, NH Senate Republicans | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | via NH Senate Republicans PAC | | | | | | Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC. Jeb Bradley, Chairman | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | | ---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website, donated to our organization, or made a purchase from us.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

After Family Tragedy, Trump Sends Heartfelt Letter as Darren Bailey Vows to Stay in Race and ‘Fight, Fight, Fight’ (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/after-family-tragedy-trump-sends-heartfelt-letter-as-darren-bailey-vows-to-stay-in-race-and-fight-fight-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3178c25688-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/after-family-tragedy-trump-sends-heartfelt-letter-as-darren-bailey-vows-to-stay-in-race-and-fight-fight-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3178c25688-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Then-Illinois State Sen. Darren Bailey, R-Xenia, speaks next to former President Donald Trump, who endorsed Bailey for Illinois’ gubernatorial race in June 2022. (Brian Munoz/St. Louis Public Radio)
By Illinois Review

In a deeply personal gesture, 45th and 47th President Donald J. Trump has sent a powerful condolence letter on official Presidential Letterhead to former State Senator Darren Bailey and his family, offering prayers and comfort after the tragic helicopter crash that claimed the lives of the Baileys’ son Zachary, his wife Kelsey, and two of their young children, Vada Rose and Samuel.

The letter begins, “Dear Darren,” and expresses the President’s profound sorrow.

“Melania and I are utterly devastated by the tragic accident resulting in the unimaginable loss of your incredible son, Zachary, his beautiful wife, Kelsey, and two of their precious children,” Trump wrote.

He praised Zachary as “a testament to the values you and Cindy raised him with,” noting that faith, family, and community were the guiding forces of his life.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/after-family-tragedy-trump-sends-heartfelt-letter-as-darren-bailey-vows-to-stay-in-race-and-fight-fight-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3178c25688-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
A copy of the Presidential Letter. (Source: Darren Bailey)
Trump wrote that he hoped the Baileys might find solace in knowing the young family is “together again in the arms of their Creator,” and he expressed confidence that their surviving grandson, Finn, “will certainly carry on the indelible legacy of his parents and siblings.”

The president also turned to Darren Bailey’s leadership and decades-long service to Illinois.

“Throughout your career, you have been a true champion for the people of Illinois,” he wrote, encouraging Bailey to continue to

“Fight! Fight! Fight!”

for the state he loves, even amid profound grief. “Their love for you will forever endure, and their spirits will remain by your side,” the letter said.

Shortly after receiving the president’s message, Darren Bailey took to social media to thank supporters and to make one point unmistakably clear: he is staying in the race for governor.

“We will FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT – and we will WIN,” Bailey wrote. “Cindy and I aren’t backing down. Not now. Not ever. Illinois families are hurting, and we’re standing shoulder to shoulder with every single one of you who’s tired of being ignored, overtaxed, and pushed aside.”

Trump closed his letter by assuring the family that the entire nation is praying for them:

“May God bless you, and may His grace grant you and Cindy abiding peace and comfort.”

The message reflects a bond that has strengthened over the years. President Trump endorsed Bailey’s gubernatorial bid in 2022, and their friendship remains firm – grounded in shared values, faith, and a commitment to Illinois families.
President Donald J. Trump on July 13, 2024, at a rally near Butler, Pennsylvania, moments after an attempted assassin shot and struck his ear, in which President Trump raised his right hand into a fist and yelled, "Fight! Fight! Fight!", the same words President Trump chose to include in his Presidential Letter to Darren Bailey. (Photograph by Evan Vucci / AP).

| | Friend: The **longest government shutdown in history** is _finally_ over. For 43 days, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats held the government hostage—hurting families, federal employees, our military, and SNAP recipients all across the country. The shutdown was **100% preventable.** House Republicans passed a clean funding bill with no policy changes and no partisan riders. It was the same bill that passed 13 times under the Biden Administration. **But for 43 days, Democrats chose politics over common sense. ** I’m grateful to the handful of Democrats who joined Republicans in voting to finally reopen the government last week so that our men and women in uniform, law enforcement, air traffic controllers, and federal employees can get paid, SNAP funding can be restored, and our government can get back to serving the American people. This was a win for the Third Congressional District, Colorado, and the entire country. **_I look forward to continuing to work for the great people of Western and Southern Colorado on bipartisan solutions that actually get results._**
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friend: The longest government shutdown in history is finally over. For 43 days, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats held the government hostage—hurting families, federal employees, our military, and SNAP recipients all across the country. The shutdown was 100% preventable. House Republicans passed a clean funding bill with no policy changes and no partisan riders. It was the same bill that passed 13 times under the Biden Administration. But for 43 days, Democrats chose politics over common sense. I’m grateful to the handful of Democrats who joined Republicans in voting to finally reopen the government last week so that our men and women in uniform, law enforcement, air traffic controllers, and federal employees can get paid, SNAP funding can be restored, and our government can get back to serving the American people. This was a win for the Third Congressional District, Colorado, and the entire country. I look forward to continuing to work for the great people of Western and Southern Colorado on bipartisan solutions that actually get results. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2025 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

It’s Team Haley, and here’s what’s happening:

💬 The NRSC Political Director said: "Anyone still perpetuating the lie that Mike Rogers can't win in 2026 because he didn't win in 2024 isn't in touch with the realities of the data."
💰 Reports show MAGA Mike Rogers has more cash on hand now than he did in 2023 – and he only lost by 0.34% of the vote.
Here’s the takeaway: **The GOP is coming for Michigan.** Trump, his billionaire megadonors, and Senate Republican leadership are ready to spend tens of millions to flip this seat and expand control of the Senate.
We can’t let that happen.
**That’s why we must hit our critical fundraising goals to show Republicans this Senate seat is not for sale.[Will you rush $5 or more right now to help Haley Stevens keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8952?t=3&akid=1402%2E49239%2EScM9tm)**

name: Representative Vikki Breese-Iverson
subject: Want to oppose the GAS TAX HIKE? Here’s how!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Vikki PAC ID #20022
body:
Want to oppose the gas tax hike? Find your nearest signing location for Sign Across Oregon this Saturday.
| [ ](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AGamxAKPbtUgcnTFCfY6ia9M6fSsNPHmUUfhI9xAz_mFHec_rCrMNGcXafGh0DnXp2y7_0dOMZw02YI-xlGAz49IqO7_XOdjHKbAiUPUUZjNv0mvel9e8qT6W8oKgukG5_k4mRDv92t-kys2gxTyATldM5R-9ZE7UBnAIO8bolB7MVHvOPUs6vX7XugHBI-i_jYCRfkggzQ6SrbvxIY7u6b1dsxwTY1Ipo-u6JDcYW1Z0)
---

# **This Saturday. 100,000 signatures. Let 's do this!**
Dear Neighbors & Friends, Governor Kotek finally signed her massive new transportation tax and fee bill into law after weeks of dragging her heels. **This will cost Oregonians over $4 billion dollars in the next 10 years.** And why would she delay signing a bill she fought so hard for? To stack the deck against **Oregonians wanting to put this cost hike on the ballot.** She's banking on us not being able to collect the **78,113 signatures needed by December 30th** to qualify and give the people a say on what taxes we're going to pay. We have the opportunity to prove her wrong, and show Salem that hardworking Oregonians have had enough out-of-control government spending at our expense. There are thousands of volunteers already collecting signatures around Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties, and across our state. You may have even already taken the time to sign a petition - and that's amazing! Make sure your friends and family sign too! But **the real push is this Saturday, November 22nd, for SIGN ACROSS OREGON!****** The goal is to exceed 100,000 signatures and ensure we qualify for the ballot. **If 2,000 volunteers each collect 50 signatures, we win.** Simple as that. **But we need YOU!** Every single signature counts, and gets us one signature closer to having a say on this bloated tax and fee increase on next November's ballot. The numbers speak for themselves: **67%** of Oregonians want this tax repealed. **87%** believe we the people should have the final say--not out-of-touch politicians in Salem. This referendum sends a clear message: Stop forcing laws on us we never asked for. ODOT needs to answer to taxpayers, not bureaucrats.
## Official Locations for Sign Across Oregon In House District 59 -- This Saturday
### Crook County
* 8:30AM - 3:00PM, Carey Foster Hall, 590 SE Lynn Blvd, Prineville
* 10:00AM - 2:00PM, Castle Park, 4th St, Prineville
* 10:00AM - 5:00PM, Combs Flat Rd & Juniper Canyon Rd, Prineville
* 10:00AM - 1:00PM, Creekside Beer Garden, 1255 NE 3rd St, Prineville
* 12:00PM - 5:00PM, Crossroads BBQ Pit & Pub, 121 NE 3rd St, Prineville
* 8:00AM - 4:00PM, Highland Subdivision, SE Scenic Dr, Prineville
* 8:00AM - 4:00PM, Highland Subdivision, SE Akins Dr, Prineville
* 9:00AM - 4:00PM, Cayuse Rd & Davis Loop, Prineville
* 9:00AM - 5:00PM, Powell Butte Charter School, 13650 OR-126, Powell Butte
* 12:00PM - 2:00PM, Prineville Natural Foods & Supplements, 143 NW 3rd St, Prineville
* 10:00AM - 5:00PM, Rick Steber Makers, 131 NE 5th St, Prineville

### Deschutes County
* 10:00AM - 6:00PM, Cardiostart Resale Thrift Store, 435 W Cascade Ave, Sisters
* 10:00AM - 6:00PM, Deschutes County Fair & Expo Center, 3800 SW Airport Wy, Redmond
* 10:00AM - 6:00PM, Deschutes County Fair & Expo Center, 3800 SW Airport Wy, Redmond

### Jefferson County
* 10:00AM - 4:30PM, Keller Williams Realty, 639 SW Highland Ave, Redmond

Other locations, as well as other dates and times, can be found using the link below. Petition stations are being scheduled in every county across Oregon. Find a place and time that works for you, sign by **December 30th** at the latest, and join your neighbors in standing up for accountability and freedom. | [Find Your Local Signing Location ](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MdyZAaLB_natnLKDtt_TjvQWXTCgtOc9NlnBiZ_nRr_BWqWUCCdYbVld_UQoM-jqqTztfMLAoWUB7bwyJnyvewIsJoE1Ti7N7DGI_PlEVdUAXAMxGIQ3vCWd4-LifZ9iPgtchnQF7fEIfPrWlp-EBxTGdA6katzYEwlmKpEgw2FzIRFnLExbdsp04OPCoR_lpTC0)
---
Let's make **November 22nd** the day Oregon remembers--when we took our voice back from Salem.
Thank you for standing strong with me.
**Vikki Breese-Iverson**
State Representative | House District #59

Friends of Vikki
PO Box 249, Prineville, OR 97754
[https://friendsofvikki.com](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/click?d=AGamxAKPbtUgcnTFCfY6ia9M6fSsNPHmUUfhI9xAz_mFHec_rCrMNGcXafGh0DnXp2y7_0dOMZw02YI-xlGAz49IqO7_XOdjHKbAiUPUUZjNv0mvel9e8qT6W8oKgukG5_k4mRDv92t-kys2gxTyATZQAntOhw0U9wP24_igOA2uIKATwnne5bbA_z7QHY7DHSW3kdi6JvXfIJt9tIW2Bvz6smkMQokiLDZhJfP9zN8UUqugyrvfAm6EeZamuGfWSw2) [Click here to unsubscribe](http://tracking.friendsofvikki.com/tracking/unsubscribe?d=bi4tFB_180TuCJx4oKOgJkDBZxNmg6U_p6jnFvBtJe88nXgIdVXafmguuUW6Zy9-m6ZNHeLTsFWn7O6VMcUprBLmQo6uT54ugMlAUn63acIv0) from Vikki's infrequent emails. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: The CROWN Act Passes in Pennsylvania
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171024.172509.313&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171024.172509.313&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171024.172509.313&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16147)
#
# **The CROWN Act Passes in Pennsylvania**
Today, the Pennsylvania Senate passed the CROWN Act (HB439) with a vote of 44-3. This legislation ensures that no one in Pennsylvania will be denied access to professional, educational, or public spaces and opportunities because of their hair type, texture, or hairstyle. Senator Hughes has been fighting for this legislation since 2020 alongside Speaker Joanna McClinton, Representative La'Tasha Mayes, and now-Congressmember Summer Lee. Pennsylvania now joins 27 states in putting the CROWN Act into law. Senator Hughes said, "This law takes discrimination head on. Natural hair is beautiful. This law protects Pennsylvanians by abolishing any notion that natural hairstyles are not appropriate in professional, educational, or public settings." [Visit our website to learn more about the CROWN Act](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171024.172509.313&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16148) and other legislation that Senator Hughes is fighting for in Harrisburg.
* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131

Fax: 215.879.7778

clean_body: If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can . | Share On | ---|--- The CROWN Act Passes in Pennsylvania Today, the Pennsylvania Senate passed the CROWN Act (HB439) with a vote of 44-3. This legislation ensures that no one in Pennsylvania will be denied access to professional, educational, or public spaces and opportunities because of their hair type, texture, or hairstyle. Senator Hughes has been fighting for this legislation since 2020 alongside Speaker Joanna McClinton, Representative La'Tasha Mayes, and now-Congressmember Summer Lee. Pennsylvania now joins 27 states in putting the CROWN Act into law. Senator Hughes said, "This law takes discrimination head on. Natural hair is beautiful. This law protects Pennsylvanians by abolishing any notion that natural hairstyles are not appropriate in professional, educational, or public settings." and other legislation that Senator Hughes is fighting for in Harrisburg. * | Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes | | | District Office 2401 North 54th Street Philadelphia, PA 19131 Phone: 215.879.7777 Fax: 215.879.7778 | | Harrisburg Office Senate Box 203007 Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007 Phone: 717.787.7112 Fax: 717.772.0579 | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | \- \-
