name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The Left was out of control at Berkeley
body:
They tried to break us.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgv9q0b8m0o33lqou3koqbjjfbincmrpa9r7hgf8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za6hlfq5am0kioairop368sq05p2regmd4voap70_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1qnirc50opsl8linhmucnhvkst93bvelph1qkt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7hp5pvkd09me0f7l99nvt2dcs7eak0o0nml9718_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | **Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you.** This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... **Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War.** And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. **Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? ** **[Every dollar you give today helps us protect our student leaders, send activism kits to chapters, defend free speech, and fuel our reach to change more hearts and minds.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z73te4spfs4bpjugt1alvfmhpn6n2uujqhcmak6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)**
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z08go3ej6ep090d5af9ja9ggvtgu5u18hdi6v85o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. _Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked..._ **We came to speak truth.** We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. **And that 's exactly why we're winning.** Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going...
---
| | **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7jvumqp0asthbf033a0psg4nrhbrfbf9g42sgrg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbvh9rberl6r9hvor91nrfo84gfbq95c38ujqq8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs) **P.S.** Friend, when the Left screamed in our students' faces... When they mocked Charlie's murder... Our students held the line. If you believe in what they're doing... If you know this fight is just beginning... Your support means more than you know. [**You can help by sending backup to the frontlines. Help these brave young leaders fight for freedom and equip our student chapters across the country.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlns3du7tf3jq0q12t5sgbkol6evkvjqa7sdjsd8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc92qrfrki9cordn84g3c61qrb3ctvq8lu68c24o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

---

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: New Yorkers are fleeing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC)
body:
They just elected a Socialist mayor in New York City

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdk0cmnulr0e5vpng6c85b8rt6hoig0q8bpdv9vo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
Friend, They just elected a Socialist mayor in New York City—and I joined Fox News on Election Night to talk about why.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsrg3vpneqveu66ggqd9ov3rfjmhhdrilm49toko_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
[ **WATCH NOW** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf8bhs0i10elh5h4be515t177akrlvcjd19hcg80_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
This is a man who wants government-run grocery stores. He praised George Soros-style soft-on-crime policies. He thinks the problem after 9/11 was that his aunt got dirty looks—not that Americans were murdered in cold blood. He wants to rip down statues of Columbus. **How did someone like that get elected?****_Because too many of the sane people had already fled New York City._** Since I became Governor, we’ve gone from 300,000 fewer registered Republicans to 1.4 million more. Center-right voters from every state have been flowing into Florida. People are voting with their feet, friend. But when bad leftist policies drive out these voters, it leaves the remaining electorate even more left. It’s a downward spiral that ends with radical leftists like Mamdani winning our cities. **I welcome all who come seeking freedom, but I’d rather export the Florida Blueprint than import every conservative to the Free State of Florida.** **[That’s why I started RON PAC.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlo30u33mdjvt4qrdn288oqvpb0u1s67950d6eo0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)** You shouldn’t have to uproot your life to get good governance. We should not be in retreat. **Let’s take the fight to them. Let’s bring Florida values—freedom, law and order, prosperity—to every corner of this country.** We’re electing bold, battle-tested conservatives across America, in every state, at every level.

In 2024, we backed fighters like Tim Sheehy & Dave McCormick. Today, they are fighting for our values in Washington. And we’re just getting started. In 2026, we’re going to elect even MORE fighters. But I need your help to grow this movement: **[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrmv977qs875gflbg8168utn1mj5o2nhpvr2e4b0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0n8kuki69ghvpgunh3ck31v96foa312ckb4h2u0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)[>>> CHIP IN TO RON PAC NOW – Help export the Florida Blueprint <<<](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhujfarsgsknde9i5tcgp2p06v7ta6o3rrb0t198_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)** New Yorkers are fleeing. More are coming. We’ll be ready for them. **But if we don’t act now, we’ll be stuck in a cycle of losing cities, losing states, and losing the country.** Help us fight back and win. Let’s take America back—one battleground at a time.
---
[ **DONATE TO RON PAC TODAY** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztl9qv0pnq9otksu3ed0op1u37l46lq1gbuc7f30_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
| | Onward,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zifblpeps3939qqhck2p25n4345v76u027ahm08g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
Governor Ron DeSantis _P.S. I’ve said it before: If Mayor Mamdani wants to tear down the Columbus statue, we’ll take it in Florida. Heck, if they want to put the Statue of Liberty in Lake Okeechobee, we’ll get that done too. But I’d rather fight to keep liberty alive in every state._**_Will you join me? Donate today:[https://www.ronpac.com/donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo3h3ei8gmegurbbidu6j6k4db5fisopqdlfjm68_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)_**
---
| | |
---
| |

Heck, if they want to put the Statue of Liberty in Lake Okeechobee, we’ll get that done too. But I’d rather fight to keep liberty alive in every state.Will you join me? name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z141pmkv422vdu24k2pkgt7ci1slioofd93hdrro_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmbii9m190e6ge68irvsfaeghm4pbnlnpuuvfam0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb8bqjgdr8t98bnnho341nvlk2fmkkhcdb5atrd0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z86run2a86bjv7totatofa3dn534rvivj0gm8oro_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zifjgckveqlotbd3brsd7775n6mgpptrllirsf18_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdj66ob1c5h2bs)
---
Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership
---

PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Mike Nelson
subject: I track storms for a living. Boebert's one of them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KSGwEHa-ffJ-ZI2mXhTO0eDLkky9kW0Z0ZmsFVbLbrEb4LS0CuGTUnSxPLmSd4uix6ZDxSxjXsJYNZ1p3h2LwcMiaX7dD-vmEPkhVfnQCwr1W7DTuxDz8sSzZHe3tWM0QGli1SfIs3p4VtBlMPUxuIUJ71w_MUB80gLumooVB-xFWukuJVF5xskVndIydRANI5fbs-0Z3E08bGr3R2H3KREsEKBztMoC&c=_lIp6Bo6AsbhsCYckGYmOwBTtgG1WAxFamjAa9s4-4zT8j5Y2lhTEQ==&ch=07VdoCH3KyyEx-MFaixQG90y_Pns566E-q2YsZcAAKrWvXDmyVZy7Q==)
---
|

Hi Peter -- I'm Mike Nelson -- a longtime news meteorologist and proud Coloradan.
After decades of tracking tornadoes, wildfires, floods and blizzards across our state, I've seen firsthand how timely, reliable weather reporting saves lives - especially in rural areas where help can be hours away.
But recently, Lauren Boebert and her friends in Congress have slashed critical weather and emergency preparedness funding. She backed the "Big, Beautiful Bill," which guts the systems we rely on to predict and prepare for extreme weather. That's not just irresponsible. It's dangerous.
That's why I'm standing with Trisha Calvarese. She actually grew up here. She knows our communities, shows up and listens. And she understands how important it is to protect the resources families count on - weather alerts, a reliable electric grid, emergency services.
We need someone in Congress who puts public safety before partisan soundbites. Someone who takes facts seriously and doesn't gamble with people's lives. That's why I'm asking: [Will you chip in today to help Trisha flip this seat, hold Boebert accountable, and bring real leadership back to Colorado?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KSGwEHa-ffJ-ZI2mXhTO0eDLkky9kW0Z0ZmsFVbLbrEb4LS0CuGTUnSxPLmSd4uix6ZDxSxjXsJYNZ1p3h2LwcMiaX7dD-vmEPkhVfnQCwr1W7DTuxDz8sSzZHe3tWM0QGli1SfIs3p4VtBlMPUxuIUJ71w_MUB80gLumooVB-xFWukuJVF5xskVndIydRANI5fbs-0Z3E0QH23G3hQHgPw4QPSHWXKS&c=_lIp6Bo6AsbhsCYckGYmOwBTtgG1WAxFamjAa9s4-4zT8j5Y2lhTEQ==&ch=07VdoCH3KyyEx-MFaixQG90y_Pns566E-q2YsZcAAKrWvXDmyVZy7Q==)

Hi Peter -- I'm Mike Nelson -- a longtime news meteorologist and proud Coloradan.
After decades of tracking tornadoes, wildfires, floods and blizzards across our state, I've seen firsthand how timely, reliable weather reporting saves lives - especially in rural areas where help can be hours away.
But recently, Lauren Boebert and her friends in Congress have slashed critical weather and emergency preparedness funding. She backed the "Big, Beautiful Bill," which guts the systems we rely on to predict and prepare for extreme weather. That's not just irresponsible. It's dangerous.
That's why I'm standing with Trisha Calvarese. She actually grew up here. She knows our communities, shows up and listens. And she understands how important it is to protect the resources families count on - weather alerts, a reliable electric grid, emergency services.
We need someone in Congress who puts public safety before partisan soundbites. Someone who takes facts seriously and doesn't gamble with people's lives. That's why I'm asking: [Will you chip in today to help Trisha flip this seat, hold Boebert accountable, and bring real leadership back to Colorado?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016qXOK5xCtFMEG0DNgwkYW7dFvMU-1O_K25eguepr3UqDnh9uL5anq-kPWpMR3JorJboNnzdjmT4nmsA2hQkY8zroGlaSMAyrgkveeoEiGWPQ4u7PZE3Zg3BD7m-7NbeYEaXOJWz-ZHwLGxE98K6jIvwlc_3d2xAJDnPKGV4Nm8h2ZIGt1glB26GNPCBRocGD36bRtd7Xd4vpCOrcyIHuRsL6biI8HUcs&c=_luE3M86K6SgYCz8c5DoEF7yVAI__NYin6E7gR5CaBFk6nYeGWNFhQ==&ch=dHY8bPEPbZSjLGIanReMLcDHdelrIR9crzFep5Gmcp0LN7GNASPl-Q==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Hi Peter -- I'm Mike Nelson -- a longtime news meteorologist and proud Coloradan. After decades of tracking tornadoes, wildfires, floods and blizzards across our state, I've seen firsthand how timely, reliable weather reporting saves lives - especially in rural areas where help can be hours away. But recently, Lauren Boebert and her friends in Congress have slashed critical weather and emergency preparedness funding. She backed the "Big, Beautiful Bill," which guts the systems we rely on to predict and prepare for extreme weather. That's not just irresponsible. It's dangerous. That's why I'm standing with Trisha Calvarese. She actually grew up here. She knows our communities, shows up and listens. And she understands how important it is to protect the resources families count on - weather alerts, a reliable electric grid, emergency services. We need someone in Congress who puts public safety before partisan soundbites. Someone who takes facts seriously and doesn't gamble with people's lives. That's why I'm asking: == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thanks for taking this seriously - because I sure do. \- Mike Nelson | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado | Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

But lately? My team is being flooded with hateful and even violent comments from MAGA extremists--people calling me "un-American," "a terrorist," and even telling me to "go back to my country."

| I'm an American citizen. I was born here. And I love this country enough to fight like hell for it.
But apparently, standing up to Trump's abuses of power, protecting our community from ICE, and refusing to be a billionaire's puppet makes me some kind of threat. You know what? They're actually right about that part.
Because our movement is a threat--to Trump's fascist agenda, to his enablers, and to every politician (Democrat or Republican) who rolls over as this administration tramples over the Constitution.
We're building a movement that won't "meet fascism halfway."
We're done with performative resistance and empty statements.
We're done with Democrats who shrink from the moment when history demands they rise.
We're fighting for real opposition to fascism--for communities living in fear, for immigrants being hunted, and for everyone who's tired of watching "moderates" roll over while our rights disappear.
So when MAGA trolls flood my mentions, I see proof we're doing something right.

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Birch Gold Group | | **FDIC Stops at $250,000 - But This IRS "Provision 408-M" Is UNLIMITED... And Big Banks Want It DELETED Before Everyone Abandons Their System...** The banking establishment is in full panic mode! They know their **FDIC insurance is a joke** - a measly $250,000 cap while they gamble with TRILLIONS of your deposits. Here's what they're desperate to hide: **You can legally move your ENTIRE nest egg into something better than FDIC insurance.** Have you investigated IRS Provision 408-M, Subsection 3(B)? It's the federal statute that mainstream advisors pretend doesn't exist. **This Is Like a "Cheat Code" for Better Retirement Saving** This Provision 408-M lets you move your savings into PHYSICAL gold inside a tax-sheltered retirement account. And your gold-backed retirement account maintains every tax advantage of conventional IRAs and 401(k)s. Want to learn more? [**Get a FREE Info kit on Gold IRAs**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7e1d64c24d8b9e303869a28757a8a9e2c6c47116c5814f9f9014af580bcb84af1be9033facdc485aa834a8741c47e8f26f460d16904ac4e9e09ddb1b8954c031) and see how to use Provision 408-M to diversify your savings. **Gold IRAs vs. FDIC Insurance...**
* **Advantage #1:** FDIC only protects up to $250,000. A Gold IRA keeps your wealth in physical gold.
* **Advantage #2:** FDIC requires bank solvency. Physical gold requires nothing from anyone.
* **Advantage #3:** FDIC depends on government funds, takes weeks to pay claims, and won't protect you from currency collapse. Gold is instantly liquid, needs no bailouts, and maintains its value during all forms of economic crashes.

| ==> | [**Click HERE to Get Your FREE Info Kit on Gold**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7e1d64c24d8b9e303869a28757a8a9e2c6c47116c5814f9f9014af580bcb84af1be9033facdc485aa834a8741c47e8f26f460d16904ac4e9e09ddb1b8954c031)
(ZERO cost and ZERO obligation to you)
---|---
Sincerely,
Peter Reagan
Birch Gold Group
**Last Thing:** Think about this: FDIC insurance hasn't increased since 2008, but inflation has risen 40%. That $250,000 limit covers less and less each year. Meanwhile, Gold maintains its purchasing power and stability over the long term. [**Get this FREE kit to see how to diversify your retirement into a Gold IRA**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7e1d64c24d8b9e303869a28757a8a9e2c6c47116c5814f9f9014af580bcb84af1be9033facdc485aa834a8741c47e8f26f460d16904ac4e9e09ddb1b8954c031) (WITHOUT paying a dime in penalties or taxes).

name: Troy Downing
subject: We MISSED our goal by $297 – but there’s still time to act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Second chances don’t come around often, Peter.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-kmtsAtXXIvPWXh-YSg)We **MISSED** our November 16th fundraising target by just **$67. **
That may not sound like much, but if more conservatives don’t step up, **we’re going to lose ground FAST.**

That's why I commissioned another ad to help us keep pace with their constant barrage of vicious attacks. But ahead of tonight 's critical ad buy deadline, we're still $12,850 SHORT of our goal to get our NEW AD in front of as many voters as possible during the key holiday period. Every minute that our own ad isn 't up and running is another minute that Hochul and Mamdani's lying attacks against us are going unanswered, Friend. With only hours left to raise the critical funds we need, I have no choice but to turn to my biggest grassroots supporters once again... Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Thursday, November 20, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1866, a Frenchman named Pierre Lallement received a U.S. patent for the nation's first pedal bicycle, after arriving the year before with the plans and components for his invention. [See the first pedal bicycle here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAYBOCngc3I_sGQDB66sKVrR2TsI7gyNjJ_EvH2Vaq-QdcbPt3d12262RBDun_aDYaXPCW8jghmlCk9XIQte36hFBzgGQfPBXYiSVooJUhO3oZ4Tl3tzQIQ2hpGDX3bt_2gu3o1l6tspVwWpR35y-yl6vvLop2-elJkhzqYt6YUSaWk1m0zXz3c7Amd62znddVJ-MC5NN85JF6xxDM_URqXtzqalXk_qvajorGi0eWU4Di4B6_h4FzOJpd7ReMe3iNEtDFiQ2Jhkxe8QmzZoyTh7Sl2eBvFHNzpIgTndxaS-INEyk9sM4ogWdFYF-P3V4gxHP1QdfK-2RB_O_G_jnwa-gkAAP__tmSLAw). Humans are a peculiar bunch. We’ll revive gelatin salads, turn a [random car on a tiny island](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnDAQQL8GukHGGHYpXKTZ7tKmRINnOCYx9sqeW2v_Prr8Qvqn96T362P7QImSPn_ixV6PvCVuNbIqly19hchYnrlxKVxZd666F8bNGjvDOII1G6HE9-Z68gez5alnP96WaZmW2-z60-9EDpH4fifDB7mwOmuW9b7ujDRPay_-2zaO1oyjmedp2FfisJNlFxw6mjtnmERzGX5nSXryEd_5xWUI-eqjP1WftZt-dPbR2UdrbchEou_ASQvGb6qzD_zS3NnHK8dXBqkRE8GZGyDUxiT1hMqECXYOeDFULZiICSSBngyXEEWGfAAmwKJySBCMEPEPD6desS-enk1ilLrcOmc-L5R_7V7_a-vL278BAAD__7WukUU) into a local attraction, and gather 374 bagpipers to play AC/DC for the record books. Today’s edition celebrates that specialness. **💼** Keep an eye on your inbox later today: we’re sending a partner message about a smarter way to hire with [Upwork Business Plus](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT9v2zAQRz8NtcngH5GWBw0NBKMFmg4J3IwCRZ7si0iJIKmwyqcv3CFo5qzv4d1wv5fH4VGjw-X6S3vo8rQOC5TkIGeIw7IZBzqGtUCMkCCPkPIYQQ-cclkzVnM6WI1uH5rKdhMAB1FBx45KKKGOsqluHbdqMpMYrW2U5LY17GSoHpWxLdhTayvs7tcY45QxKqU4jCcLZrQcGtPoxkrSULCY13h4XXHJN5jcvr5BPJjVV6675RwSEd8IPxN-LqUctlDWON814edxS7hASnVwWyLivGU_pHWLBojof_igTSZcaR-IeLg7DxY3T0Svpwkd6gyftNE-aLwuRPRKtFxKOTxoM-86WsIlp79hyVuE9BFhNA7NjJaI_jkH2tbvav6zm8vOn0Vffs6svlzm8DK_vt-eSvv9qdD_2msxRPTsg-gpxc-kip0NBZ3DpI6koVev0f17Tf7Snm8d_xsAAP__1v61Ug). If you’ve ever wished you could make a direct, life-saving impact, this Thanksgiving you can help hungry children and families in India survive a devastating food crisis through the efficient, on-the-ground work from today's sponsor, [Good Shepherd India](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz79u6yAcxfGngS0W_MB2MjDcJVvu2hHx59ihIiYCaitvX6XqG3Q7w9FH-n7c7M2lnLb1v3vA9KXYDUfL6B3Vbl8hw9VnOVArGrpH677CWRI0nqQ8kbDRpfyymkezAATFYeQ8qUlN86j53WgfvXfkL4Q5QKkQF_JK-3jR57OA4Mm8NSlJSCnGUQ3-EhF8JOignY4j0wIx9VKHz5K2fseSX2VHHUJ58GzuvT8bU_8YXRld15aGUtf3SjtOv1dGV15NfB4p59SmmWmxPlzKP0T_U_du6DsAAP__gkxtSg).

## U.S. Loans $1 Billion to Restart Three Mile Island
The U.S. Department of Energy will lend $1 billion to [restart Pennsylvania’s Three Mile Island](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3CAQhJ8Gd5xgwXauoLgostL8kaIUKS0w6_NGGCzgjP63j3yv8Hcr7cxo5vv7MX9YChSfv-yOpq5pjthKwFoxz_G1BLT5SA1zxoLVYakuo51BQM-l5CBmbyl8zrrzZkUEVB0aOQ5qUMPY624zTsjVeeUR1LcVhHdegu-XFcUoUdx1R-ZKkxKElKLv1c3dPS7OA-pFW-17pgV6qinf_iWKdcM1fKYT821JexfMVutRmHowmBhMrbXbXuL1YzBh5K_CYLpGMZjed82v_eDW7xSp1GwrpcgznnRSfPK6ZUS-U0BOJdjoeaO6cckdhXApQ7KRwWQzfzzk75_3HJma0kKeqR_fL5DYyh_MR5eNP9plKsPItHjulsK7cv0S59PA_wAAAP__4wyU9g) nuclear plant, the site of a partial meltdown in 1979, as part of a deal to supply power to Microsoft data centers. Constellation Energy plans to bring the reactor, [ renamed the Crane Clean Energy Center](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCB7bbhc4SIN3aVNiWzvAo4MRvbeofv7iPxC2hlpRu99P6aHiynuy5fbyPKcp53OmoiZyrQ_QyJXjnxSKVSJPVX2hdwEEvpWqRbkhC6m92QatDMRkG7IqtugBz3cetOsFsH18z2gQUkaUBoYhvAxYyCvySlsor3WlAKplOx73fk7UvAIZIJxBnthJGHkXLqfHHdeaU7v_KLShbw1ya7MRxX6U8AoYDzPswu-XhRXL2A8InP1z7KsAsYrFzAWquwKt7wWonaLidpYk9ux3WIoueaZBYxNsXicMaVYh5swctlcTH-v_C9VLwu_AQAA___k_4Di), back online by 2027 as part of a $1.6 billion restoration. The 835-megawatt unit could power about 800,000 homes, and officials say the project marks a step in reviving U.S. nuclear capacity to meet rising energy and AI demand.
## ICE Plans Increased Enforcement in NYC
White House border czar Tom Homan announced that U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) will [increase operations in New York City](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0T2O3DAMhuHTyB0Hkvwzs4WLNO42bUqDlqixEkk0JM4OvKcPnCukYUPgAV58vz7XT4wpludPzDRL4LXQuyUSobqWl0uE9eA31UqNZKMmWyVcrbYjGANWrx5jOteh83MgstR3NJv71E_9dB-Hbp_HyX147R7TiK4P_v7Y9OBdH3oM9qFx7OJ8acZYbYwex_62fXhym7c0uAEHP6pBk4_C9fabY5GdQjr5i-rNce7SvIscTfU_lF2UXcp5cJPrpexywcouxlznoezyanD1KbtIfeWjwcbVUwX3jRWEM-ycscAba2lQTnjHlKARwcbcBGKB6AioBK6OMhUB3Ak9cICMJ1egRE7gm_eKBTJmjyWC4J9YnsAhREfKLl2d_XHRsU13Nehnxpj-1ch_TfA1278BAAD___Wmnis) due to its sanctuary city status, citing public safety threats. Homan expressed a [willingness to meet with city officials](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u7CAUhJ8Gd7bMj_HdguI27jZtSusAZ9ckGCw4WeS3j5w8QrqRRprR973f1zuEGNLzDXY09MhrwlYjEmFZ05eLCOXIDUvBimSxki0IqxjF1HPei3H1EOK5qs6bB6JA2aHhs5Za6nlS3WZmK52a_awU9wDOaeTaAZf_QN-ct7cumGuNczFyPk6THOzNo7NeoHIKlJ-YGtEHymX4yCHRho945heWweW9i2YjOiqT_5lYmFhaa4Oz9aK4eiaWhO3M5fM3VSaW4LDPBxagkFPt0-l6ynu_5R0SE0tXjD9aiDFUPTM1PncI8eeL_iToZcR3AAAA__9SjnxZ) to work together on immigration issues. Mayor Eric Adams's office said the city administration doesn't collaborate with the federal government on civil immigration enforcement. The announcement comes as Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani plans to meet with President Trump to discuss affordability. His office says he remains committed to upholding sanctuary laws.
## List: Best Breakfast Joint in Every State
For the travelers who take pride in eating what the locals eat, this new list reveals their choices for the best hole-in-the-wall [breakfast joint](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdCB7bGC3cPEaun1tSmTs8eJkwMieLOLvo80vpL7SPTrn4zE_XKK0P_-7DS3HPO94VkJmLPP-7QldOfKJpWBFXrDyUtDNIKFvlWpBzsElumbTBBsRAXWDVo2DHvQw9qZZLboxemPUIG_eLb2MQ4gq-HFRi1Hypptk329KgVRK9r3ulntAvwRA440zoRdGYkicS_eZ084rRrryC0vn89aQXZmPKvQ_AZOA6TzP7nJrzu9VwEQpYuWLUMDkCidPWAVMnI92zYTt6Yjat9NXdJXbemSuLWh1lxL0rVt5o6bYcJyJKNVhFEY-N5foF85_Kvay8BMAAP__PPqBWA) in every state. These classic American diners are as unpretentious as they come, from Libby's Catfish & Diner in Decatur, Alabama, to the Silver Spur Cafe in Sheridan, Wyoming. Sacramento’s Cricket Country Kitchen is stuffed with antiques to go with a killer chicken-fried steak, or you can go the healthy route with Heavenly Island Lifestyle in Honolulu. Find the best hole-in-the-wall breakfast in your state or a future travel destination by checking out the [full list here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdCB7bGC3cPEaun1tSmTs8eJkwMieLOLvo80vpL7SPTrn4zE_XKK0P_-7DS3HPO94VkJmLPP-7QldOfKJpWBFXrDyUtDNIKFvlWpBzsElumbTBBsRAXWDVo2DHvQw9qZZLboxemPUIG_eLb2MQ4gq-HFRi1Hypptk329KgVRK9r3ulntAvwRA440zoRdGYkicS_eZ084rRrryC0vn89aQXZmPKvQ_AZOA6TzP7nJrzu9VwEQpYuWLUMDkCidPWAVMnI92zYTt6Yjat9NXdJXbemSuLWh1lxL0rVt5o6bYcJyJKNVhFEY-N5foF85_Kvay8BMAAP__PPqBWA).

# [Everything Everywhere All At Once: Trump MAGA Break Up Goes Global! | Amped Up with Harry Sisson](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179372889&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MzcyODg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM2NDIyMjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NjIzNDIyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EgBAjCu_Zx0NZw24zSwVEaxvtHGiY8TUPhuyANPT7WA)
### Harry Sisson joins Cliff and Shuster to expose Trump, the Epstein panic, and why the youth vote just flipped.
| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge), [Harry Sisson](https://substack.com/@harryjsisson), [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster), and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Nov 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)| | [](https://substack.com/@harryjsisson)| | [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---|---|---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179372889&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MzcyODg5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzY0MjIyNSwiZXhwIjoxNzY2MjM0MjI1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.rhlPTGsfe-5cJeY5kAa9bDg5zIq2tFVWpClZBEXpkpQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc3aa89-2306-45b1-a950-c968b825664e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/42ded590-e9d1-4fc6-839b-52d120e500c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Folks, welcome back to _Amped Up_ , and let me tell you--if you ever want to feel simultaneously hopeful about the future _and_ deeply ashamed of your own youthful accomplishments, have [Harry Sisson](https://open.substack.com/users/112946644-harry-sisson?utm_source=mentions) on your show.
Because here's Harry--23 years old, calm, ridiculously smart, articulate as hell, and apparently the only American alive who can say "Yeah, I was literally pooped on by Donald Trump" with a straight face. The man survived an F-22 of presidential fecal matter and somehow turned it into a career enhancer. When _I_ was 23 I was trying to find the best dive bar with the cheapest beer. Harry found himself starring in a dictator-adjacent propaganda video.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8d7e61f8-8d4d-46f7-91af-fed81444e6a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And before I can even make the obvious joke, Shuster--yes, _the_ Shuster, Emmy in his background like a mafia pin--dives in and asks Harry what it felt like to see himself get strafed by presidential scat.
Harry's answer? Pure Gen Z: he was watching college football. And he knew it was bad the moment a link to Truth Social showed up on his phone, because--as he wisely notes--"nobody uses that app unless something weird is happening."
From there, the conversation gets real. Harry breaks down why Trump did what he did: insecurity, cruelty, and a total lack of seriousness about the office he holds. Trump wasn't just being vile--he was proving the point Harry, Shuster, me, _and all of you_ have been screaming for years: he's not a president; he's a malfunctioning Roomba with delusions of monarchy.
* * *
Blue Amp Media wants you -- to subscribe!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.mHVzJXRDKXQBGtiiX92zrN8SZ-vIPit6uMcGZPDUzKg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179372889)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07e326b2-5307-466c-a046-fa47837a96ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/42ded590-e9d1-4fc6-839b-52d120e500c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We dig into the Epstein files, the insane 427-1 House vote, the Senate pushing it through in hours, and the looming showdown over whether Trump will try to hide his own name from the files like a toddler pulling a blanket over his face. (Spoiler: he will.) Harry lays out exactly why the cover-up won't work. Shuster unloads a _beautiful_ dose of reporting on the thousand DOJ and FBI analysts who saw everything and may end up being whistleblowers. ("Imagine all the incompetence Pam Bondi and Kash Patel bring everywhere else," Shuster says, "and now picture them managing a classified records project." Enough said.)
We talk Gen Z--how they're not a monolith, how Trump temporarily conned insecure young men with fake "alpha" nonsense, and how the collapse we're seeing in polling now is Trump's karma finally arriving with a baseball bat. Harry breaks down how social media, toxic masculinity grifters, and billionaire pseudo-gurus confuse young guys--but also how Gen Z is _snapping out of it fast_.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.mHVzJXRDKXQBGtiiX92zrN8SZ-vIPit6uMcGZPDUzKg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179372889)
* * *
We get into politics, opportunity, economic populism, and why Democrats finally seem to be learning how to run campaigns in 2026--digitally, smartly, and authentically.
And speaking of authenticity? Harry's got it. He's passionate. He's genuine. He's fearless. And he's right: everyone is an influencer--_you_ included. Whether you've got 200 followers or 200,000, your voice matters. Especially now, as Trump tries to distract from scandals--[like the Venezuela madness, which Jonathan Larsen has been reporting on brilliantly](https://substack.com/redirect/a7c9c2b2-5890-4bfe-b4f1-1ba14f626cc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Harry's a hell of a guest, Shuster is a master of controlled outrage, and together they remind us why this fight is winnable--and why democracy still has a future worth fighting for.
* * *
#### **Keep Independent Media Loud, Smart, and Unbought**
If you're sick of watching corporate media treat Eric Trump's idiocy like economic insight, you're in the right place. Blue Amp Media isn't funded by billionaires, hedge funds, or Super PACs--it's powered by people who want real journalism with a pulse. Every paid subscription keeps this platform independent, fearless, and fully caffeinated for the next fight.
👉 **[Become a paid subscriber to Blue Amp Media--because the only thing louder than their stupidity should be our truth.](https://substack.com/redirect/42ded590-e9d1-4fc6-839b-52d120e500c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**P.S.** Corporate media won't print this--they're too busy pretending Eric Trump knows how crypto or democracy works. But we just did.
| A guest post by| [Harry Sisson](https://substack.com/@harryjsisson?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)23 | Democrat | @harryjsisson (2 million+) on Tik Tok | Email: inquiries@harryjsisson.net[Subscribe to Harry](https://substack.com/redirect/cb59f900-4daf-4320-8629-3df083e8b1b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Harry's a hell of a guest, Shuster is a master of controlled outrage, and together they remind us why this fight is winnable--and why democracy still has a future worth fighting for. Keep Independent Media Loud, Smart, and Unbought If you're sick of watching corporate media treat Eric Trump's idiocy like economic insight, you're in the right place. Blue Amp Media isn't funded by billionaires, hedge funds, or Super PACs--it's powered by people who want real journalism with a pulse. Every paid subscription keeps this platform independent, fearless, and fully caffeinated for the next fight. 👉 P.S.** Corporate media won't print this--they're too busy pretending Eric Trump knows how crypto or democracy works. But we just did. | A guest post by| | Democrat | @harryjsisson (2 million+) on Tik Tok | Email: inquiries@harryjsisson.net Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp Media, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Leftist mobs could not stop us
body:
At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)
---
Friend, They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025. They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)
---
ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---
| | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)
---
But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)
---
| | **Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you.** This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders. That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... **Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War.** And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. **Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? ** **[Every dollar you give today helps us protect our student leaders, send activism kits to chapters, defend free speech, and fuel our reach to change more hearts and minds.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)**
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)
---
The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. _Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked..._ **We came to speak truth.** We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. **And that 's exactly why we're winning.** Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going...
---
| | **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3Bg5DoRw4FB1hNTD7rVH5HECEy1JKEmm6ttXtPsCe7Psz5_06__5tryR333c3im4iV9-OfOyu7X4XEJ6ZE51tzGVXNJR84KAfStli3BxsrETW62wcZMctNIdAI7Nc1Jox1UCIGkHZAywAUNqtY-x75G48dNlkhJBIgCqmzWyM1Ir3dMwkH6IDuphqbh84xSzO19U_Mv5GNM1pXjjFJp9epZyZKG-CZwFztlxPd2NorOpXITAudQz-ri1R_KxtDWTwNmaB3R2pFaD7doODbZmIN3yqnteJY3rOgo151RPdgsn64S6f__xPvR6VAJ1LWEJzvoahLq7QH7_XP7_EOr-pNNS_liIf32emMJBfotC3flj2d1G_Kc5J3v89vvusx5EB9ul-pesfL2L14R_AwAA___jl5ge)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Equine Virus, Mattress Mack Movie, and Cowboy Robot Destroyed
body:
Multiple veterinary clinics across Texas have [reported cases](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMiPbePgJHGxC9jbdEDW4gdYY-63dwJvbr2ausFJlJZW--v58TV9AgeL2Gw50_LOmKeJdAjJjnvDvSREvymc5gDljKQcszyNNRpmH1FoaNXmg8Jps5d2s_KArdLprm9Yq1bfV7vQ8P9Ri-xUGa5SefTOr2fdmgaHv-qGtyL3HtDbqk6ZeG99rq-2jbwE6VMIq9MQp17wj4w-UNbzShble0lEFtzN_F9H8EmYUZrzvuy70roQZV4gRmFIUZszJYxJmfP8TZiyYKZ1F4n5JLdPJc0Z4ygXOQnGTHoH3IuFIcZN7ygWLDBSf6OUNS5IfDokXRq6y8983hUCl7YRV2wEUPmz8f0YvZ_4FAAD__zM-jgA) of Equine Herpesvirus Type 1 (EHV-1) linked to the World Championship Barrel Racing Finals in the Waco area from November 5 to 9. According to the Outlaw Equine Hospital and Rehab Center in Decatur, the outbreak is "highly aggressive and has been fatal."

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkc2OnDAQhJ_G3GbkHzDmwCHJiNvkmqPVjBtorQ3EbmZ28_QRu3mDSH3q7vpUpfp193egSOv8ExL2_D5tfsVXiciM2ePvg1Z8Uj5KAuaMpSR4vKXNa6mbi1IXLX0Aih--rkI_ytCpCnvVWmNrKZ2tlh5cIxs3yqnrtLHBaWtQO4ntpANOra2oP2FKafk55jqZ4FSt6sZZgBalqCUG4i1feUHGdyhT_NiemK-PLVWxX5j3Isw3oQehh5G2nSnRH8zlfBB6SDCvWOhIlzEjvPGSt2NehB52oCDMMEdhbrZTY-O6ybhRdQYetpFjC6CFtvzyZTvyA4W5nRKPCSiWrwuEk3H7Pvy4fy0ekHageRXmxgv6f159OiKTLwyMpcp92F8UIxXbilrOJ-8zDf9fB89e_w0AAP__Naac2Q) | |
# Thursday, November 20, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1916, actress [Evelyn Keyes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OszAQAJ_GdCDb_JnCxdfQ5WuvRAtewirGztkbCG9_urzCSVPPSPN1m25AnsL9P-xo-b3GKeCZPTJjmvD7RQEPSq-8A3PCnHdYHnuctNRtqVSp5eSA_DU1hbOzdIMq0Kq-q7tGStMVm50XI6UeQHXzPHTYm3ZxCgbjzNpKWfcF2V-ZUlp-qKu1dkY1qmlNB9CjFI1ERxxTxRsyviGv_ooHpmqJe-HtxvzMov4n9Cj0eJ5nxXmDGDwFrGK6Cz1uENwc40PoEQMnwiz0-MALc4kH-iuUPr4oY5Gse57kPeWuF42870D-k-G_zTms_gkAAP__3sJ6rg) was born in Port Arthur. She is remembered for her portrayal of Suellen O'Hara in the 1939 film _Gone with the Wind_. A 400-year-old live oak tree in Kyle is being relocated to realign a portion of a two-lane road. ## Equine Virus Spreading Fast
Multiple veterinary clinics across Texas have [reported cases](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMiPbePgJHGxC9jbdEDW4gdYY-63dwJvbr2ausFJlJZW--v58TV9AgeL2Gw50_LOmKeJdAjJjnvDvSREvymc5gDljKQcszyNNRpmH1FoaNXmg8Jps5d2s_KArdLprm9Yq1bfV7vQ8P9Ri-xUGa5SefTOr2fdmgaHv-qGtyL3HtDbqk6ZeG99rq-2jbwE6VMIq9MQp17wj4w-UNbzShble0lEFtzN_F9H8EmYUZrzvuy70roQZV4gRmFIUZszJYxJmfP8TZiyYKZ1F4n5JLdPJc0Z4ygXOQnGTHoH3IuFIcZN7ygWLDBSf6OUNS5IfDokXRq6y8983hUCl7YRV2wEUPmz8f0YvZ_4FAAD__zM-jgA) of Equine Herpesvirus Type 1 (EHV-1) linked to the World Championship Barrel Racing Finals in the Waco area from November 5 to 9. According to the Outlaw Equine Hospital and Rehab Center in Decatur, the outbreak is "highly aggressive and has been fatal." Yesterday, Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller [urged horse owners](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU9jOpA9GDCFi23osu2WaBIPwYodZ-1JSG6_giusNMUU_z_p_Z_TfEIf_P36jZEsv5c032krgZgpz_T79Hd6-fwsEZkzlRLxcotpBgldrVQNcnbow2fWlbNn6UZVkVVD3_ZaStNXq5UjDG03mvY8AhrXXQCcNAZH1FrqRVXe7jClQB7XNkvrjNJKd6ZHHEgKLcl5TrnhlZjeWJbwSS_KzSXFKtiV-VFE-yVgEjBt29Ys6a13jT0gYNpfAdNRrdeUC9WHU52efM6Etypb99h8CL70g9DyGtGHg87_2-Rl4S8AAP___Jt2wQ) to be vigilant for symptoms of the disease, which include nasal discharge, coughing, fever, lethargy, and neurological impairment. Infected horses should be quarantined, and those potentially exposed to the virus should not travel to any events until further notice. The outbreak has led to cancellation of the [Uvalde Rodeo Qualifier](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEa2MX-Fi9vQ5bZbogkeEivGJvYAyduvyO4brDSa5kjzzXe-LuMFnHfh9h8WNPSa4xjwyB6JMI343FzA3aUtL0CUMOcFpscSRyVUzaXkSowWnH-PurDmKmwvCzSybapGC9E1xd3UHdbCtsJ2quomkHJuG43XSfe2VrLqC2fOY1Iq8ZmqnCvbSS113TUALQqmBVpHMZV0R8IX5Nm_446pnOJSeHMnWjOr_jE1MDUcx1E-MtAZMjWcNkwNPk7gmRpOFFODlOfqmRp-FPnHkceNrgnhwdcUl5UynyBM6D2Qi4HHmW87eIs8RYuRPzfwbnaYeIbAIVAMLv5mGd4ntkjGrofz3uWmZVrcFnD-8zb9rezdqO8AAAD__5_dlWQ) this week and all events at the Texas Rose Horse Park in Tyler until next month. "_This is not just about protecting our facility—it's about safeguarding the larger Texas equine community_ ," [the park said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOpCAQwPGnwW4MIKAWFtfYfddeaUYYPsmi7AGr3779ZX2FSyaZqf7Jb_58LV8YYji-f-NOU_3xaTnoKpFqpbzQ31c46Az5VXasNVMpO9rHnhbJpQYhQPLFYYjvRTVuWrkbRUOT6E1nFOeDabZp5YPQo8eu7wY0Glet9eh7NEjWkcEmTJ-YEJLf07W-c4NQQunBIPbEmeLkQk25rRtV-sHi4zudlFub9iZOW63PwrpfTM5Mztd1tXYtYmzryeSMuQYbicn542JyjsliZHK-Q5BTIdhSLgRPzA_YMNYCdNLxWTcfbj-kV10z4eNzQPJg6agZI9wdJmfNBQyd5RLtAM46DkrrERC9gEGNrrdmVL5XTZ7c8woxhmJ6pvj3jiHekvp__z8n-S8AAP__lRiabQ) in a statement. "_This virus can spread fast, it can be deadly, and the earliest signs are often so subtle they're easy to miss_ ," [said Miller](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO2yAURp8Gb1iAiR0PDFEVqx3yd6na0SJw7VwFTArXTvL2VfwKlb7x09HR-XMZLxYDLvOXjWDoNaVxgWcJQAR5hL8rLrBhXku0RBlKidbdYxqVUAcuJVdi9BbDe9SVN1fhe1mBkV3btFqIY1vdTOOcm5zq_WSbvhW27zqwAL0UWuiD1RWaD0xKJfY19dT4o9RSH46ttR0IpgV4pJRrugHBy5YpvNMGuXYpVsHciB6FNSemBqaG_WDnjG4NtGao57QxNXzBs_DzBgsVpoZTJnQBmBqkaBvJ1PAtxYilYFog8wuGAJmfAmQq_NeHyM97C_5j8Wuh_OZp4ufvv7nkP1e6ZrD3Khv_eGIIWNqOaTFHi2FXpP8Luxn1LwAA___nIY9N). "_If we work together and take this seriously, we can get ahead of this outbreak and keep our horses and our state's $12.3 billion equine industry safe_."
## River Walk Boat Passengers Pepper Sprayed
An unidentified woman [pepper-sprayed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdCDvYgwpXFxDl2uvRBu8BCvG5mwHkrc_Jbo3-KUpP81ovj_X6UrOu3D_TRub8lriFPjMnkvhNPHfpwt8uPTMG5WSOOeN5scWJ5TY1QA1ysmS8-9JVdbcpL1AxQZ63Wol5aCr1VhAmAdmq4f2NnfEulu0uvQwL5IR-8qZTxkAym_aZmntAApUN2iinqVQkq0rMTVl5cIvyot_x4NTM8et8mYtZc-i_SVwFDie59ls70yBQonBxQ8kcPy8Ejj6OJMXOFIqbvYscMwU6v9ondzBqT7JP2oEuCgFXbOve5WM3U_nvcu6F0reN3L-O15-puww-C8AAP__ZoeBMA) eight people during a San Antonio River Walk boat ride last weekend after she was confronted about her phone's volume, according to witnesses. In a viral TikTok [video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7mLxZ8AFxTbusu2WFjGH5ChgsnBiJ29_lbzClaaakeaTvn_n5ewx4Xb96zM4esWybHC0BERQF_j_xA12rM-WPVGF1rJf77ksgonxxPlJsCV4TO9F9cFdWJh4D44bLbVizOr-5tQYpI0i6qi9VqtRF3vhIlqzcq_lZHt0nzPOBftGDlEGyxVXo9XeG2CdYhCQSh3oBgQv32J6lx3qsJbcJ3cjerRO_unE3In5OI6B8E7l_pk_nWLRE16fEAbcBp-hYifmHQOUTsxmNFIqpqwVkxj5xCfbVxceB6aETZtOsWv2mL4w-p2i3YmfAAAA___ZC3hN), the woman is seen yelling as she gets off the boat while another passenger calls her "trash" and says she's going to be "TikTok famous." Another [video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4jAUhJ8m6Yj8b6dwsU06tt0yMvEJHGHHrH1I4O2v4BWuNNWMNJ_0_TvP54AJt-vfkMHTay3zBkdLQAR1hv9P3GDH-mw5EFVoLYflnsssmNAnzk-CzTFges-qj_7C4sh78NwaaRRjzvQ378YojFp0iFELfeExgLFscVwvRo_W9ug_Z5wL9o0cVhkdV1xpZ0KwwDrFICKVOtANCF6hrelddqjDUnKf_I3o0Tr5pxNTJ6bjOAbCO5X7Z_50iq2B8PqEOOA2hAwVOzHtGKF0YrLaSmmYY1xJY0cnpOurj48DU8JmbKfYNQdMXxj9TtHuxU8AAAD__9KyeEI) recorded moments later shows several passengers—including a young child—wincing in pain after apparently getting pepper-sprayed. According to a [police report](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OgzAMx58mbEFxoHwMGW5h6603IpeYNqohuSSF8vYn-gonWV5s_f4fP9fxio7dev_GhUx-z35caU9MOVMc6fflVtpcfKUFc46U0oLTc_GjVvoiAaRWo0XHx1gX1tyU7aEgA21TNbVSXVM8TD9raC8V9LPqacapsco2oKC1k4W2rgpnThiAVp-pyrmyHdRQX7oGsSUlakXWZR_L_KBMb0wzH36jWE5-Kdg8cg5JVF9CD0IP-76Xz4T5PAo9nGmEHthPyEIPp5TQA8C5uvPdL7hKZKY7WT5koBAoyhQiHmRlJwP5wCT9KqPbKMod-SlvHrNMGKxMeJz8IhobdsfsUtOKWt0XdPzxl__X6mb0XwAAAP__F9KL1A), the boat operator had asked the woman to get off because her phone's volume was interfering with other passengers' ability to hear the tour script. As of Wednesday evening, officers were still looking for the woman. "_You don’t really expect anything like that to happen_ ," [said an employee](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAURE-DM1rwDdgTEGzibDbd0PrA9zRqDF5g7Onbr7qvsFJlJT1VvT-f6yfGFPPXb9zJ9p-trJmulqh3qiv9_Y6Zzli_2469V2ptR__YywoCNJeSg1gDxvRc1RCsE-FDDmTlZEajhJjNcLebm6WGCcgo57R3SimDCNpoKQ0KGqJ9waQE8c5428YwSyWVng3iRIIpQSH2Um_9Tp1-sG3pWU6qN1_2Idl770dj4y8GC4Pluq7bg3LTr5bBgrVHn4jB8jrGYEnFY2KwvEm8YeaYe8mx8KOk6IlfZcfMDzoOqrwdFZ-8xpMqdwU7v4gelAODBaaR4_yhnZEbn7QIXM0-cOfQc-HGUYHzFMgN1YbjiinFZiamxNeOMb239_8zflr4FwAA__-Io5Vn) of a nearby gift shop. "_I hope they catch her because that's so messed up_."
## Magnussen's Mattress Mack Movie
Houston furniture salesman Jim "Mattress Mack" McIngvale is the subject of an [upcoming biopic](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-DMyzA-C8g2MRZb7qhheHRRgvGA8929-1HbmlOMFIFJZVUpa_-PeaH9sFvz786gsKXS_MGVwmACHmGr8NvcPp8lKgRM5QStfkf0yyYaCnnVLDZah_es6ysWpgdeQWK913TScaGrlqVXcSoHV-gtS3rzeCEa8alHZxlzC1yqLy6yzgX7KOmdo0duOSyHTqte2BEMrAeU65xBYSXLi680wm5NilWQa2IeyHNHyImIqbrumqz5rTdKRGTOQIeGYiYdEZvwu1-YOhNQ2M6PVCjC9IMJ-gAlgrOR9mPTb2ve5WV3S8fgi9dTyR7Ru3DZxt_99ipxHcAAAD__1u2gXA) produced by actor Billy Magnussen and directed by Houston native Shane Andries. Filming is set to begin this month. McIngvale, 74, opened Gallery Furniture [in the 1980s](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwZstwATTgaGLt3TtaP2E3w4qmBR-x_HbV4mqvkClGz_dSfd5ns4QYliXD0ho6THnacW9RiTCMuH3Fla8h7LVBEQFa01w-Up5klyeWiFayScPIR6Tarx13L-JBq0YdK8V50Y3VwuojJs1OjcYj0oYwx2XDtCbQV8Am2CfZUJI_krfzb03Qgl1MhpgQM4URx8ol46uSPiAOscj37F0l5yaaK9Et8r6dyZHJsd937sFYsRyzFtZA20Fn5DJ8QYLViZHcHmj9he1f6op1t_2EGOoemCKLwlCfG3Q_565W_kTAAD__8Ocez4) and became a local icon with his famous "Save You Money" TV [commercials](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9us0AQBPCnOTqjvT-ccXHFJ31ypEhOG6dCa24xqxzG4Raw3z7CrxBpqhnpV8znqTkhJ75dP3CgII9ubG605kQiNDX0M_ONFp7mPKDIRDkP2H4PY2PAVDutdwaaiJyejStiuEA86IKC3nvrHUDtiz4A-srWhAbaylisOu1sFZ05aNfBoY4Fhw3T2sArtuxsrLXTrqo94p5AOaDIMk6l9CT0wNyl57jQVLbjUKTQi9yzsv-UOSpzXNe1fI6zzBfa9q1BaXtlj4uy_-sv_zi_8Znf12IK8b5ySpz9Xjm4DsjpRcrfjliC-Q0AAP__lhZxhQ). Beloved for his philanthropy and enthusiasm for the Astros, McIngvale has also made headlines for his eye-popping bets and support for Republican politicians. Magnussen will star as McIngvale alongside Dianna Agron, Darby Lee-Stack, and Rob Corddry. The film will depict the challenges McIngvale experienced launching his business and the mental health struggles of his daughter Elizabeth, who became a spokesperson for the International OCD Foundation after receiving treatment for the disorder. "_Jim McIngvale's story is one of resilience, heart, and community_ ,” [Magnussen said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdI7sxRhSuPgbuvztlWjBC9k72-SwQ5K3PxHpnuCk6Ub6NN98XIYLcuC0_MdIrjzndUj0yIFKoW2g7zsn2nm754ilbJRzxOkrrgMoaKTWEtTgkcNrMJV3o_JnXZHTra2tUaqz1dXRjObczAa6DojUbLCjcTK6abGr9UgVuwOmNah36tNc-04bbZrOIrakhFHkuazbqVyp0BPzHF7rTttpWmMV3LWUWxb1PwG9gN4T-sCJjlJAf7AF9FoL6H8d5CEhRw7hJSMu6Z4zJekZU0KJy7Ym-clRxonTsmMgqaG2FnStrIC-2py_PTgEzrYVRi0RObynlL8duDv4CQAA__-d54Rn) in a statement. "_I’m honored to help bring his incredible journey to the screen and to collaborate with such passionate storytellers in capturing the spirit of Mattress Mack and the city of Houston_."

According to the Outlaw Equine Hospital and Rehab Center in Decatur, the outbreak is "highly aggressive and has been fatal." Yesterday, Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller to be vigilant for symptoms of the disease, which include nasal discharge, coughing, fever, lethargy, and neurological impairment. Infected horses should be quarantined, and those potentially exposed to the virus should not travel to any events until further notice. The outbreak has led to cancellation of the this week and all events at the Texas Rose Horse Park in Tyler until next month. "This is not just about protecting our facility—it's about safeguarding the larger Texas equine community ," in a statement. "This virus can spread fast, it can be deadly, and the earliest signs are often so subtle they're easy to miss ," . "If we work together and take this seriously, we can get ahead of this outbreak and keep our horses and our state's $12.3 billion equine industry safe." River Walk Boat Passengers Pepper Sprayed An unidentified woman eight people during a San Antonio River Walk boat ride last weekend after she was confronted about her phone's volume, according to witnesses. In a viral TikTok , the woman is seen yelling as she gets off the boat while another passenger calls her "trash" and says she's going to be "TikTok famous." Another recorded moments later shows several passengers—including a young child—wincing in pain after apparently getting pepper-sprayed. According to a , the boat operator had asked the woman to get off because her phone's volume was interfering with other passengers' ability to hear the tour script. As of Wednesday evening, officers were still looking for the woman. "You don’t really expect anything like that to happen ," of a nearby gift shop. "I hope they catch her because that's so messed up." Magnussen's Mattress Mack Movie Houston furniture salesman Jim "Mattress Mack" McIngvale is the subject of an produced by actor Billy Magnussen and directed by Houston native Shane Andries. Filming is set to begin this month. McIngvale, 74, opened Gallery Furniture and became a local icon with his famous "Save You Money" TV . Beloved for his philanthropy and enthusiasm for the Astros, McIngvale has also made headlines for his eye-popping bets and support for Republican politicians. Magnussen will star as McIngvale alongside Dianna Agron, Darby Lee-Stack, and Rob Corddry. The film will depict the challenges McIngvale experienced launching his business and the mental health struggles of his daughter Elizabeth, who became a spokesperson for the International OCD Foundation after receiving treatment for the disorder. "Jim McIngvale's story is one of resilience, heart, and community ,” in a statement. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Platner Packs Biddeford Town Hall, Blasts Trump and Collins as Controversies Loom Over Insurgent Senate Bid
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Platner Packs Biddeford Town Hall, Blasts Trump and Collins as Controversies Loom Over Insurgent Senate Bid (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=610121710d&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Nov 20, 2025 06:53 am
Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner drew nearly 1,000 people to a town hall in Biddeford on Wednesday night, delivering an aggressive, populist message that targeted President Donald Trump (R), Sen. Susan Collins (R), corporate power, and the political establishment in both parties. Campaign staff said more than 1,200 people RSVP’d for the event at Biddeford [...]

The post Platner Packs Biddeford Town Hall, Blasts Trump and Collins as Controversies Loom Over Insurgent Senate Bid (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=5bf1e29f23&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=74c85e9bf2&e=f093fa355c) .
Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=0123aaa1cf&e=f093fa355c)

** Thieves Steal Copper Pipe from Bailey Island Gift Shop Causing Dangerous Propane Leak (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=f6fe5ff2f8&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Nov 19, 2025 05:37 pm

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let big oil and gas build fracking sites next to schools
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let big oil and gas build fracking sites next to schools](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38b986f8-384c-4365-a35e-6ee7585daeea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There are bad ideas, there are worse ideas, and then there are unbelievably awful ideas -- **[like building fracking sites right next to elementary schools and day care centers](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b503863-0a52-4bd4-a6ef-680aeb90b008/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). ** That's right -- Big Oil & Gas billionaires want to build massive storage tanks and wells beside our kids’ schools and day care -- unleashing toxic pollution, and poisoning the air they breathe and the water they drink. No child should grow up next to a fracking site, especially when they're in their most critical stage of development. **Add your name and demand our elected officials act to stop these dangerous projects. >> ["Don't let them build fracking sites next to schools!" ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66991945-0767-4c17-9950-cba8b6a8f952/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc87a6fec-0466-43cd-8bf7-b3b11338f5e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50b6247c-e58d-488f-a420-826285b015a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4795e00a-81e3-4afd-a56b-9cee88f912cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teea405ac-f894-4390-9c4d-fd6d8693b950/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: “We’re killing all the right people.” – Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Makes me sick to my stomach
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97f8ea34-48dd-402a-acbe-28e8d69f93e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Lindsey Graham just stood on stage and bragged about “killing all the right people.” Who exactly are the “right people,” Lindsey? The child shot in their classroom because you refuse to pass common-sense gun legislation? The teenage girl who was refused care while suffering a miscarriage and died because of your extreme abortion bans? The millions of Americans who can’t get the care they need because they don’t have health insurance? As a pediatrician, I’ve spent my entire career saving lives, fighting to keep kids healthy, and advocating for families who can’t afford basic care. So when I hear Lindsey Graham, a sitting U.S. Senator, bragging about killing “the right people,” it makes me sick to my stomach and reminds me exactly why I’m running for Senate. Because public service should be about compassion, not cruelty. It should be about enriching lives, not glorifying death. [But to replace Lindsey Graham and restore decency to South Carolina’s Senate seat, I need your help. Will you split a $10 donation or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now to help us fight back against this cruelty and elect a Senator who actually values human life?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T236a3622-cc22-47a9-8473-f845c82d6b32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcac1ef46-bf59-4ae9-a15d-c7876986e9e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

| **I Stood Up for America - Stand With Me...**
---
|
---
| _**I need to be direct with you...**_ 👉I stood up for **Arizona.**
👉I stood up for **election integrity.**
👉I stood up for the **United States** and I paid a heavy price for it.
👉President Trump **pardoned me** because he knows I fought for this country with everything I had.

_BUT..._ that pardon didn’t stop the attacks. It didn’t stop the Arizona Attorney General from filing new charges. And it didn’t stop the **M****assive Legal Bills** that are still piling up every single day. The Left is trying to bury me in court costs so I can’t continue fighting for Arizona in the State Senate. They know if they drain my resources, they can silence my voice - and yours. **I’m asking for your help because I cannot win this battle alone!**

My Legal Defense Fund is running low, and the next round of filings and hearings is coming fast. Every legal defense fund dollar - **$25, $50, $100 or more** - goes directly toward keeping me in this Fight for Our State, Our Elections, and Our Country. \- The stakes could not be higher.
\- The urgency could not be greater.
\- And the time to stand with me is **R****ight Now!**

name: Team Scalise
subject: Wish the Trump Family a Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Join us in thanking the Trump Family for their service to our nation. Sign our special Thanksgiving card today!

With Thanksgiving just days away, we're reminded of the many reasons we're grateful for President Trump's tireless efforts to Make America Great Again.
Despite the relentless attacks from the Fake News media and the Radical Left, President Trump has continued to fight for the American People.
[So, in the spirit of gratitude and appreciation, we're organizing a special Thanksgiving card for the Trump Family.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr1grr1he5v3b9jhq0vq722jpps6gjg394rujgu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm4pb6clh2bs)
We want to express our heartfelt thanks for their selfless service and commitment to our nation's greatness:To: The Trump FamilyFrom: FriendMessage: Happy Thanksgiving, and God bless you![](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zasepshuobbs1lua60dh1b0diq1d68jrte1ine3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm4pb6clh2bs)[SIGN OUR THANKSGIVING CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdbvuom6dgfcdmvii2aqoiacs3t2cr3gcvuijce0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm4pb6clh2bs)It'll take just 30 seconds of your time, but it will mean the world to the Trump Family. Will you join us in wishing them a happy and blessed Thanksgiving?
- Team Scalise
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1og6t24ohpq5c4b25equgpqstm3olikuhvt78uo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm4pb6clh2bs) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm8760k5bvril2pd8bph1tav0pp7t4m7k3mkblqg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm4pb6clh2bs)| | |
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.

**I** n this episode, Matt is joined by **Chuck Corra** -- policy expert, co-host of _Appodlachia_ , and author of the Substack _No Elegy Needed_ -- to dive into a troubling new trend: Christian Nationalist groups building isolated, ideologically driven towns across Appalachia.
We explore how Christian Nationalism has evolved from a political force to a separatist movement, backed not only by far-right religious leaders but increasingly by Silicon Valley venture capital and figures aligned with JD Vance, Peter Thiel, and the online Christian Right.
Matt and Chuck trace the historical parallels to extremist enclaves like the Branch Davidians, the Covenant, Sword & Arm of the Lord, and the Posse Comitatus movement -- showing how today's "heritage communities" echo past attempts to secede from society, reject civil rights progress, and build white-only theocratic enclaves.
We also look at what these developments mean for Appalachian communities: land prices, political radicalization, and the rising threat of modern militia-style organizing.
Finally, we discuss what can be done -- from local journalism and policy guardrails to public awareness -- to push back before these projects reshape the region.
**Subscribe to Appodlachia**

Also, a quick shout-out to Olivia Hathaway from the Blue Ridge Young Democrats for sending along this intreactive **[Virginia Local Food Map,](https://substack.com/redirect/df9a58aa-d2ad-4661-8b31-8995c8012840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as folks are struggling with prices during Trump's ongoing tariff,s and people are looking to buy locally: [https://forms.gle/YY14vXyKMRn6xRss8](https://substack.com/redirect/df9a58aa-d2ad-4661-8b31-8995c8012840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

###### _By the Ballot is a free SubStack that features unapologetic dispatches from the New South 's next generation of Democrats. Commentary on stances, tactics, and news on the Left. We don't claim to know everything or always be right, we just want to be a part of the conversation._
