name: Rural Americans United
subject: A Line in the Sand for Rural Washington
body:
From the Methow to the Yakima Valley, people came together to protest harmful Medicaid cuts that target the most vulnerable.
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Fighting Fascism's Grip on Healthcare
* Progressive Strategies NW Data: Long Term Health
* Expanding Our Reaching

---
| |
---
| On Tuesday November 19, 2025, I joined a wonderful group of people who represent our communities in many different ways. Methow Rising, Okanogan Action Coalition, Methow People for Democracy, CW Resistance, Yakima Valley Healthcare Defense Partnership, and 350 Yakima Climate Action were all present, along with Maria Beltran, the former Legislative District fourteen Democratic candidate for the State Senate and current Democratic candidate for Congressional District 4, John Duresky. Together, we stood in protest against cuts to Medicaid and ACA subsidies outside Congressional District four's Representative Do Nothing Dan Newhouse's office in downtown Yakima.
Do Nothing Dan Newhouse is a perfect example of a Republican on the ropes. He is incompetent, ineffectual, spineless, and obsequious, and despite these character traits of his, he has long been dismissed as merely benign, just a neutered mutt. His slow walking of conservation, his soft pedaling on immigration, his edging out of small farmers while supporting corporate farming, his passive aggressive leadership in wage suppression, his stalling of critical water projects, and much more have always been interpreted as "he is not that bad."
---
| | [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019k0LREUzt-YxrN_mbyRkP9Ngq7-0ydgL7gYDCNKZK9zKaPLjs-4UoqCNqcvrnx_4YQptXQV3i_nG8-m3Q0VwiUPKkUdwbmXwweSyi8_lCzi5MgMbjbv_ozpZCuBQxekta2IkmPOkbKGp3Ypv1-55Qz6oeKAuVseMZNkmFUnrflk6DMkYL3jt2Q==&c=bi6YMUunYMXTsNMBOZi8elsTWfruBG4T__TO4V4PzCbT2mQhsgP8Nw==&ch=bGjb80cB9WNX6d17q2PT_XSOKUWdS-4lnuDVgedORRvJnv02trhnGg==)
---
| Unfortunately for Do Nothing Dan, he represents a high contrast district. Congressional District 4 is a place where the average household income is half the state average, where the majority of people depend on Medicaid, SNAP, and other assistance programs, where more than half of the population are second generation or newer American citizens and many remain undocumented, where two sovereign nations, the Yakama and the Colville, continue to endure hardship, where the fentanyl crisis is widespread, and where homelessness and food insecurity are epidemic. Yet he continues to support completely an administration that has placed these populations, our communities, in its cross hairs as the most undesirable of people whose rights, dignity, and in many cases very presence in this country are being stripped. Dan's almost silent shuffle through his obligations to the people of Congressional District 4 now sounds like thunder with every egregious vote he casts. He is literally attacking and harming the people he swore to represent. There is nothing that forty seven has done that is good, but we can say that his wrongdoing has shone a bright light upon his weak sycophants, and there is no longer anywhere for them to hide.
---
| |
---
| Looking only at Medicaid cuts, there are four provisions that we must hold Dan and others like him accountable for because these changes will devastate rural areas.

1. Mandating that adults who are eligible for Medicaid through the ACA expansion meet work and reporting requirements. This is estimated to cut three hundred twenty six billion dollars. People in rural Washington already face limited job opportunities, unreliable transportation, and lower wages. By imposing work mandates on adults in rural areas, this provision condemns many to losing their healthcare based on circumstances entirely beyond their control.
2. Establishing a moratorium on new or increased provider taxes and reducing existing provider taxes in expansion states. This is estimated to cut one hundred ninety one billion dollars. States have few ways to generate their share of Medicaid funding. Provider taxes are one of the main tools they use. Limiting or reducing these taxes directly reduces the number of federal Medicaid dollars a state can draw down. This is not a legitimate cost saving measure. It is a calculated mechanism to deny Medicaid funding at the state level.
3. Revising the payment limit for state directed payments. This is estimated to cut one hundred forty nine billion dollars. This is likely the most destructive provision. Rural hospitals and nursing homes operate with lower reimbursements, higher costs, and fragile budgets. States often use directed payments to channel needed funds to rural programs. This provision would prevent states from directing money where it is needed most. The result will be closures of rural nursing homes, hospitals, and community health providers.
4. Increasing the frequency of eligibility redeterminations for the ACA expansion group. This is estimated to cut sixty three billion dollars. This provision is designed to remove eligible people from Medicaid by making the process burdensome and by expecting that people will be unable to comply or that the system will fail them. Either way, they are removed from coverage.

Do Nothing Dan may have been able to justify some of his actions if these were truly cost saving measures. But they are not. They are cruel parlor tricks designed to deny benefits to people who need them desperately, and that is indefensible. It is pure cowardice. We have long known that MAGA cannot formulate real policy, and although there was a chance they might reduce costs, it is clear the only thing they are capable of is running a con. Cruel and incompetent.

---
| |
---
The data and narrative below is provided by Progressive Strategies Northwest
Voter Turnout: Long Term Care
In Washington's 2025 election, Washington State voters authorized the state's Long-Term Care tax to be invested in the stock market by a margin of about 16 points (58% to 42%). The measure -- supported by many labor unions and progressive organizations -- did especially well in King County and among Democratic voters. However, like many ballot measures, it had interesting cross-coalitional support. The measure did well in areas with higher-income and older voters, but struggled in some tax-averse, working-class communities.
The most supportive rural areas tended to be more progressive, and higher in income and education rate, with retirement areas somewhat over-represented. Although just beyond the top performance list, many Hispanic and Native American communities (here represented by Nespelem) ranked highly.
---
| |
---
The lowest-performing rural communities tended to be highly conservative, with mostly white electorates. Most are in Eastern Washington, although portions of increasingly conservative, working-class Grays Harbor County also appear on the list.
---
|
---
| |
---
## Expanding Our Reach and Strengthening Our Voice

We strive for constant growth because standing still is not an option. Rural Americans United is currently in discussions with Help Save America and Prosperity Eastern Washington, a pro democracy group working in Congressional District five. Their focus is placing pro democracy messages on billboards in rural communities.
This direction aligns closely with the work Rural Americans United has been pursuing for years. We have been delivering pro democracy messages to rural communities across Washington State through radio, direct mail, digital outreach, and community partnerships. If we are to fulfill our vision and cultivate a rural America where justice, inclusion, and informed voices prevail, we must ensure that every child born in this country is protected by the strength and resolve of the people.
We will continue to fight fascism, defend our democratic values, and drown out the false and hateful narratives of MAGA. Rural communities deserve truth, dignity, and representation, and we will not back down in this fight.

---
---
| |
---
| | [Your Donation Is Important](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019k0LREUzt-YxrN_mbyRkP9Ngq7-0ydgL7gYDCNKZK9zKaPLjs-4UojIRWL7mvKeq9tf1bEgi9b0ZK_BZNvNpyw4jdkZrKJeJB7dCPQV1NaVj6ZCW1hvtzJtx4rOQaVBm981Ww1BQE2OE_QmZPQvh-UgiS4ZAvq_VRLFs8hNC7C5LUmiUqE-1zpepZvWYLHaxptxvjswYceRmJCs1vuWKGWI1YnTf9eTtMb9rAfA4LQ8=&c=bi6YMUunYMXTsNMBOZi8elsTWfruBG4T__TO4V4PzCbT2mQhsgP8Nw==&ch=bGjb80cB9WNX6d17q2PT_XSOKUWdS-4lnuDVgedORRvJnv02trhnGg==)
---
| [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019k0LREUzt-YxrN_mbyRkP9Ngq7-0ydgL7gYDCNKZK9zKaPLjs-4UojIRWL7mvKeqPh62YsIYwF24NW8v65VcPdFNVPG0vRcbPD--UeFTjDm2YvgHNJQd9uk8ciLjEHj02Hh4HGp80_v_e_ZrUg8ChwW19Xa_NOmnuLshbrjKLr3gK2Mlqp1xKQ==&c=bi6YMUunYMXTsNMBOZi8elsTWfruBG4T__TO4V4PzCbT2mQhsgP8Nw==&ch=bGjb80cB9WNX6d17q2PT_XSOKUWdS-4lnuDVgedORRvJnv02trhnGg==) [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019k0LREUzt-YxrN_mbyRkP9Ngq7-0ydgL7gYDCNKZK9zKaPLjs-4UojIRWL7mvKeqKX2JYxupE2kZXL8Hm-8mkeYw74BL6lUuZVnrD8dQcHI_yqgj5dC5WEbHY5govpUCX7e0pv8Plzc592c2jWQKZ1kQXHTzL-iC09OExWL6KP697D2ogNfNJA==&c=bi6YMUunYMXTsNMBOZi8elsTWfruBG4T__TO4V4PzCbT2mQhsgP8Nw==&ch=bGjb80cB9WNX6d17q2PT_XSOKUWdS-4lnuDVgedORRvJnv02trhnGg==) [](mailto:doug@ruralamericansunited.org)
---
Rural Americans United
---

---
[Unsubscribe](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001Q4bpI-DUSgIGCuVGk3deig%3D&ch=b74df52e-2ed9-11f0-ba7a-fa163e45caeb&ca=e3b2ff37-42e7-4e21-ab89-c2cf6edd9215) | [Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001Q4bpI-DUSgIGCuVGk3deig%3D&ch=b74df52e-2ed9-11f0-ba7a-fa163e45caeb&ca=e3b2ff37-42e7-4e21-ab89-c2cf6edd9215) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zte2imv23ck22hb3u3u7hs7dr63m060rfs5aaqv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqvk3qb2ps4ph0ajsa68jbglqeu9k9q82qnt1rh8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuv17j182eje4u0781blr42s91gg9l1ab6nbqpe8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnoib7onc354snq6g6eilmpk5trtv6dfqp15sm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z910u66nooalvq58emhb101om3tdcqsojefpc270_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zem4icsrmadpolv0bnjihq04n8l6n1hoo233t918_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc98ffagjq3lgreg6fa9eap3kv5gmbbfk761779g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8fsnvfnim2okk4jortv95s6hg44cicajgia5kl8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfi9s31lj0nfigqgsi14mk842gc5jaraldcc3igg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmi6n8lb3lcdoi2p5lnv3cda8vo91ufaf5o3pn2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhmaoj1c1h2bs)

And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Charlie showed us how we take back our culture for good
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvn0efdsn7umcoh4abta8jbv45hijbmehvqdrmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm6p34c9h2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjen7jjodelq0blkbfa4f6khr3i82b6s5im00t1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm6p34c9h2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlkvekutgc754q10vv6jouuk568c9p58td2p275o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm6p34c9h2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvud4ov3clgr049u73l5nddtttbee9oqnecvdp18_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cdhm6p34c9h2bs)

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

---
| Team,
Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court the right has found themselves in an existential crisis.
At a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA:
Putting down Justices like "stray cats."
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u5qzV7qgAxhsNmla2DedWLeY3NZweQRujhkbCbthbggcYmpyjJCv3F6p-pJ28SsLVZF3w3w6fjuPsxI_qcZQldHk18TIBWSp-PwvsPiWPMNpR0vNvnGfujMFaNr2c_WQJNnnVP47xi0-pL5G6uuiI3qxs5Xgui7IUAw9-8s3V0nvS_SM7qcHLKGQdwkTD1EKjzgNw42VdCfNLXkxGA1dXslPB3XqK0Dm&c=azxar0yoGp9dCVdA5Fn-FYj6vI-0koRmFo7RAZZAyEKIrBekzP0TaQ==&ch=KR-gEAgOJxglZG41-K4-X9_pmcZieCHvKHYDewNOwYfWbOiqijaQrw==)
---
This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em."
Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson.
The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Nov. 4th, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory in PA that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't mess with our courts.
MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people.
These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America.
Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. [To move on to the coming judicial fights in MI, AZ, and GA, we need to close the books on PA. Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u5qzV7qgAxhsNmla2DedWLeY3NZweQRujhkbCbthbggcYmpyjJCv3F6p-pJ28SsLVZF3w3w6fjuPsxI_qcZQldHk18TIBWSp-PwvsPiWPMNpR0vNvnGfujMFaNr2c_WQJNnnVP47xi0-pL5G6uuiI3qxs5Xgui7IUAw9-8s3V0nvS_SM7qcHLKGQdwkTD1EKjzgNw42VdCeR2XvvRB-IqeT7Ciu__4_o&c=azxar0yoGp9dCVdA5Fn-FYj6vI-0koRmFo7RAZZAyEKIrBekzP0TaQ==&ch=KR-gEAgOJxglZG41-K4-X9_pmcZieCHvKHYDewNOwYfWbOiqijaQrw==)

clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | Team, Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court the right has found themselves in an existential crisis. At a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA: Putting down Justices like "stray cats." | == This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em." Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson. The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Nov. 4th, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory in PA that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't mess with our courts. MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people. These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America. Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. == | | | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for standing beside us in PA and in the battles to come. Team Defend our Courts | == | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

Steve Thompson, Editor

Friend, Charlie Kirk gave EVERYTHING to defend this country. But before he left us, he gave us something even more powerful — _A step-by-step plan to beat the Left and save America._ **It’s all in his book:****_How We Win._** And today, we want to send it to you for FREE.

All we ask is that you chip in ANY amount to help Turning Point USA continue the mission Charlie started — reaching the next generation with truth, boldness, and love for America. This is the blueprint Charlie used to build the most powerful Conservative youth movement in America... And it’s the plan we’ll keep using to change the culture and save the country. It’s not just theory... It’s not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... **It’s about ACTION.** Charlie spent over a decade building the most powerful youth movement in American history: 🔥 820,000+ student activists
Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 A generation shifting towards conservatism in real time

[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t613w3&__onlt=h)

And now it’s up to patriots like YOU to carry the torch Charlie lit. **Friend,****_How We Win_****is how we save our country.** One student. One campus. One bold patriot at a time.

subject: Texas’ gerrymander is paused but we’re ready to retaliate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Our mission is critical to saving our democracy and preserving our freedoms from the fascist MAGA movement.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016rvb8odNH9NMirYW75iXPgPJ03_5eW0o94NhqU_qa62ToB475KGTXL1jl1dRX8DAtIouIDPv5wN44z6tNDQL1F8z6vcQzDjl6V4I1eda4jokiaATLv0tULhlbmshi0oMDFSniOs4S9hh8KKXbG22fId4fzwmpJyqGFi6X18KigYl9kubsF85aexlbCahs6cr1f1h7AjVPUQ6Rq7c5ruh6lS8cwUTEXbTl621w3L9KtI=&c=PHZu94dot0YE70HvG42dpQCvcCt9v1orKUuDiAWKtmB9U6kMSXvjzg==&ch=9g0CMeSp97jCW01gyzve-LUk8C7RFDNVX9iBUaJ58ZZkD43NX5ZXcg==)
---
| Peter,
When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest.
But at first, Democrats brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA.
Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware.
Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began.
In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November.
A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for.
We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow.
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016rvb8odNH9NMirYW75iXPgPJ03_5eW0o94NhqU_qa62ToB475KGTXL1jl1dRX8DAtIouIDPv5wN44z6tNDQL1F8z6vcQzDjl6V4I1eda4jokiaATLv0tULhlbmshi0oMDFSniOs4S9hh8KKXbG22fId4fzwmpJyqGFi6X18KigYl9kubsF85aexlbCahs6cr1f1h7AjVPUQ6Rq7c5ruh6oxoewG2r5h0ZClHXZEWpl0=&c=PHZu94dot0YE70HvG42dpQCvcCt9v1orKUuDiAWKtmB9U6kMSXvjzg==&ch=9g0CMeSp97jCW01gyzve-LUk8C7RFDNVX9iBUaJ58ZZkD43NX5ZXcg==)
---
|
In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states.
Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors.
Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down.
Our stunning win in PA shows that when Democrats fight with courage, resolve, and strength, we win.
[We need you in this fight to the bitter end. Trump and MAGA are not giving up--in fact, they're mad as hell for the brutal defeat we gave them in PA. Can you donate $25 or more today to help us beat MAGA again in Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016rvb8odNH9NMirYW75iXPgPJ03_5eW0o94NhqU_qa62ToB475KGTXL1jl1dRX8DAxDdsYRNwhrDsCN3C1AWEjZ6qjxy-nMCH-sfql3AeywrPDiFXw9C-SgqVvhLhMFbqzb8krjSE_sBmF6nEQXIkecDcwhbfMSDHijvgA249KYUII7WrrZuq79iSO-Xd_K1o8DtiTd7nD4jd8u3nXU0w2tCY-_4VZQ4vhCKJgrzIQ5UfXFOuXmf84g==&c=PHZu94dot0YE70HvG42dpQCvcCt9v1orKUuDiAWKtmB9U6kMSXvjzg==&ch=9g0CMeSp97jCW01gyzve-LUk8C7RFDNVX9iBUaJ58ZZkD43NX5ZXcg==)

---

clean_body: Our mission is critical to saving our democracy and preserving our freedoms from the fascist MAGA movement. | | | | | == | Peter, When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest. But at first, Democrats brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA. Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware. Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began. In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November. A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for. We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow. | | | | | == | In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states. Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors. Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down. Our stunning win in PA shows that when Democrats fight with courage, resolve, and strength, we win. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for being in this fight with us to the end. Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

subject: We’re welcoming 9/11 perpetrators, head choppers, & mass killers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
I refuse to let them Make America Saudi Arabia again.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2XlYD4Xyi3NFphCXJhd4-Wsfh3bKUF6WlVyjPMKzOblnRdOcNHK4Cu9Y1XQkXWELi0oLsDDLpKva90BcIhvOsGgDFb4WRVhCkfcEoRyvECzyIEz7JRzC0TguxjAPFnaqh3s2lXrdX6uHPuS4xgwSBwjhtdTkLUIR9TWNB4cZwWD6NIzlHXIOGQsIEuKUhTZ5V7Creb0D9qq-YO0RbN1aofRuGktVFL5&c=Mcw6kpfS7_SSscfE7bTuq33t_409GW8cAut2RGyCi12gdw3bbjGSTA==&ch=IplK8DqDiUWFqIoZ7GuqOT95WJG48wOqJlXthkS2EODUrV-TvJRXFQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Over the past few months Trump has welcomed just about every despotic totalitarian killer in the world for warm welcomes on American shores.
First it was far-right Israeli mass killer Netanyahu. Then it Russia's Putin. Last week it was *former* Al-Qaeda terrorist turned Syrian President Jolani (up until just a few months ago had a $10,000,000 State Dept. bounty on his head for personally beheading people, killing US soldiers, and waging a war against the US).
This week, President Trump gave a warm welcome to another blood soaked dictator, Saudi Arabian Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman (MBS) who was visiting the United States from Monday to Wednesday night.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2XlYD4Xyi3NFphCXJhd4-Wsfh3bKUF6WlVyjPMKzOblnRdOcNHK4Cu9Y1XQkXWELi0oLsDDLpKva90BcIhvOsGgDFb4WRVhCkfcEoRyvECzyIEz7JRzC0TguxjAPFnaqh3s2lXrdX6uHPuS4xgwSBwjhtdTkLUIR9TWNB4cZwWD6NIzlHXIOGQsIEuKUhTZ5V7Creb0D9p5sgLnnNT0vDmNtAzqM_MC&c=Mcw6kpfS7_SSscfE7bTuq33t_409GW8cAut2RGyCi12gdw3bbjGSTA==&ch=IplK8DqDiUWFqIoZ7GuqOT95WJG48wOqJlXthkS2EODUrV-TvJRXFQ==)
---
Bin Salman became an international pariah after he ordered the brutal execution, butchering, and dismemberment of American journalist Jamal Khashoggi.
MBS rules his country with an iron fist and allows for slave labor, horrible conditions for women, and a judicial system where people can be executed for one wrong word against the regime.
And last year, a federal judge ruled that Saudi Arabia must face litigation for the role they played in aiding the 9/11 hijackers and orchestrating the attacks, denying them immunity and allowing victims' families to proceed with seeking damages.
Unlike my opponent Lauren Boebert who refuses to condemn Saudi Arabia, has helped Trump obfuscate his business dealings there, and recently helped fellow Gulf State autocracy Qatar get an airbase on US soil, I am no friend to these dictators.
During the height of the Arab Spring I was a reporter for Yahoo! News and met dozens of Saudi human rights activists like now imprisoned human rights lawyer Waleed Abulkhair, Wajeha al Huwaider, "the most dangerous woman in Saudi," Samar Badawi, and Manal al-Sharif whom I helped with her autobiography, Daring to Drive, and thanked me in the credit section of the book.
I was so moved by their stories that I founded Honk for Saudi Women, an international pressure campaign where people the world over "honked" and made noise to call out Saudi Arabia. It went viral and we got thousands of people including Nancy Pelosi, Roseann Barr, and Amy Poehler to honk in defiance of Saudi misogynist autocrats.
I will never kowtow to dictators like Putin, Netanyahu, or MBS. I stand unflinchingly for human rights and dignity. [Boebert idolizes these dictators and hopes to emulate their rule in America unless we defeat her. Can you make a monthly donation to our campaign to stop her before she turns America into the far-right theocracy she envisions?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R2XlYD4Xyi3NFphCXJhd4-Wsfh3bKUF6WlVyjPMKzOblnRdOcNHK4Cu9Y1XQkXWELi0oLsDDLpKva90BcIhvOsGgDFb4WRVhCkfcEoRyvECzyIEz7JRzC0TguxjAPFnaqh3s2lXrdX6uHPuS4xgwSBwjhtdTkLUIR9TWNB4cZwWD6NIzlHXIOGQsIEuKUhTZ5V7Creb0D9rPKZOc2CUhaNEZvXkXusCm&c=Mcw6kpfS7_SSscfE7bTuq33t_409GW8cAut2RGyCi12gdw3bbjGSTA==&ch=IplK8DqDiUWFqIoZ7GuqOT95WJG48wOqJlXthkS2EODUrV-TvJRXFQ==)
---

clean_body: I refuse to let them Make America Saudi Arabia again. | | | | | == | Peter, Over the past few months Trump has welcomed just about every despotic totalitarian killer in the world for warm welcomes on American shores. First it was far-right Israeli mass killer Netanyahu. Then it Russia's Putin. Last week it was former Al-Qaeda terrorist turned Syrian President Jolani (up until just a few months ago had a $10,000,000 State Dept. bounty on his head for personally beheading people, killing US soldiers, and waging a war against the US). This week, President Trump gave a warm welcome to another blood soaked dictator, Saudi Arabian Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman (MBS) who was visiting the United States from Monday to Wednesday night. | == Bin Salman became an international pariah after he ordered the brutal execution, butchering, and dismemberment of American journalist Jamal Khashoggi. MBS rules his country with an iron fist and allows for slave labor, horrible conditions for women, and a judicial system where people can be executed for one wrong word against the regime. And last year, a federal judge ruled that Saudi Arabia must face litigation for the role they played in aiding the 9/11 hijackers and orchestrating the attacks, denying them immunity and allowing victims' families to proceed with seeking damages. Unlike my opponent Lauren Boebert who refuses to condemn Saudi Arabia, has helped Trump obfuscate his business dealings there, and recently helped fellow Gulf State autocracy Qatar get an airbase on US soil, I am no friend to these dictators. During the height of the Arab Spring I was a reporter for Yahoo! News and met dozens of Saudi human rights activists like now imprisoned human rights lawyer Waleed Abulkhair, Wajeha al Huwaider, "the most dangerous woman in Saudi," Samar Badawi, and Manal al-Sharif whom I helped with her autobiography, Daring to Drive, and thanked me in the credit section of the book. I was so moved by their stories that I founded Honk for Saudi Women, an international pressure campaign where people the world over "honked" and made noise to call out Saudi Arabia. It went viral and we got thousands of people including Nancy Pelosi, Roseann Barr, and Amy Poehler to honk in defiance of Saudi misogynist autocrats. I will never kowtow to dictators like Putin, Netanyahu, or MBS. I stand unflinchingly for human rights and dignity. == Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | I refuse to let Trump Make America Saudi Arabia again. Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: 11/21: The day that could decide my freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I’m fighting until the final hour!
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e17b9eb509964841a167676ab835daa8&_e=itVM8C2DV3JcjovK6K6f1SpaZH7nk2HYTyfc4B4mJ8YkegrYyJ5Ide5FfcPrL4c1jsaFSxOeTmugJ8HzsYYR2vknr3FJc7m8BPX56ydvkKDmjtU8-QALoJeK16G9PpKx77h05XY-7hD96TU7YLkwuG2oo0k0n4xvEuplHISAkmUGZ_l-Cv1SBwNr9IFapFzruujEF-5p1S89TgazKDwbP3PhUAsKEOF1II5jsE945PDsjGDcB1BqlUS5IfT65D4pl7Or3RkQXAl-NVzT41pjbKWGKa9mkYRfBA4GItWza9psn4Ys4fRMtrAaYgxM7tmqj5iwjBetg41paL5ihpg7KHyGRgFJRaigTxxI3UyYChpWUyOY-9kUr_m-Wz3f1V30BN2rIokm6ObCzc8MCA0t1QeZc-2D3K0sXFXwetTo1t6dcCs1HZWvluPO_RVFG8XlBF8D0W5r5arvQyATIeQ0x0Z7MVCnrRmuyLc-v0rlOAphQ0sI40IG_QUVqteA-HcJ7-nAH4RKx0oUY_odzo1gsqeHcCZ6EjEpxaFYNy93JaVvA5UmnUHig_LVODfkTUih2r01kFZ2yX3IJU7sgWr7a1XckRhUZgu3iBjYjiyOsgFDjycSQakIt1J1eF61nOhEu11QLvRwUuzuNY723Aid7g%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
The next few days may be the longest of my life. They will decide whether I live free or become a political prisoner.
---
Friday, November 21 is the **_DEADLINE_** for the Democrat Attorney General of Arizona to decide whether the _TRIAL OF MY LIFE_ proceeds or is thrown out once and for all.
---
It will truly be the _“trial of my life.”_ If I lose, I could be SENTENCED to 20 YEARS in prison as an innocent man.
---
And because this is a _state_ case, President Trump **_CANNOT_** save me with a _federal_ pardon.
---
But that didn’t stop the President from sending a POWERFUL and SYMBOLIC message to the Attorney General at the final hour.
---
**He granted me a pardon to show the Democrat Attorney General that the President of the United States and the Department of Justice recognize my innocence and stand beside me in the fight for my freedom.**
---
_Now, I am humbly asking _YOU_ to deliver a symbolic message at the final hour as well..._
---
_...I am asking you to sign _THE PEOPLE’S PARDON of Rudy W. Giuliani_ to show just how many U.S. Citizens believe that this RIGGED trial must be thrown to the ash heap of history._
---
_With the November 21 Deadline fast approaching, I’m asking**YOU** to echo the President’s call for my freedom!_

clean_body: I’m fighting until the final hour! | Peter, The next few days may be the longest of my life. They will decide whether I live free or become a political prisoner. Friday, November 21 is the DEADLINE for the Democrat Attorney General of Arizona to decide whether the TRIAL OF MY LIFE proceeds or is thrown out once and for all. It will truly be the “trial of my life.” If I lose, I could be SENTENCED to 20 YEARS in prison as an innocent man. And because this is a state case, President Trump CANNOT save me with a federal pardon. But that didn’t stop the President from sending a POWERFUL and SYMBOLIC message to the Attorney General at the final hour. He granted me a pardon to show the Democrat Attorney General that the President of the United States and the Department of Justice recognize my innocence and stand beside me in the fight for my freedom. Now, I am humbly asking YOU to deliver a symbolic message at the final hour as well... ...I am asking you to sign THE PEOPLE’S PARDON of Rudy W. Giuliani to show just how many U.S. Citizens believe that this RIGGED trial must be thrown to the ash heap of history. With the November 21 Deadline fast approaching, I’m askingYOU to echo the President’s call for my freedom! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Peter,

This week, Congress voted to call on the Justice Department to release the Epstein files. Trump, who has blatant ties to Epstein and appears to be guilty of the absolute worst claims leveled at him, initially stood in opposition to the files being released. However, after he realized he was losing control of his coalition, he reversed his stance.

As if women haven’t had a chilling enough week at the hands of Donald Trump and too many powerful men to count, an unsettling video has been circulating in which a _female_ _reporter_ tried to ask President Trump a follow-up question regarding the release of the Epstein files. He responds by pointing at her and shouting, **“Quiet! Quiet, piggy.”**

**Peter,[_when you watch this video, it’s hard not to see the violence in Trump’s eyes. This is, without a doubt, a chilling video._ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119630490/583737964/-1509058847?refcode=EM_F_251119QuietC_TH_7_NO_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlYTNkNTdjLTFmYzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZrQl3B_45t1IhKBNAx76jHrTbIuCcqJygQIFC1X-_gA=)** We refuse to accept or normalize this behavior – **and we are working tirelessly to block men like this from getting elected to the halls of power across the country.** Enough is enough.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119630491/583737965/-1509058847?refcode=EM_F_251119QuietC_TH_7_NO_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlYTNkNTdjLTFmYzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZrQl3B_45t1IhKBNAx76jHrTbIuCcqJygQIFC1X-_gA=)

We have seen the way men in power use that power to demean and harm women. From the way Trump spoke to that reporter, to the thousands of examples from the Epstein emails. **Here’s the good news:** We know the perfect way to combat the misogyny, the abuses of power, the boys’ clubs that exclude and objectify women, and, all too often, the real-world violence against women. WE ARE COMMITTED TO ELECTING **MORE WOMEN** TO THE HALLS OF POWER. To the rooms where decisions about our lives, our safety, and our bodies are being made.

**Unfortunately, we’ve spent the past week gaining intimate knowledge about how powerful men use that power against women. If we wouldn’t want to be left alone with these men in a room, why would we ever trust them to be the ones making laws about our bodies, our safety, and our wellbeing?

We need more women in government. Period. **

He’s completely lost his mind.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z0f6YjBe3tJmI8UoM8gyQ5wkLty9ESQeriCmC3XMNBVGDFw0aRCkH3SjPl5Ayed569CkeoxJmCfBW3IZyVxhh50dHiv8bm5GZdvB3cBbOG-aJqd_aVvyweqgdA1jx9vdB-Wk6ORvZg74X3ON7ZEUk2nVXieiAL-PnpzbFJRIPMWmFRBvtmn8969MDhsNuWoBzLEOi4Hlx4Wef4gvK-i_8q6XU-W5ERb4&c=6w691vxwara7XFCHzpM9VmFXS9LB5UquQpQgtW5G5KMdUWTlN5MPyw==&ch=HMb_P6jQ4VFoLJsYcGKX3gF9TJRkY7LrVvNAQ9hdVmCroL-3j1-vbQ==)
---
|
Peter,
Donald Trump just crossed a line he can't walk back--openly calling for elected Democrats to be executed for urging our soldiers to reject illegal orders he might try to give.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z0f6YjBe3tJmI8UoM8gyQ5wkLty9ESQeriCmC3XMNBVGDFw0aRCkH3SjPl5Ayed569CkeoxJmCfBW3IZyVxhh50dHiv8bm5GZdvB3cBbOG-aJqd_aVvyweqgdA1jx9vdB-Wk6ORvZg74X3ON7ZEUk2nVXieiAL-PnpzbFJRIPMWmFRBvtmn8969MDhsNuWoBzLEOi4Hlx4Wef4gvK-i_8igOi4Ib9ctP&c=6w691vxwara7XFCHzpM9VmFXS9LB5UquQpQgtW5G5KMdUWTlN5MPyw==&ch=HMb_P6jQ4VFoLJsYcGKX3gF9TJRkY7LrVvNAQ9hdVmCroL-3j1-vbQ==)
---
| This isn't new. Ever since he came down the escalator in 2015, Trump has unleashed violence, hate, and chaos in our politics. He has demanded that Democrats be arrested, silenced, and destroyed for standing up to him. And every time he does it, he pours gasoline onto the fire of political violence already sweeping this county.
And I've experienced it firsthand. Every day, my social media feed is flooded with violent and racist threats. I was tear gassed and hit with a car by Trump's personal gestapo, ICE, at a peaceful protest in Broadview. I've watched Black and brown families kidnapped off the street of my neighborhood with no due process.
This is Trump's America and he's only striving to make it more violent.
Trump is unraveling before our eyes--angry, erratic, possibly dementia-raddled, and cornered by a collapsing economy. Just look at his ties to pedophile and human trafficker Jeffrey Epstein. Look at the overwhelming blowback he's received from the violence ICE is unleashing on our communities. He's completely lost his mind.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z0f6YjBe3tJmI8UoM8gyQ5wkLty9ESQeriCmC3XMNBVGDFw0aRCkH3SjPl5Ayed569CkeoxJmCfBW3IZyVxhh50dHiv8bm5GZdvB3cBbOG-aJqd_aVvyweqgdA1jx9vdB-Wk6ORvZg74X3ON7ZEUk2nVXieiAL-PnpzbFJRIPMWmFRBvtmn8969MDhsNuWoBzLEOi4Hlx4Wef4gvK-i_8gnSw5sqe48O&c=6w691vxwara7XFCHzpM9VmFXS9LB5UquQpQgtW5G5KMdUWTlN5MPyw==&ch=HMb_P6jQ4VFoLJsYcGKX3gF9TJRkY7LrVvNAQ9hdVmCroL-3j1-vbQ==)
---
| Democrats cannot meet this moment with timidity. We need fighters willing to confront Trump's fascism head-on--before more blood is shed. That's the fight I'm taking to Congress as the next representative for IL-9. If you're with me, I need your support today:
[Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us stop Trump's violent movement and defend our Democracy?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z0f6YjBe3tJmI8UoM8gyQ5wkLty9ESQeriCmC3XMNBVGDFw0aRCkH3SjPl5Ayed5RDgrkZvLmLm_lGwDVA8FV2pYCNq4h6rkKJF11aTB5sCJkZJ1V0wcCwLBhi6JPoBJeRT8RRWlqV7_GUeAALf6Er0cp1YGUr3ZVq2q1TVq5noHqldRmuM2BwuOGesUCavpS6BW9ImoYms_MfAVB0A052s-nZ4liHDDTHGJaxhtdbj8u8ko3UpPWQ==&c=6w691vxwara7XFCHzpM9VmFXS9LB5UquQpQgtW5G5KMdUWTlN5MPyw==&ch=HMb_P6jQ4VFoLJsYcGKX3gF9TJRkY7LrVvNAQ9hdVmCroL-3j1-vbQ==)

name: Abby Finkenauer & Andrew Albertson
subject: Now is the time to stand up for diplomacy
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
Years of hard-won progress advancing U.S. diplomacy and principled foreign policy are being dismantled before our eyes. Seasoned diplomats are being driven out. Foreign assistance has been gutted. Human rights abuses are ignored or excused. National security takes a back seat to corporate interests. The message to the world is clear: America’s values are for sale.
These attacks are not random–they are part of a deliberate effort to replace values-based leadership with transactional, short-sighted deals that weaken America’s alliances and embolden authoritarian regimes. Every day this agenda advances, it becomes harder to rebuild the credibility and trust our country once commanded on the world stage.
We refuse to stand by and accept that.
We’re Andrew Albertson , Executive Director of Foreign Policy for America [https://www.fp4america.org/] (FP4A), and Abby Finkenauer , Former Member of Congress and Co-Founder and Principal of The Alliance for Diplomacy and Justice [https://www.thealliancefordiplomacyandjustice.org/index#home] . Together, our organizations are defending a values-based foreign policy–one that protects human rights, upholds the rule of law, and prioritizes diplomacy over destruction. We are fighting for a foreign policy rooted in human dignity, workers’ rights, the rule of law, and diplomacy over destruction.
But this work takes all of us. Your gift—whether it's $25, $100, $250, or more—powers the organizing, advocacy, and clear-eyed leadership this moment demands. If you’re new to this work, we invite you to get involved with either or both of our organizations. If you’ve stood with us before, we need you now more than ever.
Donate to FP4A & The Alliance [https://secure.everyaction.com/V7_Sg4fArk6_gqnzi78D7Q2]
We cannot be silent while America’s values are traded away. America can either show the world that we still stand for diplomacy, justice, and human dignity, or allow these principles to be hollowed out until they are meaningless. We know which side we’re on and hope you’ll stand with us.
In Solidarity,
Andrew Albertson , Executive Director, FP4A
Abby Finkenauer, Co-Founder & Principal, The Alliance for Diplomacy and Justice
Copyright © 2022 Foreign Policy for America, All rights reserved.
Foreign Policy for America
1301 K St NW Suite 300W
Washington D.C, DC 20005
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_FAh8jNKGEiCDp3pVIRPkw2?unsubscribedata=fap1FFcb5EgNQFgItCxErtfsYuIqip13HIQZTtW0LYJbW93fwCoA31dImgAsB9D%2Fc%2BAjOD%2FqCIl66bBt4%2FOxPg71a8%2FkzlOJ4p9%2BNmJLP2kM9Op%2BkcX9fzt9JTsNbS9scYaFQzuIkF%2Bgt6B0GM6ABb1ptx%2FuuuoY2Ii5JwHu%2F%2Bq%2FcQ6LfsbCemwV6yqrr%2BAbFhiyLjP7SPrxiwfW%2Bd3YCm7ZHiH5E80RMlqvAm8Lqb8ZXzDUKhahMQ%2FbDLZIsBOcvQev3wHMhi2RwnfmcOqi5a%2FXxvv9vxLYi1rpeAGDpOqdmoHxs2OcFV5vV65UNjjl2fDpHlzB8L3ydVMlcKcBSwo9ox6oFUn7R8gwi5Gz9gkIJm7V4%2FjrDRRu94JlP%2FuCrlKSw1FxKJBRGE2jdfJLybfgb9N2r692Vk%2BW24vW1x0%3D .

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: The future for NJ first responders
body:
Peter, there are some services we hope to never need. The fire department is one of them. But we rightly assume that if we ever do find ourselves in a fire, our firefighters will be well-trained, well-resourced.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, There are some services we hope to never need. The fire department is one of them. But we rightly assume that if we ever do find ourselves in a fire, our firefighters will be well-trained, well-resourced, and have the working tools they need to respond. So I was deeply concerned to read [a new report](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/46b8dc64b222292f54dabf3b530382cd/eJyNkMFuwjAMht_F59KQFLStN4QQqgocJjhPUevRQOtGqSEU1HcnbBOnTdrV_v7P-n0DRtLEWQkpXPiqVAIROCyMNUg8b4l18bVV04lMZAS1oePStScL6e3X8BN4jF8nL0kE3FsMyPZ9Ns-zzfJjlW3yQFrtwo3_ecby7elZrGfZCobhTzE2hhfn4O4gZXfCR6PShFa8c3XgK2bbpUJ472M6xEXbCELfCTVWUyGlsLXuDe1H3nA1-gzBuOKmDmJtLVL585Uc-2_9cAd8Jmow) out this week at [NJ.com](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/f13cb2dfac1b8f0277304cd71a088351/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vmF9XsREQGzUXUOkQfNKXjMD0jE_97Y4WrgrbvnnsedwBCWUjiFTC408N1PbBAYymUQElRK6koX6kb-I7nWFALeUl02ylgw9fyDEzntb8KLKBeoUH2uzBKeZ4cM56nhlSFNj_-8yydzeyJtyHPYBx_irERFN-M-wqMdIfTokqYVXTQteFPRIrZtjwvyrYxfKEUyuozNsX-3RqfsG9b9Q==) on the state of fire equipment in departments across New Jersey. The report detailed equipment being used long past the recommended time frame, equipment failures like a water pump that stopped working in the middle of fighting a Camden home fire, rising costs, possible market manipulation from rig manufacturing conglomerates, and supply chain problems that lead to years-long wait times when departments do order new rigs. The report rightly noted we pay the highest property taxes in the country. So why are our local governments unable to keep up with these essential costs? And how can we ensure they have the resources they need to keep us safe – without asking even more of taxpayers? That should be on the to-do list of an incoming Governor. But we are right to have little faith in Mikie Sherrill when it comes to backing our first responders. In the heat of 2020, she famously voted to gut qualified immunity for police officers (co-sponsored [the bill](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/6f1a4ca3b5beb4eee4cdf229488e785a/eJyNkEFPg0AQhf_LJpyEbnepYkmMwdo0SOVg7NkgTMpG3F13hyI2_HeXqpw08TKHb968eTNHgiALiWlFYvKOH5yHxCcGSqEFSFwpiUV56vLzBQuZTxohXzZGtZrEx1-HJ8GILxdR5BPsNTjJ40OyytJ887RN88wpdWHcjv_5zNly8lnfJ-mWDMOfxvAqcH1w3pbEaFoYL6qEuwp3pnH6GlHbmNKu62alknsD1s726kCfRdNQxi6wDn44rVVrITh1IsbntFRWK2mVsddvV15043E-ocBigeCIFyau5tCd3YGx0I8ounXRCq1BVt9_zaD_Cjh8Auf8gCM=), in fact!), putting them at risk of ruinous personal lawsuits for simply making their best judgment calls in heated, life-and-death situations. If she was willing to sell out law enforcement in a moment of political opportunity, can we trust she’ll have the backs of any of our first responders? Especially if she doesn’t view them as doing her any political favors? And let’s not forget Sherrill’s initial support for radical, Democratic Socialist Zohran Mamdani. Mamdani was a public proponent of defunding the police before trying to win a Mayoral race and called the NYPD “racist, anti-queer & a major threat to public safety.” These signs don’t bode well for a future of strong support for public safety and first responders. Let’s pray more New Jerseyans aren’t put at risk before these issues are solved. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---

Common Sense Club

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---

I know it’s hard to donate your hard-earned dollars. And I know how annoying it can be to get another fundraising email from some random politician.

**So let me be straight with you about the work I’m actually doing, and why your donation really does make a difference.**

I’m taking on corruption head-on—rolling out an End Corruption Now agenda and introducing the No Corporate Crooks Act to keep convicted corporate criminals out of government.

I’m pushing for safer, cleaner transportation as Vice Ranking Member on the House Rail Subcommittee—fighting for stronger rail safety rules, modern rail infrastructure, and investments that rebuild communities all across America.

I’ve stood up to attempts to gut Medicaid, Social Security, and veterans’ care—calling out cuts that would hurt kids, seniors, and families in Western PA. And I’m fighting to stop corporate middlemen from squeezing our local pharmacies.

I’m doing this work because people here expect more than talk—they expect a fighter.
[**So if you believe in this work—and you don’t want Republicans to take control here in Western PA—then I’m humbly asking you to invest just $1 in my campaign. clean_body: Derek my name is Chris Deluzio. I’m a voting rights lawyer, Iraq War veteran, dad of four, and I represent Pennsylvania’s 17th District in Congress. My district is the only battleground seat in Pennsylvania held by a Democrat. It’s one of the most competitive districts in the country — and it has been for years. = | | = I know it’s hard to donate your hard-earned dollars. And I know how annoying it can be to get another fundraising email from some random politician. So let me be straight with you about the work I’m actually doing, and why your donation really does make a difference. I’m taking on corruption head-on—rolling out an End Corruption Now agenda and introducing the No Corporate Crooks Act to keep convicted corporate criminals out of government. I’m pushing for safer, cleaner transportation as Vice Ranking Member on the House Rail Subcommittee—fighting for stronger rail safety rules, modern rail infrastructure, and investments that rebuild communities all across America. I’ve stood up to attempts to gut Medicaid, Social Security, and veterans’ care—calling out cuts that would hurt kids, seniors, and families in Western PA. And I’m fighting to stop corporate middlemen from squeezing our local pharmacies. subject: Texas’ gerrymander is paused but we’re ready to retaliate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Our mission is critical to saving our democracy and preserving our freedoms from the fascist MAGA movement.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_9fc2kjQ8uDYXr1T6pFI2ZV4i5EEEiOCbkz0HMbGFXm3Ditbnsk7DBLR0p2C0sPDYjm0toda2WOVoSB5-2UTLAA7TdUfiM7rqO4cKPYXVqure0r78QBEmEPkv51O51-Kt9HLqDOV5MHAW51Qaqb0xawJ8yMtJisZxVAqNwijtIwTyMs-zvoaAxv8GmvuLq3x-eV891s7Y-8fz0hLW_TqF4DZExkPFhsaCK6NWGRQMkE=&c=Oh7qUhEEYvX1JcPYnA8h_eRpwRsvpROtHo3ahpdXqwW3RIXIhJ3gxw==&ch=bgFWPxF3V1PqktHvztkE9yyfZ6uHEp7WmbzGHqSIVZQP_Ow-nUR9Yg==)
---
| Peter,
When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest.
But at first, Democrats brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA.
Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware.
Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began.
In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November.
A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for.
We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow.
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_9fc2kjQ8uDYXr1T6pFI2ZV4i5EEEiOCbkz0HMbGFXm3Ditbnsk7DBLR0p2C0sPDYjm0toda2WOVoSB5-2UTLAA7TdUfiM7rqO4cKPYXVqure0r78QBEmEPkv51O51-Kt9HLqDOV5MHAW51Qaqb0xawJ8yMtJisZxVAqNwijtIwTyMs-zvoaAxv8GmvuLq3x-eV891s7Y-8fz0hLW_TqF9sFWwbZyi9BtYC8gcrZmhg=&c=Oh7qUhEEYvX1JcPYnA8h_eRpwRsvpROtHo3ahpdXqwW3RIXIhJ3gxw==&ch=bgFWPxF3V1PqktHvztkE9yyfZ6uHEp7WmbzGHqSIVZQP_Ow-nUR9Yg==)
---
|
In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states.
Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors.
Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down.
Our stunning win in PA shows that when Democrats fight with courage, resolve, and strength, we win.
[We need you in this fight to the bitter end. Trump and MAGA are not giving up--in fact, they're mad as hell for the brutal defeat we gave them in PA. Can you donate $25 or more today to help us beat MAGA again in Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_9fc2kjQ8uDYXr1T6pFI2ZV4i5EEEiOCbkz0HMbGFXm3Ditbnsk7DBLR0p2C0sPDLtemK0skwFrEjOBmEhQnofFsjcSUbk7QXCva_YemS0OYuGoDXIJQRuVmIje29xBgxJ22rpiOdTbBGF3yQ5SK8_yhY1s6OvCgu9I2cYxTPr85aUqsKqis4N67tBqiJYBLV6WsBQcmXZSLcR-7v0jy-B1fkw9arRPLxanqUOhzuC-NDWLUwxMIZQ==&c=Oh7qUhEEYvX1JcPYnA8h_eRpwRsvpROtHo3ahpdXqwW3RIXIhJ3gxw==&ch=bgFWPxF3V1PqktHvztkE9yyfZ6uHEp7WmbzGHqSIVZQP_Ow-nUR9Yg==)

clean_body: Our mission is critical to saving our democracy and preserving our freedoms from the fascist MAGA movement. | | | | | == | Peter, When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest. But at first, Democrats brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA. Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware. Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began. In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November. A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for. We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow. | | | | | == | In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states. Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors. Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The scandal they fear most | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. **Picture waking up tomorrow and discovering you can’t touch your own money.**

America’s financial system is about to change—the digital dollar could arrive faster than anyone expects.

Your retirement, paycheck, and even daily purchases could be interrupted at any moment.

New rules may leave millions unable to access savings, pay bills, or buy necessities.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We knew that when Donald Trump was elected, there would be challenges ahead.
#

Dear Friends,
I am reaching out to you today to respectfully ask if you can make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
We knew that when Donald Trump was elected last November, there would be challenges ahead. Now we are seeing firsthand that Donald Trump and the MAGA-right are wasting no time in trying to reverse our hard-earned gun safety progress.
Some of the most extreme members of Congress have introduced bills pushing for the abolishment of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives. **And any day now, we’re hearing reports that the House GOP is preparing to pass legislation for a nationwide concealed carry mandate.**
The challenges we’re up against won’t be easy. But I know a thing or two about getting through tough times.
I was shot in 2011, and I have been on a recovery journey every day since. Some days are harder than others, but even on the most difficult days, I refuse to give up hope. It’s the same way I refuse to give up hope for our gun violence prevention movement, even in these moments of uncertainty.
This is a make-or-break moment for gun safety. I will be fighting each and every day for a future free from gun violence, just as I have since GIFFORDS’s founding nearly 13 years ago. _Can I count on you to stand by me in this fight?_
[**If so, I’m hoping you will use this link or the buttons below to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your donation will help us stop Republicans from passing this nationwide concealed carry mandate—and power our fights ahead.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251120-1A-b&t=1&akid=11051%2E3935704%2EpVH0ge)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251120-1A-b&t=21&akid=11051%2E3935704%2EpVH0ge)**
---
