| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251120-1A-b&t=22&akid=11051%2E3935704%2EpVH0ge)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251120-1A-b&t=23&akid=11051%2E3935704%2EpVH0ge)**

Thank you for all that you do for the gun violence prevention movement—today and every day.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

I only reach out when it’s important, so believe me when I tell you: this is as important as it gets.
[Hakeem Jeffries filed a lawsuit to block Trump’s attempt to undermine our elections – _and he needs your grassroots support to help us win._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119636423/583753408/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_jeffries_sur_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzMjY2OC0yM2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3eUZd7gruiesDh9bCKjd7Ta1twJEGh0i9MX5j7q0hU=)

Can I count on you to kick in $15? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119636424/583753409/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_jeffries_sur_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzMjY2OC0yM2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3eUZd7gruiesDh9bCKjd7Ta1twJEGh0i9MX5j7q0hU=)

Donald Trump signed an executive order that attempts to suppress our votes, hand sensitive information to DOGE and stop states from counting mail-in ballots.
We cannot let him get away with it.

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=179458061&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NDU4MDYxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzY1Mzg3MiwiZXhwIjoxNzY2MjQ1ODcyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Rgv_HDPMPsXzqQdbsVn3cW6qTbh0dO-b-Ce6anJwpck&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/trump-signs-bill-to-release-epstein?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Donald Trump announced Wednesday evening **[he signed the Epstein Files Transparency Act,](https://substack.com/redirect/b00d33c3-db6a-4f2c-bf6f-6e3d28cc661d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** directing the Justice Department to release all unclassified records and investigative materials related to Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell within 30 days in a searchable online format, after the bill passed the House 421-1 and the Senate by unanimous consent on Tuesday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b00d33c3-db6a-4f2c-bf6f-6e3d28cc661d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bill requires broad disclosure with some exceptions:** The legislation mandates release of files related to individuals referenced in Epstein's legal cases, trafficking allegations, internal DOJ communications, and details surrounding his 2019 death, though files containing victims' names, child sex abuse materials, classified materials, or information threatening active investigations may be withheld or redacted by the DOJ.
* **Democrats released emails mentioning Trump, sparking GOP counter-release:** The push gained momentum after House Democrats released three emails from Epstein's estate mentioning Trump, including one where Epstein told Ghislaine Maxwell that Trump "has never once been mentioned" despite a victim spending "hours at my house with him," prompting Republicans to release their own 20,000 pages of Epstein documents, though Trump has not faced formal accusations of misconduct tied to Epstein and no law enforcement records connect him to Epstein's crimes.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b00d33c3-db6a-4f2c-bf6f-6e3d28cc661d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| | POLL
---
Are you happy that the files will be released?
| [Yes](https://substack..0ItoARk5_cPrdrkCalJQtRa5-tG_rq74vyRJppAcrP4?)
---
[No](https://substack..XmLvC3k1jN15BV1YckMhHxPKdVFWrZcx72v_x7867Eo?)
[Not sure, depends what we find...](https://substack..FjSIlKFiQWSggrHeUMY5LO2havAGHM6zZ95WBbmRftA?)
* * *
# **Jasmine Crockett defends Epstein donation claims with bizarre excuse**
Rep. Jasmine Crockett (D-Texas) told CNN's Kaitlan Collins she **["never said that it was that Jeffrey Epstein"](https://substack.com/redirect/9276c6dd-1879-4021-8e0f-b572c95a789c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when defending her Tuesday House floor remarks accusing Lee Zeldin and other Republicans of taking donations from the late convicted pedophile, claiming her team only had "maybe 20 minutes" to Google FEC records before the debate.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1ea9b0a9-6579-4842-9cf9-520c51a2c4d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Zeldin quickly debunked smear with FEC records:** EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin fired back on X pointing out that FEC filings clearly showed two different men named Jeffrey Epstein donated to his campaigns--Dr. Jeffrey Epstein of Manhasset ($1,000 in April and August 2020) and Jeffrey Epstein, a beverage distribution company owner from New Jersey ($600 in February 2020)--all months after the disgraced financier hanged himself in prison in August 2019.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc736471-010d-4650-a82e-9a158297d583?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Original accusations made to defend Plaskett:** Crockett made the jaw-dropping remarks Tuesday night while defending Delegate Stacey Plaskett (D-USVI), who faced censure after text messages revealed the convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein coached her through questioning of Michael Cohen during a February 2019 House Oversight Committee hearing, with Crockett listing Republicans who supposedly took money "from somebody named Jeffrey Epstein."
* **Widespread criticism of Crockett 's defense:** Critics including CNN pundit Scott Jennings called Crockett "literally the perfect modern Democrat," while Washington Free Beacon reporter Chuck Ross noted "it took me 2 minutes to figure it out," former CNN commentator Chris Cillizza asked "Why can no one say 'I was wrong and I am sorry' anymore?", and Rep. Mike Lawler (R-NY) called the exchange "an embarrassment to this institution on every level."

* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/1254d310-60d9-45ff-a756-bd075acabfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# RFK Jr's 2025 confession EXPOSED
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1254d310-60d9-45ff-a756-bd075acabfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,

Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back.
What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence.
**[An emerging health threat](https://substack.com/redirect/1254d310-60d9-45ff-a756-bd075acabfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk.
Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist...
Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA...
All of which now appear to be _**100% TRUE**_.
Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2025 warning _**NOW**_.
You can **[get full details here now](https://substack.com/redirect/1254d310-60d9-45ff-a756-bd075acabfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/1254d310-60d9-45ff-a756-bd075acabfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. **[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/1254d310-60d9-45ff-a756-bd075acabfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
* * *
# **Trump to meet with NYC mayor-elect Mamdani at White House**
President Trump announced Wednesday he will[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/27533585-732b-4da7-aed7-83eff7edf6ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[meet with New York City Mayor](https://substack.com/redirect/27533585-732b-4da7-aed7-83eff7edf6ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -elect Zohran Mamdani at the Oval Office on Friday, confirming a sit-down between the two leaders who have repeatedly clashed throughout the campaign season.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3170b323-57cf-4bd0-a918-06a9c5a0c704?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Routine transition meeting amid heated rhetoric.** The Friday meeting follows standard protocol for incoming New York mayors meeting with sitting presidents, though this one comes after months of sharp exchanges. Trump has dubbed Mamdani a "little communist" and warned of New York's decline under his leadership, while the mayor-elect called Trump a "despot" in his victory speech and vowed to dismantle conditions that allowed him to gain power.
* **Public safety and affordability on the agenda.** Mamdani's team says the socialist plans to discuss public safety, economic security and affordability issues that resonated with over one million New Yorkers who voted for him two weeks ago. The mayor-elect, who will be sworn in January 1, reached out to the White House to fulfill his campaign commitment.
* **Federal funding and oversight hang in balance.** The meeting takes on added significance as Trump has previously threatened to pull federal funding from New York City and floated the possibility of a federal takeover. The 34-year-old Mamdani will need to navigate this relationship as he prepares to lead the nation's largest city while Trump controls federal resources that could impact New York.

* * *
# **House passes bill against terrorist use of AI**
The House unanimously approved legislation Wednesday requiring the federal government to assess and counter the growing threat of **[terrorist groups weaponizing artificial intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/6ec36b92-c814-4b98-9e88-51eb64260bc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to develop advanced weapons and spread propaganda.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ec36b92-c814-4b98-9e88-51eb64260bc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bipartisan response to emerging terror threat.** Rep. August Pfluger's Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act passed with full support from lawmakers concerned about ISIS and other terrorist organizations exploiting AI technology to enhance recruitment efforts and acquire supplies for attacks. The Texas Republican, who chairs the House Homeland Security subcommittee on counterterrorism, warned that as AI advances, so does the risk of sophisticated terrorist operations on American soil.
* **Annual threat assessments mandated.** The legislation directs the Department of Homeland Security to conduct yearly evaluations in coordination with the Director of National Intelligence on how terrorist groups utilize AI for extremist messaging, recruitment and development of chemical, biological, radiological or nuclear weapons. DHS will also be tasked with creating strategies to counter these emerging threats in the digital battlefield.
* **ISIS already deploying AI for propaganda.** Terrorist organizations have demonstrated their capability with the technology, including ISIS using AI-generated news anchors last year to broadcast propaganda about an attack on a Moscow concert hall. Intelligence officials revealed during congressional hearings that groups like ISIS and al-Qaeda are holding workshops to train followers on AI applications and creating deepfake content to fabricate events and recruit new members through increasingly convincing propaganda campaigns.

* * *
# **Stefanik blasts Hochul after illegal immigrant trucker kills Indiana guardsman**
Rep. Elise Stefanik is slamming New York Gov. Kathy Hochul's immigration policies after an illegal immigrant truck driver with a New York commercial license was involved in a[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/a1fdcf9f-e5cf-4477-816b-8bb9fa2eab00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[fatal crash](https://substack.com/redirect/a1fdcf9f-e5cf-4477-816b-8bb9fa2eab00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Indiana that killed a National Guardsman.
* **Brooklyn trucker in ICE custody after deadly crash:** Goderdzi Gujabidze, 56, was taken into Immigration and Customs Enforcement custody following the November 14 multi-vehicle collision on Interstate 65 that killed 23-year-old Indiana National Guard Specialist Terry Frye. The Georgian national was driving a car hauler truck and required a translator due to a language barrier when questioned by authorities.
* **Driver obtained New York commercial license after illegal border crossing:** Gujabidze crossed the southern border through San Luis, Arizona in 2022 and later obtained a non-domiciled commercial driver's license in New York in December 2023, according to the Department of Homeland Security. The license remains valid until March 2027, raising questions about how an illegal immigrant secured authorization to operate commercial vehicles on American highways.
* **Stefanik targets Hochul 's Green Light Law in governor race: **The upstate congresswoman, who launched her gubernatorial campaign earlier this month, accused Hochul of implementing dangerous sanctuary policies that endanger families beyond New York's borders.

* * *
# **Trump, Vance not invited to Dick Cheney funeral**
President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance were **[not invited](https://substack.com/redirect/be6122d6-771e-48de-875a-d0d629fc43d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to former Vice President Dick Cheney's funeral Thursday at the National Cathedral in Washington, breaking with tradition for sitting presidents to attend services for past vice presidents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/be6122d6-771e-48de-875a-d0d629fc43d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cheney family feud drives snub:** Trump has maintained a poor relationship with the Cheney family in recent years, stemming from daughter Liz Cheney's leadership of the House investigation into the January 6, 2021 Capitol incident, and endorsement of Kamala Harris during the 2024 presidential campaign.
* **Cheney dies at 84 from pneumonia complications:** The 46th vice president passed away November 3 due to complications from pneumonia and cardiac and vascular disease, surrounded by his wife Lynne of 61 years and daughters Liz and Mary.
* **Legacy as powerful VP and war on terror architect:** Cheney served two terms as vice president under President George W. Bush and was considered one of the most powerful figures ever to hold that position. His decades-long public career included roles as White House chief of staff, Wyoming congressman, and Defense secretary, with his most controversial legacy being his driving force behind America's war on terror and the conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan.

* * *

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: BREAKING: We’re endorsing Darializa Avila Chevalier in NY-13
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Breaking news, Peter:

Today, Justice Democrats is making our fifth 2026 Democratic primary
endorsement: Darializa Avila Chevalier in New York’s 13th district!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251120-1-dac.rXqtp8&refcode=em20251120-37209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37209%2E1203867%2E4AgWum ]Justice Democrats 2026 Endorsed Darializa Avila Chevalier for U.S.
Congress (NY-13)

This is our first endorsement in New York City since Zohran was elected
mayor, and we’re so excited to take his momentum to Washington.

Darializa is a working-class, Afro-Latina, and UAW member who has been
organizing in upper Manhattan for a fairer, more equitable, and more
affordable New York City since she was a teenager.

She’s taking on corporate- and AIPAC-backed incumbent, Rep. Adriano
Espaillat, who endorsed Andrew Cuomo over Zohran Mamdani in the city’s
mayoral race. Next year, it’s time for Espaillat to join Cuomo in
retirement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251120-1-dac.rXqtp8&refcode=em20251120-37209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37209%2E1203867%2E4AgWum ]Rush a contribution of any amount directly to Darializa’s campaign now
→

Raised by working-class, Dominican immigrant parents, Darializa witnessed
loved ones struggle with immigration issues, socioeconomic inequality, and
structural racism. These lived experiences shaped her worldview and
deepened her commitment to organizing for a better future.

As an undergraduate at Columbia University, Darializa participated in a
summer abroad program in Nablus, in the West Bank of Palestine, where she
learned Arabic and taught English to Palestinian children living in
refugee camps nearby.

After returning to campus in New York, she began organizing for a free
Palestine, and as an alumna, was a lead organizer of the encampment on
Columbia’s campus in 2023-2024. In the encampment, Darializa and her
fellow organizers stood in solidarity with Palestinians and urged Columbia
to divest its endowment from companies profiting from Israel’s genocide
and apartheid system.

Darializa also organized to help free U.S. permanent resident Abdikadir
Mohamed from his 1.5 year ICE detention caused by Trump’s 2017 ‘Muslim
ban,’ fought against family separation as an organizer at Families for
Freedom, and then became an investigator for the public defender’s office
in Harlem.

Darializa’s leadership is rooted in community organizing and the belief in
equity and justice for her community in upper Manhattan and the West
Bronx. She knows they deserve better — and she won’t stop organizing until
that promise becomes reality.

Adriano Espaillat, on the other hand, is the epitome of an out-of-touch
member of the Democratic old guard and NYC political machine who needs to
be replaced in Congress:

* He’s served in elected office since 1997 and will show up for press
conferences and photo-ops, but is completely absent when his diverse
working-class community needs a champion in Washington to fight for
them, or to stand up for their rights as ICE kidnaps New Yorkers from
their cars and homes.

* His largest donor last year was AIPAC, and he has consistently enabled
Israel’s atrocities in Congress, voting to send the IDF billions of
dollars for Israel to commit its genocide in Gaza.

* His second largest source of donations comes from the real estate
industry. In a district where 88% of residents do not own a home,
Espaillat is in the pocket of developers who are actively raising
rents and pushing working-class people out of the city.

NY-13 is one of the youngest congressional districts in the country, and
voted for Zohran by nearly 20 points in this month’s general election!
It’s clear: voters in upper Manhattan are seeking a new generation of
progressive leadership, and we can deliver that with Darializa.

If we take the momentum from Zohran’s game-changing victory and direct it
into this race, we can unseat an AIPAC stooge and replace him with a
working-class, pro-Palestinian organizer and fighter for justice.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251120-1-dac.rXqtp8&refcode=em20251120-37209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37209%2E1203867%2E4AgWum ]But we can’t do it without you,
Peter, so please: pitch in $5 or
whatever you can to become a founding donor of Darializa’s grassroots
campaign on Day 1!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251120-1-dac.rXqtp8&refcode=em20251120-37209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37209%2E1203867%2E4AgWum ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251120-37209-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37209_1203867_4AgWum&akid=37209%2E1203867%2E4AgWum

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37209%2E1203867%2E4AgWum

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

subject: This Data Shows Why Dems Shouldn't Run from Climate

Corporatists are pushing Dems to abandon the climate fight. That's a huge political mistake.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..Nmab570i4SaqXvkJ9SPzAQTy-Jtfa8K9B20mbjGm72U?) for more
---
# [This Data Shows Why Dems Shouldn't Run from Climate](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=179460652&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NDYwNjUyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM2NTQxMzAsImV4cCI6MTc2NjI0NjEzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.py0UCL5f52BpDRGDLOik7MqMTjtzhpmf9OObq9E6bck)
### Corporatists are pushing Dems to abandon the climate fight. That's a huge political mistake.
| | [Aaron Regunberg](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---
| Nov 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=179460652&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NDYwNjUyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzY1NDEzMCwiZXhwIjoxNzY2MjQ2MTMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDk4MTE3MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KzJQfDb7Rs1omPAmR6wloU0Ud79c1QhiDzuh2frgXoA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=179460652&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NDYwNjUyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM2NTQxMzAsImV4cCI6MTc2NjI0NjEzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.py0UCL5f52BpDRGDLOik7MqMTjtzhpmf9OObq9E6bck&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=179460652&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NDYwNjUyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM2NTQxMzAsImV4cCI6MTc2NjI0NjEzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.py0UCL5f52BpDRGDLOik7MqMTjtzhpmf9OObq9E6bck)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYWFyb25yZWd1bmJlcmcvcC90aGlzLWRhdGEtc2hvd3Mtd2h5LWRlbXMtc2hvdWxkbnQ_.cxSx4Prt3IUSZPd3PBkYQ5aRNLzpMwkoDzv4zzpZPqc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/aaronregunberg/p/this-data-shows-why-dems-shouldnt?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Over the last several months, reports from billionaire-funded centrist advocacy groups, like [WelcomePAC](https://substack.com/redirect/b1f9c615-cf35-44c5-aaca-4e1f160bd8d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Searchlight Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/2724a364-82ce-4318-a36b-8fa437d5a2c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), have insisted that Democrats stop talking about climate change--either in their campaigns or while governing. Climate change has little resonance for voters, they claim, [comparing](https://substack.com/redirect/53b24600-d838-416d-8ac8-3f4d2e549355?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the polling on reliably unpopular policies like "create a carbon tax" with reliably popular policies like "lower the gas tax."
Unfortunately, this message appears to be reaching its intended audience. In just the last week, New York Governor [Kathy Hochul](https://substack.com/redirect/0f47961f-da3e-417e-9985-60d1ee64ae97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) approved a new gas pipeline that President Donald Trump has been championing, while Pennsylvania Governor [Josh Shapiro](https://substack.com/redirect/bb2265b1-939b-4b70-8bf0-84908f4ed219?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) dropped his state's effort to join the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative.
The idea that Democrats should abandon the most existential fight human civilization has ever faced is a particularly bizarre lesson to draw following Democrats' huge wins this November, when many of the party's victorious candidates explicitly [championed](https://substack.com/redirect/7c7d3dee-35ff-4a13-8fbd-ffc5280427a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) clean energy investments and accountability for fossil fuel company profiteering as solutions to rising energy costs.
A [memo](https://substack.com/redirect/9e65322a-0dc0-44ae-a671-66491062b22c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) published Wednesday by Data for Progress and Fossil Free Media therefore makes the exact opposite argument: Democrats shouldn't run from climate. Instead, they should translate both the impact of climate change and the benefits of climate action for voters. The new memo (which, disclosure, I participated in drafting) points to evidence showing that, contrary to WelcomePAC's and Searchlight's portrayal of climate change as a niche social issue, climate-related costs already are top-of-mind, pocketbook concerns for most Americans.
To receive posts on more top-of-mind concerns, subscribe here!
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3OTQ2MDY1MiwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzY1NDEzMCwiZXhwIjoyMDc5MjMwMTMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.Te6jgTLm_fh-FPdq5IsIFN28rn5QbNr3sV1E_MBvDqA?)
A [majority of voters](https://substack.com/redirect/2c918989-7827-4c66-97a9-e58fea648972?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) say they believe climate change will have a direct financial impact on their families. Millions of voters are already feeling the pain of skyrocketing home insurance rates, which are driven by the increased risk of severe weather from climate change. Millions more are confronted each year with the staggering costs of disaster recovery from extreme weather events exacerbated by the climate crisis. And a [strong majority](https://substack.com/redirect/83c3661d-1417-4816-8317-aa654d876369?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Americans are struggling with rising electricity prices, a problem that just 5 percent of voters blame on renewables, versus corporate profits (38 percent), data centers (14 percent) and grid pressures from extreme weather (11 percent). On the flip side, expanding clean energy is the fastest way to produce cheap electricity needed to lower utility rates--and Democrats hold a massive trust advantage over Republicans when it comes to clean power.
This trust gap is a key part of the argument that Data for Progress and Fossil Free Media are making. Their memo points to findings that, right now, neither party has a significant trust advantage on "electric utility bills" (D+1) or "the cost of living" (R+1). But Democrats do have major trust advantages on "climate change" (D+14) and "renewable energy development" (D+6). By articulating how their climate and clean energy agenda can address these bread-and-butter concerns, Democrats can leverage their advantage on climate to win voters' trust on what will likely be the most significant issues in 2026 and 2028.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45d90b0a-9943-489a-8400-f027b77c5dfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The formula for doing this is pretty simple: First, explain why bills are rising and who's to blame (utilities, fossil fuel volatility, data center demand, climate disasters); second, commit to implementing visible cost relief (rate freezes, clean energy buildout); and third, name who will pay (polluters and profiteers, not regular people). Or, to simplify all this into one clear campaign-ready sentence: "_We 'll take on rising electricity bills by building the cheapest power and stopping monopoly price-gouging, all while making polluters, not families, pay their fair share."_
The best part about this populist approach to climate is how obviously it contrasts with Trump and the Republicans. Imagine being able to tout this contrast in every stump speech in 2026: Democrats are trying to expand cheap, clean energy to secure lower rates, while Trump is trying to keep [outdated coal plants](https://substack.com/redirect/5852bc4a-a906-4699-95bc-bca22eac4893?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) running, forcing ratepayers to shoulder billions in extra costs. Democrats are getting tough on price-gouging utilities, while Republicans are giving these corporations free rein. Democrats are fighting to make polluters pay for increasingly costly climate disasters; Republicans want all of us to pay for the damage Big Oil caused.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b29641a-262c-44a8-b690-27e8ae93f93f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Abandoning the climate fight would be a profoundly morally reprehensible course of action. (It's a particularly unforgivable message when it comes from billionaires like Reid Hoffman who are [funding](https://substack.com/redirect/2d4cad16-8fef-4690-9525-d1446c30527a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the groups telling Democrats to forget about climate while building their own luxury bunkers for "[apocalypse insurance](https://substack.com/redirect/60873aae-ec28-4380-bac7-04bb0253b555?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).") It's also a huge political mistake. To give up on climate, an issue that Democrats are trusted on, is to throw away a tool that Democrats can use to offer credible solutions to the cost-of-living crises affecting working people throughout the country.
"Heading into 2026," the memo reads, "Democrats have a chance to define themselves as the party that will build the cheapest energy, crack down on profiteering, and make polluters, not families, pay for the climate damage they've caused." That is, substantively, a great climate agenda. It's also a winning electoral message, and one Democrats should be running on, not from.
* * *
This essay appeared in _[The New Republic](https://substack.com/redirect/de15685f-c48c-4006-af6d-71f4e861ea9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. They're great, check them out!
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3OTQ2MDY1MiwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzY1NDEzMCwiZXhwIjoyMDc5MjMwMTMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.Te6jgTLm_fh-FPdq5IsIFN28rn5QbNr3sV1E_MBvDqA?)

A published Wednesday by Data for Progress and Fossil Free Media therefore makes the exact opposite argument: Democrats shouldn't run from climate. Instead, they should translate both the impact of climate change and the benefits of climate action for voters. The new memo (which, disclosure, I participated in drafting) points to evidence showing that, contrary to WelcomePAC's and Searchlight's portrayal of climate change as a niche social issue, climate-related costs already are top-of-mind, pocketbook concerns for most Americans. To receive posts on more top-of-mind concerns, subscribe here! ? A say they believe climate change will have a direct financial impact on their families. Millions of voters are already feeling the pain of skyrocketing home insurance rates, which are driven by the increased risk of severe weather from climate change. Millions more are confronted each year with the staggering costs of disaster recovery from extreme weather events exacerbated by the climate crisis. And a of Americans are struggling with rising electricity prices, a problem that just 5 percent of voters blame on renewables, versus corporate profits (38 percent), data centers (14 percent) and grid pressures from extreme weather (11 percent). On the flip side, expanding clean energy is the fastest way to produce cheap electricity needed to lower utility rates--and Democrats hold a massive trust advantage over Republicans when it comes to clean power. This trust gap is a key part of the argument that Data for Progress and Fossil Free Media are making. Their memo points to findings that, right now, neither party has a significant trust advantage on "electric utility bills" (D+1) or "the cost of living" (R+1). But Democrats do have major trust advantages on "climate change" (D+14) and "renewable energy development" (D+6). By articulating how their climate and clean energy agenda can address these bread-and-butter concerns, Democrats can leverage their advantage on climate to win voters' trust on what will likely be the most significant issues in 2026 and 2028. | | ---|---|--- The formula for doing this is pretty simple: First, explain why bills are rising and who's to blame (utilities, fossil fuel volatility, data center demand, climate disasters); second, commit to implementing visible cost relief (rate freezes, clean energy buildout); and third, name who will pay (polluters and profiteers, not regular people). Or, to simplify all this into one clear campaign-ready sentence: "We 'll take on rising electricity bills by building the cheapest power and stopping monopoly price-gouging, all while making polluters, not families, pay their fair share." The best part about this populist approach to climate is how obviously it contrasts with Trump and the Republicans. Imagine being able to tout this contrast in every stump speech in 2026: Democrats are trying to expand cheap, clean energy to secure lower rates, while Trump is trying to keep running, forcing ratepayers to shoulder billions in extra costs. Democrats are getting tough on price-gouging utilities, while Republicans are giving these corporations free rein. Democrats are fighting to make polluters pay for increasingly costly climate disasters; Republicans want all of us to pay for the damage Big Oil caused. | | ---|---|--- Abandoning the climate fight would be a profoundly morally reprehensible course of action. (It's a particularly unforgivable message when it comes from billionaires like Reid Hoffman who are the groups telling Democrats to forget about climate while building their own luxury bunkers for ".") It's also a huge political mistake. To give up on climate, an issue that Democrats are trusted on, is to throw away a tool that Democrats can use to offer credible solutions to the cost-of-living crises affecting working people throughout the country. "Heading into 2026," the memo reads, "Democrats have a chance to define themselves as the party that will build the cheapest energy, crack down on profiteering, and make polluters, not families, pay for the climate damage they've caused." That is, substantively, a great climate agenda. It's also a winning electoral message, and one Democrats should be running on, not from. * This essay appeared in . They're great, check them out! ? | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Aaron Regunberg ? ?

In my life, I've been a combat pilot and an astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, a grandfather, and a senator. And now, I'm honored to be one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, working to win back a Democratic Senate majority.

**Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed — _especially_ when faced with a difficult situation.**

**[So I'll be blunt with you:_Your country_ needs your help right now to flip the Senate blue >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251120-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251120-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21801%2E9716520%2E3D_kyi)**

Falling short of that mission is _not an option_ if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaotic and illegal acts. **But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority:**

1. National Republicans just spent over $500 million to take back the Senate, and now they're saying they'll spend at _least_ that much on just TWO of their top target races.

2. Trump now controls _all_ the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate people into silence — making our job as Democrats even harder.

**We need an _immediate_ surge of resources to fight back and win.** But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal. And at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster.

After Family Tragedy, Trump Sends Heartfelt Letter as Darren Bailey Vows to Stay in Race and ‘Fight, Fight, Fight’ (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/after-family-tragedy-trump-sends-heartfelt-letter-as-darren-bailey-vows-to-stay-in-race-and-fight-fight-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1c33900c91-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/after-family-tragedy-trump-sends-heartfelt-letter-as-darren-bailey-vows-to-stay-in-race-and-fight-fight-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1c33900c91-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Then-Illinois State Sen. Darren Bailey, R-Xenia, speaks next to former President Donald Trump, who endorsed Bailey for Illinois’ gubernatorial race in June 2022. (Brian Munoz/St. Louis Public Radio)
By Illinois Review

In a deeply personal gesture, 45th and 47th President Donald J. Trump has sent a powerful condolence letter on official Presidential Letterhead to former State Senator Darren Bailey and his family, offering prayers and comfort after the tragic helicopter crash that claimed the lives of the Baileys’ son Zachary, his wife Kelsey, and two of their young children, Vada Rose and Samuel.

The letter begins, “Dear Darren,” and expresses the President’s profound sorrow.

“Melania and I are utterly devastated by the tragic accident resulting in the unimaginable loss of your incredible son, Zachary, his beautiful wife, Kelsey, and two of their precious children,” Trump wrote.

He praised Zachary as “a testament to the values you and Cindy raised him with,” noting that faith, family, and community were the guiding forces of his life.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/after-family-tragedy-trump-sends-heartfelt-letter-as-darren-bailey-vows-to-stay-in-race-and-fight-fight-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1c33900c91-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
A copy of the Presidential Letter. (Source: Darren Bailey)
Trump wrote that he hoped the Baileys might find solace in knowing the young family is “together again in the arms of their Creator,” and he expressed confidence that their surviving grandson, Finn, “will certainly carry on the indelible legacy of his parents and siblings.”

The president also turned to Darren Bailey’s leadership and decades-long service to Illinois.

“Throughout your career, you have been a true champion for the people of Illinois,” he wrote, encouraging Bailey to continue to

“Fight! Fight! Fight!”

for the state he loves, even amid profound grief. “Their love for you will forever endure, and their spirits will remain by your side,” the letter said.

Shortly after receiving the president’s message, Darren Bailey took to social media to thank supporters and to make one point unmistakably clear: he is staying in the race for governor.

“We will FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT – and we will WIN,” Bailey wrote. “Cindy and I aren’t backing down. Not now. Not ever. Illinois families are hurting, and we’re standing shoulder to shoulder with every single one of you who’s tired of being ignored, overtaxed, and pushed aside.”

Trump closed his letter by assuring the family that the entire nation is praying for them:

“May God bless you, and may His grace grant you and Cindy abiding peace and comfort.”

The message reflects a bond that has strengthened over the years. President Trump endorsed Bailey’s gubernatorial bid in 2022, and their friendship remains firm – grounded in shared values, faith, and a commitment to Illinois families.
President Donald J. Trump on July 13, 2024, at a rally near Butler, Pennsylvania, moments after an attempted assassin shot and struck his ear, in which President Trump raised his right hand into a fist and yelled, "Fight! Fight! Fight!", the same words President Trump chose to include in his Presidential Letter to Darren Bailey. (Photograph by Evan Vucci / AP).

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. subject: We’re welcoming 9/11 perpetrators, head choppers, & mass killers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
I refuse to let them Make America Saudi Arabia again.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M_VVddLKeNsvEe_Qi5DmjANJ3hAEA3pIA9kAtpr2qJ7RG11xYMpKCtiQ3gY1sq7U532HF-MKlf1jXoMkPbyLCOZsnW3YpYz-aLjDMKzrpbKUkdNKaZOJl4t_NECAn6IZSiOt2TASWnK9tZy9-tIWMFxy-zDanecffHDJ9Wju3rAhh_xlrxWnV0pWwO8_0NMux92AfogddwuN-CDd8FZncMvQ-fW0fuf8&c=D4rSTCQ_oStYii6rJUqc3R71o1ju9HPu3kdr51-nHNZ9F4AyCxLhQQ==&ch=O_ZTDFkXmHRtuKqBlBHnQMDhi3tjZs9JvPr0PiR4hyfRgKu1cevEDw==)
---
|

Peter,
Over the past few months Trump has welcomed just about every despotic totalitarian killer in the world for warm welcomes on American shores.
First it was far-right Israeli mass killer Netanyahu. Then it Russia's Putin. Last week it was *former* Al-Qaeda terrorist turned Syrian President Jolani (up until just a few months ago had a $10,000,000 State Dept. bounty on his head for personally beheading people, killing US soldiers, and waging a war against the US).
This week, President Trump gave a warm welcome to another blood soaked dictator, Saudi Arabian Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman (MBS) who was visiting the United States from Monday to Wednesday night.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M_VVddLKeNsvEe_Qi5DmjANJ3hAEA3pIA9kAtpr2qJ7RG11xYMpKCtiQ3gY1sq7U532HF-MKlf1jXoMkPbyLCOZsnW3YpYz-aLjDMKzrpbKUkdNKaZOJl4t_NECAn6IZSiOt2TASWnK9tZy9-tIWMFxy-zDanecffHDJ9Wju3rAhh_xlrxWnV0pWwO8_0NMux92Afogddwvu3t_9eTLPh7zEw0On0mxS&c=D4rSTCQ_oStYii6rJUqc3R71o1ju9HPu3kdr51-nHNZ9F4AyCxLhQQ==&ch=O_ZTDFkXmHRtuKqBlBHnQMDhi3tjZs9JvPr0PiR4hyfRgKu1cevEDw==)
---
Bin Salman became an international pariah after he ordered the brutal execution, butchering, and dismemberment of American journalist Jamal Khashoggi.
MBS rules his country with an iron fist and allows for slave labor, horrible conditions for women, and a judicial system where people can be executed for one wrong word against the regime.
And last year, a federal judge ruled that Saudi Arabia must face litigation for the role they played in aiding the 9/11 hijackers and orchestrating the attacks, denying them immunity and allowing victims' families to proceed with seeking damages.
Unlike my opponent Lauren Boebert who refuses to condemn Saudi Arabia, has helped Trump obfuscate his business dealings there, and recently helped fellow Gulf State autocracy Qatar get an airbase on US soil, I am no friend to these dictators.
During the height of the Arab Spring I was a reporter for Yahoo! News and met dozens of Saudi human rights activists like now imprisoned human rights lawyer Waleed Abulkhair, Wajeha al Huwaider, "the most dangerous woman in Saudi," Samar Badawi, and Manal al-Sharif whom I helped with her autobiography, Daring to Drive, and thanked me in the credit section of the book.
I was so moved by their stories that I founded Honk for Saudi Women, an international pressure campaign where people the world over "honked" and made noise to call out Saudi Arabia. It went viral and we got thousands of people including Nancy Pelosi, Roseann Barr, and Amy Poehler to honk in defiance of Saudi misogynist autocrats.
I will never kowtow to dictators like Putin, Netanyahu, or MBS. I stand unflinchingly for human rights and dignity. [Boebert idolizes these dictators and hopes to emulate their rule in America unless we defeat her. Can you make a monthly donation to our campaign to stop her before she turns America into the far-right theocracy she envisions?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M_VVddLKeNsvEe_Qi5DmjANJ3hAEA3pIA9kAtpr2qJ7RG11xYMpKCtiQ3gY1sq7U532HF-MKlf1jXoMkPbyLCOZsnW3YpYz-aLjDMKzrpbKUkdNKaZOJl4t_NECAn6IZSiOt2TASWnK9tZy9-tIWMFxy-zDanecffHDJ9Wju3rAhh_xlrxWnV0pWwO8_0NMux92AfogddwtV1em2uiYfawBthMuZZMs6&c=D4rSTCQ_oStYii6rJUqc3R71o1ju9HPu3kdr51-nHNZ9F4AyCxLhQQ==&ch=O_ZTDFkXmHRtuKqBlBHnQMDhi3tjZs9JvPr0PiR4hyfRgKu1cevEDw==)
---

name: Real Texas PAC
subject: Red-to-blue opportunity in Tennessee
body:
🚨 URGENT: Tennessee’s 7th District is in play and time is running out!!!
A December special election is coming fast, and TN-07 has become one of the most important battlegrounds of the year. We need grassroots donors to step up now. Rush $10 or more immediately >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wintn?refcode=112025_1]
Republicans assumed this district was safe. But after years of dysfunction, shutdown threats, and Trump’s nonstop assault on basic decency, voters across Middle Tennessee are turning away from extremism.
The latest numbers show a real path to victory. Democrats can flip this seat and weaken the Republican majority, but only if Tennessee Dems can deploy support in the next few days. S pecial elections are decided by whoever organizes harder and earlier. We cannot let the GOP machine drown out Democratic voices!!!
This is a moment to rise to the challenge. Every dollar helps us support the Democrats who are invest in turnout operations, targeted communications, and on-the-ground mobilization. TN-07 is ready for a new direction. Chip in to help get it done! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wintn?refcode=112025_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wintn?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_1&amount=5]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
body:

Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e5c10c783ecd409fa463d69c142d08f1&_e=VYwFGZGSziB3zhPB9dPK9qqm7nA41IPneMNXYi_EGbfOmtTuFUd2M6NxP6vAD2Ok_S_PKOyIk64jt4KH1uRVZylZhtluIOqRC3jBk5JuNWnSm8yr9Jtcn1eo-bR7G8884xH2fjgtlZN6-fMw2qxxwdqguwr38uZLtUKThtS3I7_85_3j13a3C47h75cTrw7nG62jcRIzRfFQd0YGv9SyHIXdeKadMrZFxduzk8Cmco-PvUcSF4GWb8M8Zfns6S6O9SY2PjHhdkJpwfV67_mmo5hzDcQxznspuWeTgybEYPtDgmO9NDHASkUOdNTRotXbx4PXnEYbsIoCt9hXmjGrE5f4GhCx5TTY89q4COEqRwkQwSUP61-TZGJy-S9DCxro60dreHK4JS1MSO4qxhdxMQZJztKvFtCxz5MwxyQ9KLvkqfKqa12OSeWpCQBp9ezjPVmJO1PtGvK5kJQaz1gaSv3l8zL0Jxr3--kRgLnaquTcHGLIV0YiySUWAAORf-z8vcAA_zR0M66SlRdQSKoGOeNXUC99mKe6i4FXuXcXrLdn3YrgY6BrleKvpBh6eyWZlC8zeEVsKW-Q6qdwC_JRr8CmjZm78EKj05cL-WiYZZh25uFg19SatCjF4DNsroTsE4limXjNpyE9ipinM70ACGwrSlgS6PJgsd6JkeWj0cA%3D)
---
ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e5c10c783ecd409fa463d69c142d08f1&_e=VYwFGZGSziB3zhPB9dPK9qqm7nA41IPneMNXYi_EGbfOmtTuFUd2M6NxP6vAD2Ok_S_PKOyIk64jt4KH1uRVZylZhtluIOqRC3jBk5JuNWnSm8yr9Jtcn1eo-bR7G8884xH2fjgtlZN6-fMw2qxxwdqguwr38uZLtUKThtS3I7_85_3j13a3C47h75cTrw7nG62jcRIzRfFQd0YGv9SyHIXdeKadMrZFxduzk8Cmco9dNyGQYGj5wF05MoNEvpMOgN7i0YigzdVH7aFI5uP22VXZMrp1_4QS5boaWjQBzDZ62kpDyc2-4GL2s0_vbprCBM8orK643bOhlxnTb9V7xe6hBWd32O2w3WIn7D-A7FhOUaX0ja1asYIp7vvhqN9b8gZPryEiJC1IBS_C3yysiv5RW6_onz5eDD1neonELulPUDoRAgSvXTWd8Tk4vOhwcgzzHiqA49LrXYLIrE6DeEbRmq6BvTS3kP6NHLfv-cqHWy7gYBigpMjIk9BVX7qC8JZva_5NxobNw-q9HnTAlAgmYEyfXbQjxJ4lnfVs21TbTne8njRjFO4gXeutbJUuCRGwT3qIXoQ_K5BwYXam-zW_ZUFQg9qDqeX1aKjY4yBBk3L8r28J1X_pq9rWs1AhfPvgKWHXS-L4Vxl8GTk-WOj2OzUAINf6Qm7zeO7S8vg%3D)

But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e5c10c783ecd409fa463d69c142d08f1&_e=VYwFGZGSziB3zhPB9dPK9qqm7nA41IPneMNXYi_EGbfOmtTuFUd2M6NxP6vAD2Ok_S_PKOyIk64jt4KH1uRVZylZhtluIOqRC3jBk5JuNWnSm8yr9Jtcn1eo-bR7G8884xH2fjgtlZN6-fMw2qxxwdqguwr38uZLtUKThtS3I7_85_3j13a3C47h75cTrw7nG62jcRIzRfFQd0YGv9SyHIXdeKadMrZFxduzk8Cmco_HOl6Cn2CLKa6fp6JnPFIHEc1w4BvA9V_b_4P9w0Q55zVlxVWp99xXAoiyApMdozcnp12ZYYEvnOC8GAeoJV0SB0xOv34aj0ldv-mLDeOpQ9HAOwKfIML4xB-WEp3J-Baa33cSkwxPnOw2vIJkiUGsb7D_BfgWsRP1RmqehLIpnm-bUssyBNQ4A_TkoNC17bpG3CTwQMZ4-VxTOKA2JWypf-pZMRGEpa4VuvbGdd4Ofj9RWuGcPFY1DtueqOll-Wb4BdfdzEkhVIc7adqJVhshpGqLZyhIkRoPBtdSvDe00ax1dUWwfvgwVVpRLnQ4EqA8tsSZU469vCnwzFVia8EKtbqiprrhy0BpnS6jB0ivkhn1-V8Dw6t6aGeYjmLKgBhBIQvwKPXWh7yIfsGbaVFhK6nWyPpApKJ3W-SdWu8uEw7LzuftlT_2MSSGav4-TbY%3D)

| | **Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you.** This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... **Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War.** And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. **Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? ** **[Every dollar you give today helps us protect our student leaders, send activism kits to chapters, defend free speech, and fuel our reach to change more hearts and minds.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e5c10c783ecd409fa463d69c142d08f1&_e=VYwFGZGSziB3zhPB9dPK9qqm7nA41IPneMNXYi_EGbfOmtTuFUd2M6NxP6vAD2Ok_S_PKOyIk64jt4KH1uRVZylZhtluIOqRC3jBk5JuNWnSm8yr9Jtcn1eo-bR7G8884xH2fjgtlZN6-fMw2qxxwdqguwr38uZLtUKThtS3I7_85_3j13a3C47h75cTrw7nG62jcRIzRfFQd0YGv9SyHIXdeKadMrZFxduzk8Cmco_Sg96EPS5C0f0Un2uZIbpAdZs53IJVqHLM9T0_YzZSKXs_xCAV8im-bvIkl_y4h25XaRNVI7lPn-vrzXaTsEo6kr_NgRx1ipuK9IBzGig-sa6ZVE7k7ZqMk1hYCSnf8uKzp5jbWZWhcl5tYby7jHLpDYbIjeKMsxXSUGFP4GHy563cDAHOKYiAVndA4yV56DLSGD4MS1yDXuUTNdABSiy4Sa6sUqii1Qe1_I646LV3fZHn1Ytw0REEvB09VtUCLU9lX1M2w0YHlJ6wpVAJNlSEOZFtJ_2X5wayTdE4B9wDvIQA3chloiREF9y-EpqPY5_xRxJvcArYKxl4TzAxvnuTOdShmUswjnBBL82xa8qObwp8jDfwrj7ZxjZN-p7qqnFC7QIMJAkyk0erX-aShJ6XU9CgZ9lbRquexXZcyqqRszY8AIR-I4zx-0KVHDiRecw%3D)**

The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. _Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked..._ **We came to speak truth.** We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. **And that 's exactly why we're winning.** Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going...
---
| | **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Help me embarrass Bernie Sanders

Fellow Conservative,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=155ca55ec32c4950941cb321c4856b76&_e=yq-F8iyxAvJeQIn9xcSGL23KGUZnuVOuX_HggxQtnTZaSC4drYcfE6Vv-fULCGJeBYcwGrQnK4mZCMSjzTGnck0Ctk5a4_v_gTPsk7rwhi9XQUA7yUxddUllYMwGaHtHmvKlzRPMSb5_VdVme2QiK1kif7Q-dflTJ5k-jKWawlOvllp5uR87tYFgKMvj_8T3p1rBRHVtPauudcAf2OQ0X9mDMMKTaErapz1qyI0vB4BqZL05JGuK5K0HDvlZO8pKPKukKZjxcqd4yNl-TujqmUD4qxFQ6X06KoZzyi56jYipRa5paMDA-ji8hq6D5vEr3sCkj2n-knXToiGlWpBaN_Fb3OJTAKwnqAXWPT8wQXkMH8LffSmr_Fcrj7EGvt0GxV19EdPRcnuEL_N3JOQ35QNcyCWXCcWEuQutYILqy-XIUqNREnFadqRxk68zuhAEluamaCrPhDFk4A8N2GFQUR-nNCU3BEmJm7inJ7m1L6UCRPwxxrxFZoLtwFa9GxNtzrVpyDzu-ik5wcxn0kJHfiwN5xnzvEIfU1liDdFdzAjwCGe-ANocHJz3HoxBQCIKqs03ta21QCayuasu5-NCLX5zN5o5TrgcIFNcUGto2nz4BMwgzF4BcHiaY9Aa_9YliJDqplu1NJ0U6Kvfjcm_IV0PFiE44_F4-qcYwD9pHEBqpmStGef6KXdYNB9M1usCq4b4Kj-o4G0l4YskD6jy3X4Ztg8mG1hn7SMj3xm5tkItwvqMfqDpsP-eYzt48s_wtwx1ZktrJsnP0dyJJE_eJQ%3D%3D)**_

\- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (_**fueled by open borders**_) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year.

\- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation.

President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence.

He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms.

My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers.

_**he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. **_

We need _**FINANCIAL FIREPOWER**_ to counter Bernie’s political machine, which is equipped with hundreds of millions of dollars and an email fundraising list 10 miles long.

name: Joe Jaworski
subject: The Constitution is alive and well in Texas
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
Big news this week: the three-judge federal panel has ruled to block the 2025 Texas maps. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14190902?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=db052165b8&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Big news this week—a three-judge panel has ruled to **block the new 2025 Texas maps** , finding that race illegally played a role in how those maps were drawn. That ruling means **o****ur Constitution is alive and well, and the Rule of Law still stands.** Of course, junk lawyer and lawsuit-abuse guru **Ken Paxton** is already appealing the 160-page order as we speak. We’ll see what kind of pull Ken "2020” Paxton really has with the Supreme Court. As a proud former Mayor of Galveston, I have to acknowledge Judge Jeff Brown of the Southern District of Texas, who wrote the panel’s 2-1 majority opinion. Judge Brown’s earlier work on the Petteway case upheld coalition districts under the Voting Rights Act, a ruling later reversed by the Fifth Circuit. And here’s the irony. It was that same reversal that Abbott used as cover to justify this latest mid-decade redistricting power grab. Now, the very judge who got overruled before has ruled against the MAGA mob again. **How perfectly symmetrical.** Let’s hope the Supreme Court shows greater respect for the law this time and affirms what every Texan already knows. **Fair maps are the foundation of fair elections**. I don’t need to tell you that a lot is riding on this decision. Just another real-time example of why we need an Attorney General who will defend democracy, not dismantle it.

[**Are you with me? Let's take back the Office of Attorney General and fight for what's right. Contribute to our campaign for justice today.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=54e1aa9077&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,
**Joe Jaworski**

**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m asking for your help. I can’t do this without you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Your support keeps me going.
My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into NC to defeat me and our people-first campaign.
_This is all weighing on my mind, Peter._
I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy.
**But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online.
Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far.
**[I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and Heartland Patriots today. Would just $5 fit in your budget right away?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97583?refcode=em20251120-9737&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9737%2E614464%2E5xparP)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97583?refcode=em20251120-9737&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9737%2E614464%2E5xparP)**
I appreciate your strong support.
Roy Cooper

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

subject: Look what we just dropped 👀👕
body:
Roy Cooper for U.S. Senate’s Official Merch Store is now open!
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=57%2E124072%2Ebhr2dW)
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2043?t=6&akid=57%2E124072%2Ebhr2dW)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=57%2E124072%2Ebhr2dW)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=57%2E124072%2Ebhr2dW)

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My friend Tim Walz
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Hi, it’s Gabby Giffords.
My friend Tim Walz needs our help to win re-election in Minnesota. I hope you’ll read my message below and donate to make sure Tim is able to win next November and continue his fight to protect communities across his state from senseless gun violence.
So much is on the line next fall – now more than ever, we need champions like Tim Walz in office. **As governor, Tim has signed into law lifesaving measures like universal background checks and red flag laws, and he needs our help to pass a ban on assault weapons and high capacity magazines.**
I know just how hard these campaigns can be, but I also know that Tim has what it takes to win — he has won tough races before, and can do it again — but not without an army of grassroots supporters like you.
**[So please, I’m personally asking, Peter: Will you give $5 today to join me in supporting Tim’s campaign?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251120.avyxDX&amount=5&refcode=em20251120-132&t=1&akid=132%2E34582%2EUGdY7K)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251120.avyxDX&amount=5&refcode=20251120-132&t=20&akid=132%2E34582%2EUGdY7K)**
Thank you so much,
Gabby Giffords

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251120-132&t=21&refcode2=132_34582_UGdY7K&akid=132%2E34582%2EUGdY7K)**

St. Paul MN 55104

**RESCUE MISSION DRUMSTICK DASH - Nov. 27** The Drumstick Dash is a 5k run and family walk that happens every Thanksgiving Morning. The DASH benefits the Rescue Mission of Roanoke's dining services and provides for the meals that the Rescue Mission serves on an annual basis. They serve over 200,000 meals a year to those in need. These meals go to adults and children alike, providing needed nutrition so that each of their guests can focus on the ultimate success, rising out of poverty.

Bring a friend and meet the Delegates who will fight for YOU in Richmond! 2219 Carter Rd SW, Roanoke, VA 24015. | ~ | ~ VIRGINIA MOBILE ID The Virginia Mobile ID offers a secure, digital version of your driver's license or ID card, giving Virginians a simple, safe, and modern way to verify their identity using their smartphone. Details about the Virginia Mobile ID, where it's accepted, and how businesses can accept it are available at dmv.virginia.gov/mobileID. | In the Community | | STEPPING UP AT STATE, REGIONAL, AND LOCAL LEVELS We have to work together to protect the world around us. On Wednesday, Del. Rasoul joined a panel at Virginia Tech, where students are learning to create & advocate for intersectional and effective policies that will preserve our environment for generations to come. ~~ | YOU WRITE THE BILL SESSION TWO - Nov. 24 Join us Monday, November 24th, 5:30pm, at the Melrose Branch Library, for part two of our annual "You Write the Bill Workshop." You'll be able to learn about how to lobby your drafted bills and make a lobbying plan with your group. The Melrose Branch Library is located at 2502 Melrose Ave NW Suite D. | GRANDIN VILLAGE HOLIDAY CHILDREN'S PARADE - Nov. 22 The 2025 Grandin Village Holiday Children's Parade is this Saturday at 11 am in Historic Grandin Village. Stick around after the parade for the after-party where they'll present awards for best float, most creative, and biggest group. Food and refreshments will be available inside. | ILLUMINIGHTS OPENING NIGHT\- Nov. 22 This Saturday is Illuminight's opening night! Light up your night at this wonderful event! Wander a half-mile wooded trail filled with over 650,000 dazzling lights, new themes, and festive fun for the whole family. Tickets available now. ~ | RAIL YARD DAWGS VS KNOXVILLE ICE BEARS - Nov. 26 Celebrate Friendsgiving with the Rail Yard Dawgs on Wednesday, November 26! Enjoy select beers for just $3 all game long and help support their Fall Food Drive by bringing non-perishable items to donate. Puck drops at 7:05 pm. ~~ | RESCUE MISSION DRUMSTICK DASH - Nov. 27 The Drumstick Dash is a 5k run and family walk that happens every Thanksgiving Morning. The DASH benefits the Rescue Mission of Roanoke's dining services and provides for the meals that the Rescue Mission serves on an annual basis. They serve over 200,000 meals a year to those in need. These meals go to adults and children alike, providing needed nutrition so that each of their guests can focus on the ultimate success, rising out of poverty. ~ | | | RCPS POSTSEASON FOOTBALL! Our region is roud to cheer on our Colonels and Patriots once again this Friday, Nov. 21 at 7pm! William Fleming will be traveling to Highland Springs, while Patriot Henry will host Hermitage at home. Visit ~ to buy tickets for both games, and be sure to support our teams! | RCPS WALK-UP WEDNESDAYS RCPS is hiring! Join them for Walk-Up Wednesdays to learn about job opportunities with Roanoke City Public Schools. Wednesdays from 1-3 pm at Community Empowerment Center at Booker T. Washington 40 Douglass Ave. NW). They're hiring for: Teaching Assistants, Instructional Assistants, School Security Officers, and Operations Workers. HOLIDAY DRIVES SHERIFF'S OFFICE THANKSGIVING FOOD DRIVE The Roanoke Sheriff's Office is collecting: 300 turkeys, green beans, corn, mashed potatoes, yams, cornbread mix, macaroni & cheese, gravy, boxes or bags of stuffing, cake mix & other essentials. If you, your business, or your organization would like to donate, every bit counts! Drop-off Location: 340 Campbell Ave SW, Roanoke, VA 24016 8:30AM - 4:30PM. ~ | ~ | Community Resources | COMMUNITY OFFICE HOURS VIRTUAL OFFICE HOURS WITH DEL. RASOUL'S TEAM Our office is now holding virtual office hours to meet with constituents. Meet with a member of Delegate Sam Rasoul's team to ask questions, share concerns, or get help with state-related issues. We're here to listen and assist however we can. ~~ | | KNOW YOUR RIGHTS WITH ICE There have been recent reports of ICE throughout the state. The ACLU has created a collection of resources in the case you or someone you know interacts with ICE agents. Read and share the resources found ~~. ~~ | CONTACT YOUR FEDERAL REPRESENTATIVE In many ways, it feels like our federal government is under attack by the current administration. While our office is happy to assist however we can, it is still crucial that you engage our federal representatives. Find the contact information for the Virginia Congressional Delegation ~~. ~~ | JOIN THE ROANOKE CITY DEMOCRATS! RCDC's monthly business meeting is the third Thursday each month. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This is personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Healthcare tax credits aren’t just numbers on paper.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
Team — Do you recognize the little girl in this photo? [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz) That’s me. Growing up, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from _any_ insurer. Not at _any_ price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket and make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I had a pre-existing condition. That’s why I got into public service. I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. I thought no one should ever have to go through that. Now, thanks to the Affordable Care Act, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. That’s in jeopardy right now because Donald Trump and Republicans refuse to act. They created the longest government shutdown in U.S. history to prevent extending the tax credits that millions of Americans, and 275,000 Wisconsinites, rely on to afford their premiums. **I gave them the opportunity to stop health care premiums from doubling with an amendment that would have added an ACA tax credits extension to their funding bill.** **_Every single Republican voted against it._** **[I won’t stop fighting for your health care. Can you pitch in to help me continue this work?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-em-nov25.qrKV7H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-nov25.98MYJ5&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-nov25.yt8pwP&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=stb-em-nov25.J_gAmR&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-nov25.jSrpPw&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)
---
**Health care tax breaks are not just numbers on paper.** They are the lifeline that allows us to sleep at night knowing we won't lose everything if one of us gets sick.
Behind every one of the 22 million Americans who rely on these tax credits is a story, a family who has to put together a budget, who has to make the hard decisions of what they can afford for their family next year.
That’s who I am working for.
Thanks for your support.
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=5110%2E35263%2EJcbUqz)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
