name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: We have to speak out about what’s happening in the West Bank
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Settler violence against Palestinians in the West Bank has spiraled out of control.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-gaza/?source=em251120-1-180&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)
Friend — In the last month since the so-called ceasefire was brokered in Gaza, settler violence against Palestinians in the West Bank has spiraled out of control.
Gangs of Israeli settlers have been allowed to act with impunity, beating up Palestinians, looting and destroying their homes and farmland, and even destroying a sacred mosque.
And it’s not just these extremist gangs — the Israeli government has done its part to accelerate the illegal annexation of Palestinian land in the West Bank.
The Washington Post writes: “While approving housing and other infrastructure projects for Israeli settlements at a record rate, the government has also increased demolition of Palestinian property while deprioritizing investigations into attacks on Palestinians,”
This is a story that has been playing out for years, but the Gaza genocide has completely emboldened Israeli settlers and has allowed them to escalate their attacks. Israel was able to act recklessly violent and break international law left and right in Gaza — why not do the same in the West Bank?
We have to remember that all of this violence and terrorizing of Palestinians is in service of the ultimate goal of **annexing all of the West Bank into Israeli territory.** Little by little, village by village, the Israeli settler movement and the Israeli government that supports them seek to push Palestinians off their land.
Now it’s up to the international community, and especially the United States — which provides Israel with weapons and aid despite its continued flouting of international law — to speak out and put pressure on Israel to finally crack down on these violent gangs and halt the annexation of the West Bank.
[**Sign on to Ilhan Omar’s petition today calling on the Trump administration and Congress to stand up for human rights in the West Bank and stop Israel from destroying any hope for real Palestinian statehood. The time to act is now.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-gaza/?source=em251120-1-180&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-gaza/?source=em251120-1-180&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)**
Thank you for your steadfast support for Palestinian dignity and sovereignty. We need everyone in this fight.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1964_791427_hikB7F&akid=1964%2E791427%2EhikB7F)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The dismantling of the Justice Department
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, The New
York Times Magazine recently published a piece about the gutting of the
Justice Department.

They interviewed more than 60 former attorneys, who either quit or were
fired by the Trump administration. What they revealed should concern us
all.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]Before I go on, I have to ask: Will you pitch in to help me keep up the
fight for real justice and real accountability in this country? While
Trump and his allies dismantle the Justice Department, I am doing all I
can to hold it together.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]NYT Magazine: The unraveling of the Justice Department: Sixty attorneys
describe a year of chaos and suspicion

Donald Trump is trying to remake the Department of Justice in his
disturbing image. He’s threatened and fired career attorneys who refuse to
go along with his attacks on the rule of law and replaced them with
extreme loyalists who are willing to bend to his will and do anything he
asks.

Despite what Donald Trump may think, the lawyers at the Department of
Justice are not his personal lawyers. They are the people’s lawyers,
tasked with defending the Constitution, upholding the rule of law, and
protecting our democracy.

The article in New York Times Magazine recounts chilling stories of career
lawyers being asked to investigate universities that Trump disagreed with,
phony claims of voter fraud, and any perceived rivals, including Letitia
James, James Comey, and Jack Smith.

The Justice Department, usually a tool for accountability and real
justice, is now full of Trump criminal defense lawyers and sycophants like
Pam Bondi, Kash Patel, Ed Martin, and countless others who are far more
concerned with retribution than they are with justice.

We’re living in unprecedented times,
Derek. Trump is working to turn
the Justice Department into another political arm of his administration.

We need to speak out against this blatant dismantling of the Justice
Department.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]I will never stop seeking the truth and pursuing accountability for
this corrupt administration. If you’re with me, pitch in today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q42025_abs_em.jZ5GRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q42025_abs_em.fmwQtt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q42025_abs_em.oB7ZBD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=9209%2E5257348%2E9T5yRd ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Chris Pappas
subject: What Karoline Leavitt just said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
What my former opponent said.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3596%2E582294%2EZflbLt)
Do you know what I just heard?
**My former opponent Karoline Leavitt just attacked me on New Hampshire radio.**
She also said President Trump is intending to **flip “as many seats as possible”** and that she will be _“keenly watching”_ our race for Senate.
It doesn’t matter if Karoline’s spin comes from behind the podium or on the radio: **New Hampshire isn’t buying it.** When Karoline ran for Congress against me in 2022, Granite Staters rejected her and her MAGA agenda. With your help we’ll do it again.
**[Will you chip in any amount today to stop Republicans from flipping this Senate seat and keep me in the fight for Granite Staters?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251120_2_radio.4Onu2V&refcode=em20251120-2&t=2&akid=3596%2E582294%2EZflbLt)**
I’ve stood up to Karoline and her far-right agenda before. Now she and National Republicans are preparing to do everything they can to flip this Senate seat so they can stop Democrats from reclaiming the Senate majority.
**[I’m doing the work to win this race and help Democrats flip the Senate, but I need you with me to overcome the noise of the MAGA machine. Can you rush a donation today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251120_2_radio.4Onu2V&refcode=em20251120-2&t=3&akid=3596%2E582294%2EZflbLt)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251120_2_radio.4Onu2V&amount=5&refcode=em20251120-2&t=22&akid=3596%2E582294%2EZflbLt)**
I’m so grateful for your support.
Thank you,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251120-2&t=23&refcode2=3596_582294_ZflbLt&akid=3596%2E582294%2EZflbLt)**

Now she and National Republicans are preparing to do everything they can to flip this Senate seat so they can stop Democrats from reclaiming the Senate majority. I’m so grateful for your support. Thank you, Chris New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: Larry Hailsham Jr., Executive Director, Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: Off-year turnout soared, thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

This year, Pennsylvanians showed what happens when we show up to make our voices heard.

It wasn’t a year for sitting back. _Pennsylvania voters, from urban to rural counties,_ stood up and made their voices heard in an election where every race mattered. This was a collective achievement, a testament to the power of community involvement.

**And it’s all because of you. Your efforts, your commitment, and your belief in the value of our democracy made this possible.**

Your efforts were not in vain. You talked to neighbors, shared information, volunteered, and most importantly, you believed in the worth of our freedoms even in an off-year. And Pennsylvanians responded, showing that every action you took was crucial and made a difference.

We saw enthusiasm, determination, and commitment in every corner of this Commonwealth. People showed up not just to vote, but to protect their values, defend their rights, and shape the future of their local communities.

This is what happens when Democrats organize early, invest everywhere, and trust our grassroots.

**_[If you’re ready to keep this momentum going, chip in today to help us build the strongest Democratic movement Pennsylvania has ever seen:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119659470/583810866/-601123478?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251120_FR_WhatWeHaveBuilt_0_1MO_LarryHailsham_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWQ1NzkzNy00MGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epkZgZRa21FKGFP8IvmWysOiOFN7U329aZStcZVJDsY=)_** | | [SUPPORT PA DEMS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119659471/583810870/-601123478?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251120_FR_WhatWeHaveBuilt_0_1MO_LarryHailsham_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWQ1NzkzNy00MGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epkZgZRa21FKGFP8IvmWysOiOFN7U329aZStcZVJDsY=)

Thank you for being a part of this. Your contribution, no matter how big or small, has been invaluable. We couldn’t have done it without you.

— Larry Hailsham Jr., Executive Director, Pennsylvania Democratic Party

subject: The GOP is PANICKING - these 2 Senate seats are at risk!!!!! 🚨🚨🚨
body:
We didn’t expect Senate races in Ohio and Florida this cycle - but thanks to JD Vance and Marco Rubio joining Trump’s administration, both seats are up for grabs early.
That’s two unexpected chances to flip red seats and take back the Senate majority. And it’s happening fast.
Republicans are scrambling to defend these surprise openings, and their donors are already flooding cash into both states. If Democrats don’t move now, we risk falling behind before the race even begins.
So here's what we're looking at, Peter:
🗳️ Two high-profile Senate seats
⏰ Up for grabs earlier than expected

name: Tina Kotek
subject: The fight against Trump is never-ending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Trump wants to punish Oregon, and I will keep fighting back. |
#
---
Peter – President Trump is still fighting tooth and nail to put Oregon National Guard troops in Portland. We keep winning in the courts, but he keeps appealing. Enough is enough. It's time that Oregon National Guard members be allowed to go home to their families, jobs, and lives. I will not stop fighting. I will keep standing up for Portland —and for all of Oregon —against Trump’s efforts to punish us for what we believe. The work we’re doing to protect Oregon from Trump’s extreme power grab has never been **more critical and urgent – and I need to have you standing with me.** [_**_Can you let me know you have my back by pitching in?_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119661349/583814453/-780220320?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4ODQzMi00MmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qy--15ZKTIB58lggSexEt_oqH0vhJ5A6RnEjCu5dbdw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119661350/583814454/-780220320?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4ODQzMi00MmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qy--15ZKTIB58lggSexEt_oqH0vhJ5A6RnEjCu5dbdw=)

clean_body: Trump wants to punish Oregon, and I will keep fighting back. | Peter – President Trump is still fighting tooth and nail to put Oregon National Guard troops in Portland. We keep winning in the courts, but he keeps appealing. Enough is enough. It's time that Oregon National Guard members be allowed to go home to their families, jobs, and lives. I will not stop fighting. I will keep standing up for Portland —and for all of Oregon —against Trump’s efforts to punish us for what we believe. The work we’re doing to protect Oregon from Trump’s extreme power grab has never been more critical and urgent – and I need to have you standing with me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you. Stay strong. Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

body:
Only days left to claim your spot in my inner circle.
| | | |
# **Out of millions, you were hand-picked.**
# ****

# **I’m opening my Inner Circle to only 150,000 Americans total – ever.**
---
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[JOIN MY INNER CIRCLE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
This is the last call before we close the doors for good on Thanksgiving.
Once you’re in, you’ll get intel the media will never report, briefings straight from the Oval Office, and things I can only share with only the most die-hard MAGA Patriots.
Trust me, you will not want to miss out on these exclusive strategy updates from HQ.
**I will NOT extend this deadline. Too many are begging to get in, and 150,000 is the hard limit.**
If you join before Friday, I’m planning something very special that day just for my Inner Circle patriots as a personal thank you.
**_[I can’t extend past Thanksgiving – too many people are trying to get in.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION NOW](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
You’re one of us. Don’t miss this.
Donald J. Trump

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Never expected to get the cold shoulder from YOU
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-1AdFOA_lUqw)
---
You still have time, but not much, so I encourage you to complete your profile sooner rather than later! I’m also really starting to worry that we haven’t heard from you!

[Please, Peter, if you have a few minutes submit your Voter Profile before time expires!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-EelbP1fM3Nhw)

THANK YOU,
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._CQA)
Marsha Blackburn
[ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-b8g)

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Investigative Journalist and Co-Founder of The Gateway Pundit, Joe Hoft endorses David Flippo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Conservatives from across the nation are rallying behind David Flippo! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=4634719e6e&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter ,
I proudly announce that **Investigative Journalist and Co-Founder of The Gateway Pundit, Joe Hoft** , has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04.** Joe Hoft’s work has helped advance the conservative movement's causes, particularly through his hard-hitting journalism on election integrity and government overreach. Here is what Joe had to say when he endorsed me:
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=8ae28b8dfe&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| “I have spent years exposing corruption across the country and around the world. We are all tired of the political class that works for itself instead of the American people. I proudly share the truth and believe I have a unique ability to discern who is telling the truth. When I look at Lt. Col. David Flippo, I see an honest man with a serious record. Flippo served this country in combat. He built his life on service, discipline, and results. He speaks plainly, and he follows through. That matters. I cover politicians every day. Very few impress me. David Flippo impresses me because he delivers instead of performs. America faces real threats. We need leaders who step forward with courage and integrity. David Flippo does exactly that. He has my full endorsement.”
---
| [DONATE TO BUILD ON OUR CAMPAIGN’S MOMENTUM ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=2568bab29d&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TO BUILD ON OUR CAMPAIGN’S MOMENTUM ")
---
| Our campaign is continuing to gain momentum, following our incredibly successful Kick-Off event, and many conservative politicians, candidates, and pundits are taking notice! **I proudly support the “America First” agenda, and Joe has dedicated a large part of his career to fighting for those same principles!** In Congress, **I will fight for accountability and transparency, just like Joe does every day!**
We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together.**I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=e4c36185c6&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE ")
---
| For Nevada, David Flippo
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=878a6ab257&e=273c9a71fb)**
---

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We can't let this be the case next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team, we're not kidding: Ten states enacted new voting restrictions in 2024 .
Brennan Center map of 10 states that made it harder to vote in 2024 [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/BrennanCenter_2024_SuppressiveLaws.png]
In fact, according to the nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice, " states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ".
From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference, states from Arizona to Georgia to North Carolina did their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Opponents of voting rights have spent the last two decades attacking voting rights, and 2025 looks to be no different.
Unlike the vote suppressors driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count . That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now.
Team, this is the fight of our lives. Opponents of voting rights are trying to make the progress we've made a distant memory. Push back for 2026 by pitching in $26 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112025_1&amount=26]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_1&amount=15]

Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112025_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112025_1&amount=20]

name: Team Kelly
subject: Donald Trump just called for Mark to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’ll be blunt: There is no telling what’s coming next. Whatever happens, we need to make sure Mark has the resources he needs to defend himself and fight back.
#

You read that right.
As a combat veteran, Mark participated in a video reminding the brave men and women serving in our armed forces that they can refuse to follow illegal orders. In response, Donald Trump accused Mark Kelly of sedition and called for him to be hanged.
Yes, all of that is really true.
We’ll be blunt: There is no telling what’s coming next. Whatever happens, we need to make sure Mark has the resources he needs to defend himself and fight back.
[**Please, rush a donation of $3 to Mark so he has the peace of mind to know he’ll be prepared for any possible outcome from Trump and his White House.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251120-1-800k&t=1&akid=6249%2E6688874%2EwTR1TX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-nov25/.-0DWa_&amount=5&refcode=em251120-1-800k&t=2&akid=6249%2E6688874%2EwTR1TX)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-nov25/.-0DWa_&refcode=em251120-1-800k&t=3&akid=6249%2E6688874%2EwTR1TX)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6249%2E6688874%2EwTR1TX).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. This just confirms what we already knew to be true: Marjorie just picks fights to stay in the news. This time around, it was just Donald Trump on the receiving end. **But here 's the truth: Neither of them have done a single thing for the hardworking people of Northwest Georgia. **

My name is Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat, a husband, a father, a retired Brigadier General, and a fifth-generation farmer. **And I 'm going to win this election and defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene because I'm focused on the kitchen table issues that impact the daily lives of Georgians -- not petty political infighting in Washington.** In Congress, I'll fight for veterans, seniors, healthcare, food security, affordable housing, high-paying generational jobs, a new Farm Bill, and so much more, so that everyone has the opportunity to live the American dream. [**Northwest Georgia deserves change, because Leadership Matters. name: Democratically
subject: Sleepy Donald is unfit
body:
A president falling asleep during briefings isn't just laughable, it's dangerous.

[](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/yB9Jh5Yc6ejOGvOD_WqFEYaH09i1oGY4a-1o5UrR6Qw)
Peter,

Donald Trump, the "stable genius," nodding off mid-Fox News shutdown rant—eyes shut like a kid at naptime. It's a pattern: dozing at rallies, shuffling up stairs, all while families starve in his "golden age."

Voters see it—approval at 37%, rock bottom, screaming "unfit."
We’re calling out this leadership snooze-fest. Laugh, share, and build momentum.

[](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/yB9Jh5Yc6ejOGvOD_WqFEbJ9PdEDeF8FL_fQHXXcfEg)[**See it for yourself...**](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/yB9Jh5Yc6ejOGvOD_WqFEbJ9PdEDeF8FL_fQHXXcfEg)[](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/yB9Jh5Yc6ejOGvOD_WqFEbJ9PdEDeF8FL_fQHXXcfEg)

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119662815/583819198/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQxNzVkMC00M2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oinNCICzIPgHmrPKhEbYyAw38TEXT2POSFKPmvT_reY=)
Peter,

I’m going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, we have split the MAGA base, and **we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.**

Up to **40 MAGA Republicans** are ready to support my **Khanna Epstein Transparency Act** , even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.

This didn’t happen by accident.

It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships across the aisle, like those with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. But it’s working.

It’s the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade – since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President. And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency and a government for the people, not the rich, powerful, and well-connected, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.

But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.

[**Will you rush a split $10 to my campaign and George Whitesides to help us keep going on conservative podcasts, holding town halls in Republican districts, and building the coalition we need to defeat extremism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119662816/583819199/1934587619?refcode=em-11.20.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQxNzVkMC00M2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oinNCICzIPgHmrPKhEbYyAw38TEXT2POSFKPmvT_reY=)

Our campaigns are powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* **Travel and event logistics** to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* **Promotion and organizing** to bring new people into the movement.
* **Security and operations** so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro Khanna

body:

Her remarks came in direct response to President Donald Trump, who on Monday said he would be willing [...]

# **[Navarro Discusses Text Messages](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In the ever-deepening labyrinth of political scandal, the Epstein saga has returned—not with a whisper but a roar—and this time, the target is Democrat Rep. Stacey Plaskett. As has now emerged, Plaskett not only received tens of thousands of dollars from Jeffrey Epstein after his conviction, but maintained contact with him via text—specifically during Michael [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/V15X5K7xbT9caSOOJts9Iw)
# **[Jeffries Discusses Healthcare Policy During MSNBC Interview](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/V15X5K7xbT9caSOOJts9Iw)**
---
On a recent segment that’s already making waves, House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries appeared to admit what millions of Americans have experienced firsthand—that the Affordable Care Act, better known as Obamacare, hasn’t delivered on its promises. And he did it live on MSNBC.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/V15X5K7xbT9caSOOJts9Iw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[NYT's Writer Discusses Congresswoman's Decision](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
As predicted, the media is already rolling out the red carpet for Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene now that she’s showing signs of friction with President Donald Trump. And in the most unintentionally hilarious twist yet, The New York Times’ Tyler Pager just compared Greene to—wait for it—Joe Biden. Yes, that Joe Biden. The one who [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Trump Speaks At McDonald's Summit](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
At the 2024 McDonald’s Impact Summit, President Donald Trump did something only he could do—blend fast food, populist charm, and economic statistics into a moment that was both theatrical and data-driven. In a speech that managed to be light-hearted and policy-rich, Trump leaned into his everyman appeal while touting the measurable progress of his second [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: $5. That's all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
And why it's so important

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8939?t=2&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)
---
**$5.**
That's what I'm humbly asking you to **[chip in to my campaign](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8940?t=3&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)** before midnight tonight.
| | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8941?t=4&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)
---
**$5** because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. And I need your help to take this fight to the Senate.
**$5** because flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**$5** because this race is on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – in the country. And I simply can't reach my critical fundraising goals without your help.
**I know it might not seem like much – but if everyone reading this chipped in $5, we'd get there in no time! That's the power of the grassroots movement we're building, null. It's made up of thousands of folks like you giving $5 when they can – and I really need you with me today.**
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 – or anything at all – right now so we can keep Michigan blue and win a Democratic Senate majority next November?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8941?t=5&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)**
| | | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8941?t=6&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)
---
| | [Chip in another amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8940?t=7&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)
---
Thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means so much to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8942?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8939?t=9&akid=1407%2E49239%2EC5LwJz)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Save ACA via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress to Save the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Congress is about to pull the rug out from under millions of Americans. If
it doesn't act NOW to extend Affordable Care Act subsidies, MILLIONS of
people will lose their health insurance in 2026.

While Republicans have so far REFUSED to act, Democrats just introduced a
discharge petition to FORCE a vote – and they just need a few Republicans
to sign on.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34696?source=email-20251120&t=1011&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Headline: Democrats introduce discharge petition to force vote on
extension of ObamaCare subsidies

With some Republicans already expressing support for the idea of extending
the subsidies, now we just need a mountain of grassroots pressure to get
them on board with the discharge petition. But it’s going to take all of
us to do it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34696?source=email-20251120&t=1012&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Will you URGENTLY add your name right now to demand ALL our
representatives act to extend the ACA subsidies before it’s too late?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34696?source=email-20251120&t=1013&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]ADD YOUR NAME

This isn’t just statistics – it’s life and death. For some families, it
will be the difference between filling a prescription and skipping meals.
For millions of seniors, workers, and people with pre-existing conditions,
losing coverage means disaster, bankruptcy, or going without lifesaving
care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34696?source=email-20251120&t=1014&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Headline: ACA Marketplace premium payments would more than double on
average next year if enhanced premium tax credits expire

While Republicans have so far refused to negotiate, pressure is building
as people across the country get their new premiums in the mail and
vulnerable representatives on BOTH sides of the aisle feel the heat.

Now, Democrats in the House are fighting back with a discharge petition to
force a direct vote on extending ACA subsidies for three more years. But
they need 218 members to sign on, and that means persuading a handful of
moderate Republicans who are facing pressure from their constituents not
to allow their health care costs to skyrocket.

If we can FLOOD Congress with calls to sign onto this discharge petition
we can force the vote and stop MILLIONS of Americans from losing their
health care. But we need to move quickly. If just a few Republicans sign
this petition, we win. Let’s flood their inboxes and show the full
strength of our movement – before millions lose their health care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34696?source=email-20251120&t=1015&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]These politicians work for us. Let’s make sure they hear us, loud and
clear. Add your name today to tell Congress: Extend ACA subsidies and save
millions from losing their health care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34696?source=email-20251120&t=1016&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251120.jmIRG9&t=1007&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251120.ZNW6Cj&t=1008&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251120.P61a0R&t=1009&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251120.HCZNIl&t=1010&akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9867%2E5885482%2Es8TWUa

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Now, Democrats in the House are fighting back with a discharge petition to force a direct vote on extending ACA subsidies for three more years. But they need 218 members to sign on, and that means persuading a handful of moderate Republicans who are facing pressure from their constituents not to allow their health care costs to skyrocket. If we can FLOOD Congress with calls to sign onto this discharge petition we can force the vote and stop MILLIONS of Americans from losing their health care. But we need to move quickly. If just a few Republicans sign this petition, we win. Let’s flood their inboxes and show the full strength of our movement – before millions lose their health care. [ ]These politicians work for us. Let’s make sure they hear us, loud and clear. Add your name today to tell Congress: Extend ACA subsidies and save millions from losing their health care. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win, Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! * 🧑🍳 **Immigrant home cooks** facing off in unique culinary categories to showcase their family recipes (and the special stories behind them)
* 🎥 **Celebrity guest judges,** including _Shameless_ star Chelsea Rendon, two-time _Chopped!_ champion Lazarus Lynch, and this week’s very special guest Drag icon Geneva Karr

clean_body: Republicans are gambling with people’s lives to score political points. | | I will not back down from this fight. I refuse to let Republicans rip away Affordable Care Act subsidies from MILLIONS of Americans. In a matter of weeks, ACA subsidies are set to expire — so we need to act fast. This is basic, essential health care for folks who need it most. | 🔴 I refuse to let this deal result in millions losing their insurance and going broke over basic health care needs. 🔴 I refuse to ignore the needs of families who are already struggling with rising costs as a result of the Trump administration’s negligent policies. 🔴 I refuse to rubber-stamp Donald Trump’s agenda to reward billionaires at everyone else’s expense. | Thank you for fighting with me, — Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Women are constituents. Not entertainment.
body:
Women deserve representation that respects them.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=8ed508d717&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,
**Brad Sherman is part of the old boys’ network** — the same status quo that shields itself instead of standing up for women. His actions on that flight last week showed an elitist “rules don’t apply to me” mindset that has no place in public service.[](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=fb16b5be4d&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Women are not Brad Sherman’s entertainment.
Women are not sexual objects.**And we cannot forget: at a recent State Department hearing, Sherman questioned whether releasing the Epstein files would “harm American foreign policy.” **What kind of leadership treats accountability about the exploitation of children and young girls as optional?**[](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=35e5ee6fcb&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Women deserve better than leaders who look out for their own power** instead of the people they serve. I’m running for Congress to make it clear that we don’t have to accept this behavior — not from anyone. I will bring respect and accountability to Washington.**Join me in telling Brad Sherman that his time in Congress is up.**
---
| [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=fdd777ae43&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| |

**In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=2d63484265&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CA-32**
---

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: An inside look at how top Republican donors feel about Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1326%2E251025%2EHATO01 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1326%2E251025%2EHATO01 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Have you heard what GOP officials are saying about Michigan’s Senate race?

[ A ]A post from @StefWKight New: NRSC sees Michigan as a 'starting point'
for expanding the Senate majority next year, top officials told donors on
a call

That’s right,
Peter. Major Republican
strategists and donors have their sights set on Michigan. Two factors
could work in their favor:

1. Enthusiasm. If the AIPAC-backed candidate wins the Democratic primary,
Democratic energy will drop off, giving the GOP an opening to boost
voter turnout and pull ahead.
2. Money. Republican officials also believe that no matter who Democrats
nominate, their MAGA billionaire donors can spend whatever it takes to
buy this seat for Mike Rogers.

It’s clear that they see Michigan as the easiest path to expanding their
Senate majority.

We know they’re wrong, but that doesn’t make these obstacles any easier to
overcome. What will help is grassroots support.

Your donation helps us reach more voters, respond to any Republican
attacks, and prove that a people-powered campaign can win both the primary
and general elections.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251120-1-ak.Dfwkzc&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-1324&t=1004&akid=1326%2E251025%2EHATO01 ]Abdul is the only candidate in this race who’s never taken money from
corporate PACs or AIPAC — that means he’s counting on people like you to
fuel this campaign. Can you chip in $10 today?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251120-1-ak.Dfwkzc&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-1324&t=1023&akid=1326%2E251025%2EHATO01 ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1326%2E251025%2EHATO01
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1326%2E251025%2EHATO01

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Did you see this message from Jane Fonda? **We’re sending a warm congratulations to our incredible climate champions who defeated Big Oil in this year’s elections, and we noticed your name wasn’t on the card yet![Can you take a few seconds to add yours now? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664598/583823680/-840730308?refcode=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NjI2OTI2LTQ4YzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ1dAgdclIm4ycdQk7DPWhrw4lpgx6NGQZwZV81nIAM=&emci=22303520-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE CARD**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664599/583823681/-840730308?refcode=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NjI2OTI2LTQ4YzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ1dAgdclIm4ycdQk7DPWhrw4lpgx6NGQZwZV81nIAM=&emci=22303520-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

So far this year, we’ve elected **over 60 climate champions** all across the country, including to state and local offices Big Oil thinks they can quietly buy without anybody noticing.
**Your signature may seem like a small act, but it shows our climate champions that people across the country appreciate their courage. And it sends a message to the fossil fuel industry that our democracy isn’t for sale.**
**[What do you say? A signature from you would ensure your community in Cresco is represented on our card!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664600/583823682/-840730308?refcode=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NjI2OTI2LTQ4YzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ1dAgdclIm4ycdQk7DPWhrw4lpgx6NGQZwZV81nIAM=&emci=22303520-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**
Thanks for signing!
— Team JanePAC
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
We have a _lot_ to celebrate!
So far this year, we’ve elected **over 60 climate champions** all across the country. I’m talking seats in city councils, state legislatures, a public service commission, Congress, and more — wins that YOU made possible.
**[Many of these state and local candidates put in long hours with very little recognition. I want them to know just how proud we are. Will you take a moment to represent your community in Cresco and sign our congratulations card today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664601/583823683/-840730308?refcode=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NjI2OTI2LTQ4YzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ1dAgdclIm4ycdQk7DPWhrw4lpgx6NGQZwZV81nIAM=&emci=22303520-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664602/583823684/-840730308?refcode=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NjI2OTI2LTQ4YzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ1dAgdclIm4ycdQk7DPWhrw4lpgx6NGQZwZV81nIAM=&emci=22303520-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
I hope you take a moment to reflect on what you’ve been a part of and how your support is transforming not only the face of leadership in our country, but the daily reality for millions of people who call it home. Thank you!
At 87, I’ve lived long enough to learn that nothing is guaranteed, especially when you threaten the status quo that’s benefited the likes of Big Oil and corporate polluters for all too long. These state and local races? These are the ones Big Oil quietly buys and hopes we’re not paying attention to.
But on election night, voters sent a clear message: We’re done with politicians who bend to Big Oil and Big Bullies. We want leaders who lead with courage and integrity — leaders who will fight for clean air and clean water, who stand up to polluters, and who will defend our democracy from those trying to undermine it.
**It’s for those very reasons that when voters raise their voices at the ballot box, they side with climate champions we’ve endorsed._That’s why we’re in this work together. That’s why we win together. And that is special._**
**[It’s the honor of my life to be in this fight with you, and it’s time for us to celebrate. Will you join me in congratulating our climate champions by signing the card below? We set a goal to reach 1,000 signatures before the day ends so we can show them just how darn proud we are.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664603/583823685/-840730308?refcode=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NjI2OTI2LTQ4YzYtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ1dAgdclIm4ycdQk7DPWhrw4lpgx6NGQZwZV81nIAM=&emci=22303520-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=84626926-48c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: In case you missed it... | Did you see this message from Jane Fonda? We’re sending a warm congratulations to our incredible climate champions who defeated Big Oil in this year’s elections, and we noticed your name wasn’t on the card yet | So far this year, we’ve elected over 60 climate champions all across the country, including to state and local offices Big Oil thinks they can quietly buy without anybody noticing. Your signature may seem like a small act, but it shows our climate champions that people across the country appreciate their courage. And it sends a message to the fossil fuel industry that our democracy isn’t for sale. Thanks for signing! — Team JanePAC \---------- Forwarded message --------- We have a lot to celebrate! So far this year, we’ve elected over 60 climate champions all across the country. I’m talking seats in city councils, state legislatures, a public service commission, Congress, and more — wins that YOU made possible. I hope you take a moment to reflect on what you’ve been a part of and how your support is transforming not only the face of leadership in our country, but the daily reality for millions of people who call it home. Thank you! At 87, I’ve lived long enough to learn that nothing is guaranteed, especially when you threaten the status quo that’s benefited the likes of Big Oil and corporate polluters for all too long. These state and local races? These are the ones Big Oil quietly buys and hopes we’re not paying attention to. But on election night, voters sent a clear message: We’re done with politicians who bend to Big Oil and Big Bullies. We want leaders who lead with courage and integrity — leaders who will fight for clean air and clean water, who stand up to polluters, and who will defend our democracy from those trying to undermine it. It’s for those very reasons that when voters raise their voices at the ballot box, they side with climate champions we’ve endorsed.That’s why we’re in this work together. That’s why we win together. And that is special. Onward, Jane xx | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---

ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---

But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **

Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked... We came to speak truth. We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. And that 's exactly why we're winning. Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going... | | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.** Friend, when the Left screamed in our students' faces... When they mocked Charlie's murder... Our students held the line. If you believe in what they're doing... If you know this fight is just beginning... Your support means more than you know. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Healthcare isn't a luxury. It's a right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Tennesseans are paying the price as costs skyrocket.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAHCMFRKQ9RVNYDM5M13YHM1_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAHCMFRKQ9RVNYDM5M13YHM1_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, In Tennessee, too many families are saddled with serious medical debt. Tennessee had the 8th highest medical debt rate in the nation in recent years. Now, even more families are one medical crisis away from financial ruin. Meanwhile, insurance premiums and out-of-pocket costs keep rising, and Republican legislators continue to block increased access to healthcare coverage and taxpayer subsidies for working families.

---
| | [ DONATE ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAHCMFRKQ9RVNYDM5M13YHM1_2)
---
| We believe healthcare must be accessible, affordable and high quality. The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus is fighting to protect Medicaid and Medicare, expand eligibility, support in-home care for seniors, ensure mental health parity, and create a system where no one goes untreated because of costs. Failing to protect vital healthcare programs will only increase costs for all of us in the long-term.
Chip in now so we can stand up to the special interests and fight for health justice in Tennessee!
---

subject: Help me support a candidate that deserves it — Peggy Flanagan

We need to take on the corporate greed and special interests who want to gut Medicaid and SNAP, and abandon working families. **That’s why today, I’m endorsing Peggy Flanagan for Minnesota’s open Senate seat. When I first ran for office, I didn’t have a long background in politics or a family history of campaigning.
I saw my community needed someone to step up, and I couldn’t sit back.
That’s the kind of leader Peggy is. She’s running a true grassroots race, dedicated to the idea that the government can still improve people’s lives.
I know that Peggy will be an incredible champion for Minnesotans in the US Senate. Now more than ever, we need new voices who aren’t afraid to speak out and call out the BS when they see it.
That’s Peggy — believe me. As a Native American woman and a proud member of the White Earth Nation, her Ojibwe name _literally_ means “Speaks in a Loud and Clear Voice Woman.”
[_**So, join me in supporting Peggy for Senate. Can you split a donation of $10 today to power her campaign to victory?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119664867/583824513/274653739?amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODc0ZWE1Mi00OWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SeXtTkUs-CyoIlor4NknBDvAYPB-ToM1u2kCShpYMts=)

name: Breaking:
subject: Trump calls for execution of Democrat Jason Crow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018JzfgHu9lKZN_g9Nuw8opZ4sj2zVGXcPwwm5q8PxxXYfsl9U7ZqucWt6cds67PTHi_ur69EdGBA5S--KGy6cwke590qTrAN-wxhYOB5n-5fCz8yikn0GbkYyNA4xQeqhBHRA_Z4CicNh__e6ru4dJIfKl6RjzBFhrNLMEEsrzNLFUJJdOsr4TuWySz2_wuAlJf-eUbOMLo1EmDhY2y3r960Fsmy7Z3Aq&c=OCkOLuLlfCFSd1JwF53loZO3_jsbFEUkdqJ2i0daqsZpBWyw7LNAYg==&ch=_gXuyT5Dyf23UJt7IraUp_OFwJHEuYI9wy3UbGWH6GTrWrLEJ-PJjQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow, appeared in a video urging military members to disobey illegal and unconstitutional orders.
In response Trump took to Truth Social and stated that they "were guilty of 'SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!'"

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018JzfgHu9lKZN_g9Nuw8opZ4sj2zVGXcPwwm5q8PxxXYfsl9U7ZqucWt6cds67PTHi_ur69EdGBA5S--KGy6cwke590qTrAN-wxhYOB5n-5fCz8yikn0GbkYyNA4xQeqhBHRA_Z4CicNh__e6ru4dJIfKl6RjzBFhrNLMEEsrzNLFUJJdOsr4TuWySz2_wuAlJf-eUbOMLo1EmDhY2y3r93YA8HexTsjA&c=OCkOLuLlfCFSd1JwF53loZO3_jsbFEUkdqJ2i0daqsZpBWyw7LNAYg==&ch=_gXuyT5Dyf23UJt7IraUp_OFwJHEuYI9wy3UbGWH6GTrWrLEJ-PJjQ==)
---

Less than an hour after Trump's call to execute these Democrats, it was announced that the Coast Guard, which operates under the Department of Homeland Security, would no longer classify the swastika as a hate symbol.
Besides Trump, responsibility for this dark moment rests with Lauren Boebert.
She once tweeted "I am the militia," vowed to bring a gun to work in Congress, lead insurrectionists on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to January 6th and during the Capitol riot she tweeted the location of the US Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob.
She supports the notion that MAGA has a divine right for fascist rule and last year she called for the creation of a Taliban-like "holy army" to "save Colorado from the left."
MAGA has already arrested members of the Congress and the Senate. How long until they kill one of them. If Boebert stays in office for another term and retains the pulpit she uses to call for violence, we could soon find out.
Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Boebert is beyond vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job.
[We have a narrow window to stop Boebert and MAGA before they can usher in their darkest fantasies like executing Democratic members of Congress. Please can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help Trisha beat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018JzfgHu9lKZN_g9Nuw8opZ4sj2zVGXcPwwm5q8PxxXYfsl9U7ZqucWt6cds67PTHdvzkVb6LIVk67iJlcbNAgWGbzk3TpooUzhpy1gEecWCxr_11Jbeizey6Uvsv0EAA_g52eA6jVSpda7-Twl7UoITPDEQIX8p1FzaCe2ftH64X3LbCas7ylLr5HQ2fY-nJ9ikxAh4D606HuMuAyQp1BNe8qG6VLyUO6kkdvJVetdY=&c=OCkOLuLlfCFSd1JwF53loZO3_jsbFEUkdqJ2i0daqsZpBWyw7LNAYg==&ch=_gXuyT5Dyf23UJt7IraUp_OFwJHEuYI9wy3UbGWH6GTrWrLEJ-PJjQ==)

clean_body: Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow. | | | | | == | Peter, Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow, appeared in a video urging military members to disobey illegal and unconstitutional orders. In response Trump took to Truth Social and stated that they "were guilty of 'SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!'" | == Less than an hour after Trump's call to execute these Democrats, it was announced that the Coast Guard, which operates under the Department of Homeland Security, would no longer classify the swastika as a hate symbol. Besides Trump, responsibility for this dark moment rests with Lauren Boebert. She once tweeted "I am the militia," vowed to bring a gun to work in Congress, lead insurrectionists on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to January 6th and during the Capitol riot she tweeted the location of the US Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob. She supports the notion that MAGA has a divine right for fascist rule and last year she called for the creation of a Taliban-like "holy army" to "save Colorado from the left." MAGA has already arrested members of the Congress and the Senate. How long until they kill one of them. If Boebert stays in office for another term and retains the pulpit she uses to call for violence, we could soon find out. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Boebert is beyond vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == We can't let them shock us into submission. Now is the time to fight. Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Team Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: One of the best flip opportunities nationwide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
Friend,
California's third congressional district is one of the best flip opportunities for Democrats nationwide, and that's not an exaggeration.
Donald Trump's attempt to rig the midterm election by gerrymandering Texas has backfired as a court recently struck down Texas' new maps for being "racially gerrymandered."
While Republicans have vowed to send this case to the Supreme Court, Prop 50's maps will remain and now garner EXTRA attention from Republicans who will do everything in their power to try and keep as many seats as possible.
Friend, before Prop 50, this was already one of the closest races in California.
Polling showed Heidi leading her Republican opponent and continuing to make ground, but now, with even more eyes on this race, we can't lose any momentum.
That's why we're setting out to raise $16,221 more online before the end of the month to gather the resources we need to continue operating this campaign at a competitive level and keep up with the outside spending flooding this race.
Friend, can you chip in $15, $35, or even $50 today to help us reach our goal? We don't want to reach out over the holiday, so we're trying to get in front of this as soon as possible. Can you please chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big_]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big_]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251120_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Team Emily
subject: Epstein vote update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
| UPDATE: This week, Emily voted to release the Epstein files. She discussed the importance of seeking justice for Epstein's victims with [Zerlina Maxwell on Sirius XM.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665613/583827179/1511681198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **More _Emily's Notes_ below! ⬇️**
* * *
Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of _**Emily’s Notes**_ — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C. Here’s what I’ve been up to: **• Before I go on** – I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665623/583827244/-803653937?v=zIzxYYr0PoA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **• My four amendments** – Before the vote, I flew back to D.C. early to testify before the Rules Committee and [offer four amendments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665628/583827252/-803653937?v=zIzxYYr0PoA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) to the “deal” passed by the Senate:

1\. Reverse cuts to Medicaid passed under the Big Ugly Law.
2\. Repeal cuts to SNAP passed under the Big Ugly Law.
3\. Extend tax ACA credits so premiums don’t skyrocket.
4\. Prohibit the mass firing of federal workers through 2029. House Republicans rejected all four. • **Keeping everyone fed** — My team and I worked a shift at the [North Mason Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665633/583827257/138801785?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) in Belfair. Just like the other food banks we’ve visited in recent weeks, they’re seeing more federal workers walk through their doors — people who have never had to ask for help before. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665645/583827289/138801785?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) I visited the Multicultural Center in Tacoma, spoke with the Port Gamble S’Klallam Tribal Head Start Policy Council, and held a Resource Fair in Bremerton for federal workers and military families affected by the shutdown. Across the 6th District, communities are mobilizing to feed their neighbors and help those in need. We deserve a government that works as hard as you do!!! **• We’ll do it live** – I used every channel I could to communicate the truth about the GOP shutdown and the avoidable health care crisis. I [went Live](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665660/583827335/1302349921?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) on YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook with my colleague, Rep. Julie Johnson of Texas, and our outstanding Attorney General, Nick Brown. **• Bienvenida Adelita!** – After stalling for 50 days, Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in Adelita Grijalva, who immediately signed the discharge petition to release the Epstein files. (That story is developing quickly as I write this, so stay tuned.) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665676/583827385/-2104125169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=&emci=3332bc48-49c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7ef80d77-4bc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **Now is the part where I ask you for a donation.** I hear you. The "deal" to reopen the government was awful. You deserve so much better from your leaders. That’s why Team Emily continues to work inside AND outside Congress. Last week, I endorsed three new Democratic candidates in competitive districts. I want to do everything I can to take back the House and bring a new generation of bold, tenacious leadership to Congress. We’re able to organize because of our powerhouse team of grassroots donors – and right now, we’re well behind our fundraising benchmarks. **During the shutdown crisis, I’ve been talking to my neighbors, rather than calling donors._That’s the way it should be_ – but it also means we need our grassroots team to help close the gap.** [_**If you’re able, can you please chip in $25 or any amount to bolster our organizing efforts, or even start a monthly donation? Every time we’re down, this team comes through – thank you so much.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665695/583827432/1120488449?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.20_NovNewsletter3_Ltd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119665712/583827485/1120488449?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.20_NovNewsletter3_Ltd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MGQ3Ny00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1awbmr-_cfndDCHCGxvyrPuUlES4iJNt1cRfCYgz5Q=) Thank you for reading 💙 I’ll never stop fighting for you. – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress.
