clean_body: | UPDATE: This week, Emily voted to release the Epstein files. She discussed the importance of seeking justice for Epstein's victims with More Emily's Notes below! ⬇️ Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C. Here’s what I’ve been up to: • Before I go on – I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. • My four amendments – Before the vote, I flew back to D.C. early to testify before the Rules Committee and to the “deal” passed by the Senate: 1\. Reverse cuts to Medicaid passed under the Big Ugly Law. 2\. Repeal cuts to SNAP passed under the Big Ugly Law. 3\. Extend tax ACA credits so premiums don’t skyrocket. 4\. Prohibit the mass firing of federal workers through 2029. House Republicans rejected all four. • Keeping everyone fed — My team and I worked a shift at the in Belfair. Just like the other food banks we’ve visited in recent weeks, they’re seeing more federal workers walk through their doors — people who have never had to ask for help before. I visited the Multicultural Center in Tacoma, spoke with the Port Gamble S’Klallam Tribal Head Start Policy Council, and held a Resource Fair in Bremerton for federal workers and military families affected by the shutdown. Across the 6th District, communities are mobilizing to feed their neighbors and help those in need. We deserve a government that works as hard as you do!!! • We’ll do it live – I used every channel I could to communicate the truth about the GOP shutdown and the avoidable health care crisis. I on YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook with my colleague, Rep. Julie Johnson of Texas, and our outstanding Attorney General, Nick Brown. • Bienvenida Adelita! – After stalling for 50 days, Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in Adelita Grijalva, who immediately signed the discharge petition to release the Epstein files. (That story is developing quickly as I write this, so stay tuned.) Now is the part where I ask you for a donation. I hear you. The "deal" to reopen the government was awful. You deserve so much better from your leaders. That’s why Team Emily continues to work inside AND outside Congress. Last week, I endorsed three new Democratic candidates in competitive districts. I want to do everything I can to take back the House and bring a new generation of bold, tenacious leadership to Congress. We’re able to organize because of our powerhouse team of grassroots donors – and right now, we’re well behind our fundraising benchmarks. During the shutdown crisis, I’ve been talking to my neighbors, rather than calling donors.That’s the way it should be – but it also means we need our grassroots team to help close the gap. = = Thank you for reading 💙 I’ll never stop fighting for you. – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: The right-wing redistricting scam backfires / La estafa de redistribución de distritos electorales de la derecha fracasa 💪🏿 💪🏾 💪🏽 💪🏼
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/PNG%202023%20TOP%20Newsletter%20Header.png]
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
MAP BLOCKED:
Federal judges rule against Texas GOP's gerrymandered congressional map
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20redistricting%20fight%202025%20-%20Capitol%20Rotunda.jpg]
A federal three-judge panel in El Paso on Tuesday blocked our state's new gerrymandered congressional district map from going into effect [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/11/18/texas-redistricting-ruling-lawsuit-el-paso-court-2026-midterms/] , a big setback for Donald Trump and his twisted midterm redistricting scheme to keep Republican control in Congress.
The judge panel saw the gerrymandered map for what it truly is: A racist Trump takeover to strip Black and Latino Texans of their political power. It cannot be overstated how a sitting president called on Greg Abbott to carry out this ridiculous mid-decade redistricting [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/president-trump-pushes-controversial-redistricting-plan-in-texas-gov-greg-abbott-adds-to-special-session-agenda/] , and how our governor cowardly complied.
Politicians shouldn’t pick which voters to heed and which to silence. We the people elect our officials in this country. It’s up to us – community members, leaders, and voters – to take power back into our own hands to ensure that our elections allow the will of the people to prevail.
No matter the next court ruling, we will unapologetically keep fighting for fair representation, for our voices to be fully heard, and for a Texas that represents and works for ALL its people – regardless of age, race, faith, gender, or income.
THURSDAY:
SNAP community dinner and visioning session in San Antonio
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/People%20serving%20food.png]
Were you or loved ones impacted by the government shutdown and freeze to SNAP? If so, we want to hear from you.
Join TOP for fellowship and a FREE warm meal at TOP’s Bexar County office this Thursday, Nov. 19, as we brainstorm and share our upcoming campaign that seeks to improve the quality of life of all Texans. Bring your family and friends!
Email Damaris at dneaves@organizetexas.org [dneaves@organizetexas.org] for more dinner details and to RSVP.
FRIDAY:
Calling on Gov. Abbott to come through for Texas disaster survivors
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Fund%20Texas%20Forever%20-%20Orange.png]
It's been four months since the devastating July floods came through Central Texas, and too many families are still displaced and struggling to rebuild their homes and lives
Meanwhile, Texas has a $24 billion surplus, and Gov. Abbott has not moved a dime of that into the hands of flood survivors. Winter is coming fast, and even if we don't see another freeze like Uri in Texas this season, ALL Texans deserve a safe and warm home for the holidays.
JOIN disaster survivors from across Texas in Austin on Friday Nov. 21 at 11 a.m. for a rally calling on Gov. Abbott to deliver relief now by starting the Texas Forever Fund!
https://actionnetwork.org/forms/112125-ftf-action-in-austin [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/112125-ftf-action-in-austin]
TOP Tip: Take charge of your health this Diabetes Awareness Month
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Diabetes%20stock%20healthy%20foods.jpeg]
Approximately 3 million Texans have diagnosed diabetes — about 12% of our state's adult population. Many more are unaware they're living with diabetes, a chronic health condition that disproportionately impacts communities of color. Learn how you can take healthy steps to prevent or improve your diabetes status this November. [https://www.mayoclinic.org/diseases-conditions/type-2-diabetes/in-depth/diabetes-prevention/art-20047639]
Español
MAPA BLOQUEADO:
Jueces federales fallan en contra del mapa electoral manipulado del Partido Republicano de Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20redistricting%20fight%202025%20-%20Capitol%20Rotunda.jpg]
Un panel federal de tres jueces en El Paso bloqueó el martes la entrada en vigor del nuevo mapa electoral manipulado de distritos congresionales de nuestro estado [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/11/18/texas-redistricting-ruling-lawsuit-el-paso-court-2026-midterms/] , un duro revés para Donald Trump y su retorcido plan de redistribución de distritos para las elecciones de mitad de mandato, cuyo objetivo era mantener el control republicano en el Congreso.
El panel de jueces reconoció la verdadera naturaleza del mapa manipulado: una maniobra racista de Trump para despojar a los texanos negros y latinos de su poder político. Es innegable que un presidente en funciones instó a Greg Abbott a llevar a cabo esta ridícula redistribución de distritos a mitad de década [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/president-trump-pushes-controversial-redistricting-plan-in-texas-gov-greg-abbott-adds-to-special-session-agenda/] , y que nuestro gobernador acató la orden cobardemente.
Los políticos no deberían elegir a qué votantes escuchar y a cuáles silenciar. Nosotros, el pueblo, elegimos a nuestros representantes en este país. Depende de nosotros —miembros de la comunidad, líderes y votantes— recuperar el poder para garantizar que en nuestras elecciones prevalezca la voluntad popular.
Sin importar el próximo fallo judicial, seguiremos luchando sin reservas por una representación justa, para que nuestras voces sean escuchadas plenamente y por un Texas que represente y trabaje para TODAS sus personas, independientemente de su edad, raza, religión, género o ingresos.
JUEVES:
Cena comunitaria y sesión de planificación estratégica de SNAP
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/People%20serving%20food.png]
¿Usted o sus seres queridos se vieron afectados por el cierre del gobierno y la suspensión del programa SNAP? Si es así, queremos saber de usted.
Únase a TOP para compartir un momento agradable y disfrutar de una comida caliente GRATUITA en la oficina de TOP en el condado de Bexar este jueves 19 de noviembre. Allí compartiremos ideas y nuestra próxima campaña para mejorar la calidad de vida de todos los tejanos. ¡Traiga a su familia y amigos!
Para obtener más información sobre la cena y confirmar su asistencia, envíe un correo electrónico a Damaris a dneaves@organizetexas.org [dneaves@organizetexas.org] .
Exigimos al gobernador Abbott que ayude a los damnificados por el desastre en Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Fund%20Texas%20Forever%20-%20Orange.png]
Han pasado cuatro meses desde las devastadoras inundaciones de julio en el centro de Texas, y demasiadas familias siguen desplazadas y luchando por reconstruir sus hogares y sus vidas.
Mientras tanto, Texas tiene un superávit de 24 mil millones de dólares, y el gobernador Abbott no ha destinado ni un centavo a los damnificados por las inundaciones. El invierno se acerca rápidamente, e incluso si no se repite una ola de frío como la de Uri en Texas esta temporada, todos los texanos merecen un hogar seguro y cálido para las fiestas.
Únete a los damnificados de todo Texas en Austin el viernes 21 de noviembre a las 11 a.m. para una manifestación que exigirá al gobernador Abbott que brinde ayuda de inmediato mediante la creación del Fondo Texas Forever.
https://actionnetwork.org/forms/112125-ftf-action-in-austin [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/112125-ftf-action-in-austin]
Consejos de TOP: Cuida tu salud este mes de concientización sobre la diabetes
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Diabetes%20stock%20healthy%20foods.jpeg]
Aproximadamente 3 millones de tejanos tienen diabetes diagnosticada, lo que representa cerca del 12% de la población adulta del estado. Muchos más desconocen que viven con diabetes, una enfermedad crónica que afecta de manera desproporcionada a las comunidades de color. Aprenda cómo puede tomar medidas saludables para prevenir o mejorar su condición de diabético este noviembre. [https://www.mayoclinic.org/diseases-conditions/type-2-diabetes/in-depth/diabetes-prevention/art-20047639]

San Antonio, TX 78207

Abbott has not moved a dime of that into the hands of flood survivors. Winter is coming fast, and even if we don't see another freeze like Uri in Texas this season, ALL Texans deserve a safe and warm home for the holidays. JOIN disaster survivors from across Texas in Austin on Friday Nov. 21 at 11 a.m. for a rally calling on Gov. Abbott to deliver relief now by starting the Texas Forever Fund! [] TOP Tip: Take charge of your health this Diabetes Awareness Month [] Approximately 3 million Texans have diagnosed diabetes — about 12% of our state's adult population. Many more are unaware they're living with diabetes, a chronic health condition that disproportionately impacts communities of color. Learn how you can take healthy steps to prevent or improve your diabetes status this November. [] Español MAPA BLOQUEADO: Jueces federales fallan en contra del mapa electoral manipulado del Partido Republicano de Texas [] Un panel federal de tres jueces en El Paso bloqueó el martes la entrada en vigor del nuevo mapa electoral manipulado de distritos congresionales de nuestro estado [] , un duro revés para Donald Trump y su retorcido plan de redistribución de distritos para las elecciones de mitad de mandato, cuyo objetivo era mantener el control republicano en el Congreso. El panel de jueces reconoció la verdadera naturaleza del mapa manipulado: una maniobra racista de Trump para despojar a los texanos negros y latinos de su poder político. Es innegable que un presidente en funciones instó a Greg Abbott a llevar a cabo esta ridícula redistribución de distritos a mitad de década [] , y que nuestro gobernador acató la orden cobardemente. Los políticos no deberían elegir a qué votantes escuchar y a cuáles silenciar. Nosotros, el pueblo, elegimos a nuestros representantes en este país. Depende de nosotros —miembros de la comunidad, líderes y votantes— recuperar el poder para garantizar que en nuestras elecciones prevalezca la voluntad popular. Sin importar el próximo fallo judicial, seguiremos luchando sin reservas por una representación justa, para que nuestras voces sean escuchadas plenamente y por un Texas que represente y trabaje para TODAS sus personas, independientemente de su edad, raza, religión, género o ingresos. JUEVES: Cena comunitaria y sesión de planificación estratégica de SNAP [] ¿Usted o sus seres queridos se vieron afectados por el cierre del gobierno y la suspensión del programa SNAP? Si es así, queremos saber de usted. Únase a TOP para compartir un momento agradable y disfrutar de una comida caliente GRATUITA en la oficina de TOP en el condado de Bexar este jueves 19 de noviembre. Allí compartiremos ideas y nuestra próxima campaña para mejorar la calidad de vida de todos los tejanos. ¡Traiga a su familia y amigos! Para obtener más información sobre la cena y confirmar su asistencia, envíe un correo electrónico a Damaris a dneaves@organizetexas.org [dneaves@organizetexas.org] . Exigimos al gobernador Abbott que ayude a los damnificados por el desastre en Texas [] Han pasado cuatro meses desde las devastadoras inundaciones de julio en el centro de Texas, y demasiadas familias siguen desplazadas y luchando por reconstruir sus hogares y sus vidas. Mientras tanto, Texas tiene un superávit de 24 mil millones de dólares, y el gobernador Abbott no ha destinado ni un centavo a los damnificados por las inundaciones. El invierno se acerca rápidamente, e incluso si no se repite una ola de frío como la de Uri en Texas esta temporada, todos los texanos merecen un hogar seguro y cálido para las fiestas. Únete a los damnificados de todo Texas en Austin el viernes 21 de noviembre a las 11 a.m. para una manifestación que exigirá al gobernador Abbott que brinde ayuda de inmediato mediante la creación del Fondo Texas Forever. [] Consejos de TOP: Cuida tu salud este mes de concientización sobre la diabetes [] Aproximadamente 3 millones de tejanos tienen diabetes diagnosticada, lo que representa cerca del 12% de la población adulta del estado. Muchos más desconocen que viven con diabetes, una enfermedad crónica que afecta de manera desproporcionada a las comunidades de color. Aprenda cómo puede tomar medidas saludables para prevenir o mejorar su condición de diabético este noviembre. [] Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved. Texas Organizing Project 700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212 San Antonio, TX 78207 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

_**Nancy has a plan to put Alaska on the path to prosperity for generations to come!**_ **Strengthening our economic future** means providing certainty for entrepreneurs, Alaska's economic backbone. That means stable taxes, clear rules, workforce development, and a government that doesn’t get in the way of great jobs in the industries Alaska does best. We can't expect Alaskans to raise their families right here at home without **access to top-notch education** , regardless of zip code. We must put parents in charge, hold schools accountable while supporting teachers, and ensure that education serves as a springboard rather than a barrier. **Alaskans deserve to be confident in our elections**. That means full transparency, safeguarding every vote, and ensuring Alaskans that their voices are heard, loud and clear. And of course, protecting Alaska's promise means **honoring our veterans with support beyond words** \- fully funding veterans programs and expanding access to healthcare, job training, and mental health resources for the over 10% of Alaskans who have served. [_**To make Nancy's vision a reality, we hope you'll show your support with a small buy-in of just $1, $3, or maybe $5 today.**_](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=4da4b25ee7214fde8693ec7087120bde&_e=SWhabfibrNigKdbM4lXCNZWU0CSZvLIXupk9ZqPB7_o7aJqf6NuX2TN072LWTaWsvhVE5ooboC-Leg68BfC0giPqJUYRQuXhAhy4tQP6jJPrPa_UOhvxAhbLTPTGthCWtnBWnl33uBX4efT_-ea5eGhArOAQRMusgL5HJWePlEzEFPvWIEXbCjySPR4yurFbqGVurtXHUWKbHjecQcjnK3K1qRiwRs94qaURkV-IBkImqu63ef8cVjjh92KhXWVDoAKb2c_4fz1YlpPCwXerQHZR27UgACad31l02fSLLOoDuJoNJiGkwLrqwNU53WApDuS2pTBM34fBnbxTNbUZxFn3rwVQGCAnmmRTEsnqtRa40-QxqNSWcVTWyBYPQYvTLFjLE4ObqGF9nVokjBZSLbQCm1Lnj_oHwKyj1sQ3HBJF9J5Q25RjUQxXseXAmEgOjcM8qrqZa4Eg8XXlPvTsN2-jOFIoOCFyt-rBtEWdWGQgj7lWvPxityJdRKleGE0xHABOF_2-cELFyQJqk5M3HYJK0iHJq7O80jflPBrG5v5POhmOkSntvIdqtTB0dW8TJuCzHZE3LqNoHi9OTY6t5qCcv-oLoZqVcnXlcZ_BdSOSgN6g0cpiF-zYseBLPXdx7xAjBNFOEklwbK49uFlFpQ%3D%3D) This campaign isn't about headlines. subject: I cannot get over this

body:
| | The shutdown might be over, but there is one fact that I cannot get past: **Republicans were more than willing to use hungry children as political pawns.** It is unconscionable, and it should be clear to the American people that Republicans do not give a damn about them. Meanwhile, I have a proven record over multiple Congresses of fighting to keep people fed. While Democrats fought to keep people fed, Republicans stalled, cancelled votes, filed appeals, and did whatever they could to change the subject. _That is not leadership._ **[That is _exactly_ why we have to fight for a Democratic House majority. |

Peter,
Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow, appeared in a video urging military members to disobey illegal and unconstitutional orders.
In response Trump took to Truth Social and stated that they "were guilty of 'SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!'"

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ktpHVVXcGrcQPoFTpKLvis0x6xH2xL9kN8_DU2reifVnxpWMBgtP9APQG_pgrhjTcyoDw3Z670FfGAeW-9mG3pKRTjj3ISicijNBQpi0JRpaaPg2ukwWaecA-uvQ3J0YaElqBYbTAYL1CNB_wfndyzZHwVRSp8NMqbMav8ZOWFe97DvNQl9hLztqYvOemAJahXLVTjDu-3bl1IrcPibZcmwZZ3xErJY-&c=RB2hh5CK7jPSgX5ayMInKFYJkNM9ZLXeiynltYkoEUcFUy0jN024SQ==&ch=mLKwZuzWZl6YgKZEVaXMplbN6GZ3k6aJsUTCjgdKASAUDrYybQhSYA==)
---

Less than an hour after Trump's call to execute these Democrats, it was announced that the Coast Guard, which operates under the Department of Homeland Security, would no longer classify the swastika as a hate symbol.
Besides Trump, responsibility for this dark moment rests with Lauren Boebert.
She once tweeted "I am the militia," vowed to bring a gun to work in Congress, lead insurrectionists on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to January 6th and during the Capitol riot she tweeted the location of the US Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob.
She supports the notion that MAGA has a divine right for fascist rule and last year she called for the creation of a Taliban-like "holy army" to "save Colorado from the left."
MAGA has already arrested members of the Congress and the Senate. How long until they kill one of them. If Boebert stays in office for another term and retains the pulpit she uses to call for violence, we could soon find out.
Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Boebert is beyond vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job.
[We have a narrow window to stop Boebert and MAGA before they can usher in their darkest fantasies like executing Democratic members of Congress. Please can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help Trisha beat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ktpHVVXcGrcQPoFTpKLvis0x6xH2xL9kN8_DU2reifVnxpWMBgtP9APQG_pgrhjTXivhfQ5830Ku6OvqseQXEkWX_2Sm1KkbfmVq03sbjiwHeKNqeeI6ztX8EmdOieEZAATojXfe-lDDNbVlC-ZSMQ1BznoJi60-eqibZkj63VVm7nvvCiE5HdlftLvs52aCwHHEKLCin0ghCQ9FhCCOaKY7xBdbCrWik7_GaefKGiM=&c=RB2hh5CK7jPSgX5ayMInKFYJkNM9ZLXeiynltYkoEUcFUy0jN024SQ==&ch=mLKwZuzWZl6YgKZEVaXMplbN6GZ3k6aJsUTCjgdKASAUDrYybQhSYA==)

clean_body: Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow. | | | | | == | Peter, Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow, appeared in a video urging military members to disobey illegal and unconstitutional orders. In response Trump took to Truth Social and stated that they "were guilty of 'SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!'" | == Less than an hour after Trump's call to execute these Democrats, it was announced that the Coast Guard, which operates under the Department of Homeland Security, would no longer classify the swastika as a hate symbol. Besides Trump, responsibility for this dark moment rests with Lauren Boebert. She once tweeted "I am the militia," vowed to bring a gun to work in Congress, lead insurrectionists on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to January 6th and during the Capitol riot she tweeted the location of the US Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob. She supports the notion that MAGA has a divine right for fascist rule and last year she called for the creation of a Taliban-like "holy army" to "save Colorado from the left." MAGA has already arrested members of the Congress and the Senate. How long until they kill one of them. If Boebert stays in office for another term and retains the pulpit she uses to call for violence, we could soon find out. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Boebert is beyond vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == We can't let them shock us into submission. subject: Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest. He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress. Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law. I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me. [_**If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between Andrea Salinas and me →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119667066/583831327/1453913839?refcode=email_112025_deluzio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmQ3ZDZlNy00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bmZseIcieS0hg62_BFZaFO1gj6bGnG5aMYwRluhC6yw=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119667067/583831328/1453913839?refcode=email_112025_deluzio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmQ3ZDZlNy00YmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bmZseIcieS0hg62_BFZaFO1gj6bGnG5aMYwRluhC6yw=)

I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress.
That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.
So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath.
[_**I believe in our country and our Constitution. name: Team Bohannan
subject: Mariannette Miller-Meeks wants to control your body
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119667263/583831837/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWFiYzE3Ni00Y2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MA9YysORr9PbhY1ZQ5jAoVVsMRVpYGC8we8fFFsgjT4=)

Peter, last year, Iowa's anti-abortion "fetal heartbeat" law went into effect.

Now, the data shows us that the number of abortions performed in Iowa decreased by 36% in 2024 after the law was enacted. Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her buddies count this as a win. It’s not.

**As an engineer and law professor, Christina likes to do her research and look beyond the numbers.** In the wake of the heartbeat bill, thousands of Iowans have been forced to seek care in other states or carry unplanned pregnancies to term in difficult situations.

**The reality of abortion bans is that they don't stop abortion, they just make it more difficult for people to access care they desperately need.** In 2024, the number of Iowans traveling to other states for care rose by 182%, and doctors across the state report legal issues helping patients who need abortions in the wake of dangerous pregnancy complications.

Over and over again, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has loudly cheered against her constituents' reproductive freedoms. From co-sponsoring a national total abortion ban without exceptions to voting to ensure the Iowa State constitution does not protect abortion — her dangerous record speaks for itself.

**[No one should have to look elsewhere for reproductive healthcare. Iowa should be a place where people can get the care they need, but Mariannette Miller-Meeks has made that impossible. Add your name today to demand she back off our bodies and protect abortion care in Iowa>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119667264/583831838/-1699294115?ms=em25_251120_Aborti_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_251120_Aborti_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_251120_Aborti_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251120_Aborti_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zEFdtbSfmzA8T5C7NZxs5qskV7YNAQPm3Os+u+3+BZBhnxIO32f2Q8RYcqJhfPkpfk3pWcooMRE16rpCdMHk4t3a1eGvkNapeP9XAiYmloYVYjWOrANLsC/l5crXUmXWjUIpP0N1kwRSbAuPLbdRu3h/0x1ACY4P4tfF8EjSzUk=&refcode2=2eabc176-4cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWFiYzE3Ni00Y2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MA9YysORr9PbhY1ZQ5jAoVVsMRVpYGC8we8fFFsgjT4=&emci=5abff3cc-2dc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2eabc176-4cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891890)**

clean_body: | = Peter, last year, Iowa's anti-abortion "fetal heartbeat" law went into effect. Now, the data shows us that the number of abortions performed in Iowa decreased by 36% in 2024 after the law was enacted. Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her buddies count this as a win. It’s not. As an engineer and law professor, Christina likes to do her research and look beyond the numbers. In the wake of the heartbeat bill, thousands of Iowans have been forced to seek care in other states or carry unplanned pregnancies to term in difficult situations. The reality of abortion bans is that they don't stop abortion, they just make it more difficult for people to access care they desperately need. In 2024, the number of Iowans traveling to other states for care rose by 182%, and doctors across the state report legal issues helping patients who need abortions in the wake of dangerous pregnancy complications. Over and over again, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has loudly cheered against her constituents' reproductive freedoms. From co-sponsoring a national total abortion ban without exceptions to voting to ensure the Iowa State constitution does not protect abortion — her dangerous record speaks for itself. Thank you, Team Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Think about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251120-831&t=1&akid=834%2E294397%2Eh5ByKU)
Team,
Judicial elections don’t always dominate the headlines, but they shape our daily lives in ways few other races do. Let us explain how:
The court decides whether our state legislative maps are fair, shaping the future of our elections for years to come.
It also rules on cases involving public safety, workers’ rights, and reproductive healthcare. This summer, the Wisconsin Supreme Court struck down an abortion ban from the 1800s.
The bottom line — the Wisconsin Supreme Court isn’t abstract or far away.
**Its rulings determine whether people have a real voice in government, whether people can make their own healthcare decisions, and whether our laws protect working people across the state.**
That’s why we need Judge Chris Taylor on the bench. She’s a trusted leader who has spent her career standing up for fairness, protecting rights, and ensuring everyone is treated equally under the law.
[**Can you chip in $10 today to help elect Judge Chris Taylor to the Wisconsin Supreme Court?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251120_1_ak.GZ69S7&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-831&t=3&akid=834%2E294397%2Eh5ByKU)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251120_1_ak.GZ69S7&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-831&t=22&akid=834%2E294397%2Eh5ByKU)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251120-831&t=23&refcode2=834_294397_h5ByKU&akid=834%2E294397%2Eh5ByKU)**

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Let’s turn hope into action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
“I’m starting to feel some hope again.”
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119668129/583834423/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ0MWQ0MS00ZmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oh2fso73YHfqHWo2A280HWPm9drY2nopmq07hKfmEU8=)
Hi, it’s Robert Garcia. I know fundraising emails often use doom and gloom tactics to try to convince you to make a donation. But I’m here to share a different message:
**_I’m starting to feel some hope again because I can see that a better country and world are possible._**
I’m feeling it because of the people stepping up, speaking out, organizing, and refusing to accept that this is as good as it gets. I’m feeling it because every day, more Americans are demanding a government that works for all of us — not just the wealthy and powerful.
And I’m feeling it because of supporters like you, who haven’t given up on the idea that we can build something better together.
But hope alone isn’t enough. We have to turn it into power — legislative, political, and grassroots.
**Right now, I’m in the middle of some of the toughest fights of my career: for transparency, for truth, for democracy, for working people, and for a country where corruption doesn’t get the final word.**
These fights require resources. They require organizing. They require a movement.
**[So if you feel even a little bit of that same hope — if you believe we can create the country we deserve — I’m asking you to step up today: Will you make a grassroots donation to help power this work and keep building the America we all know is possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119668130/583834424/789508428?refcode=251120_RG_hope&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ0MWQ0MS00ZmM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oh2fso73YHfqHWo2A280HWPm9drY2nopmq07hKfmEU8=)**

Every contribution, no matter the amount, helps strengthen the coalition we need to win the fights ahead.
Let's keep going — and let's build something better, together.
With gratitude,
Robert

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Don’t listen to the bullsh*t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a597854-3aa7-4992-9819-7c666afda68d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, it’s Mallory McMorrow. In 2018, I put my name on a ballot to challenge my State Senator, the Republican incumbent who had won his last race by 16 points. When I told some of my local Democratic party leadership that I wanted to challenge him, they said, “Oh honey, that’s cute. You don’t have a chance.” But when all the votes were counted on election night, I beat that guy by 4 points. Here’s the lesson: If anyone ever tells you an area is too red, or not worth fighting for: That’s bullshit. We can organize anywhere. We can flip red seats. We can even flip entire chambers. It won’t be easy, but I am more than willing to put in the hard work. Are you with me? [If you share my vision for Michigan, I’d appreciate it if you could make a $10 donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate and Blue Amp Action.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71ee402c-d6ec-4964-a747-9205a1e4d544/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7329b6b0-2d5f-462c-8554-4e360bec1643/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T455f3caf-848c-4ac9-a340-5b79f0e3e2b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0f3b49b-1c3d-4d7f-8471-d7aad12e3cf8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Don’t listen to the bullshit, Peter. We are all worth fighting for. And together, we can win this thing. Yours, Mallory [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda31de6c-ae0a-40ae-a735-2c2868f744ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7b7e2b3-bc5a-45f8-a0bb-981bb739da32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Georgia Young
subject: Your DAF gift today can help forests thrive, learn how.
body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
https://www.savetheredwoods.org/donate/donate-stock/ [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/donate/donate-stock/]
Dear Peter,
As we head toward the end of the year, we wanted to remind you about an additional way you can make a meaningful difference for redwood forests: Use your donor-advised fund to bolster the Redwood Resilience Fund. [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/donate/donate-stock/]
We offer many ways to give because every donor’s situation and preferences are unique. Whether you choose a one-time gift, monthly donation, donor-advised fund, or options like stock gifts and legacy giving, each method supports our work to revive the range. Flexibility makes it easier for you to create impact today and for generations to come.GIVE NOW [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/donate/donate-stock/]
In times of uncertainty, Save the Redwoods League is investing in healthier forests and stronger communities knowing that together, we can weather any storm.
Your generous DAF gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund helps the League to:
1) Restore redwood and giant sequoia groves facing megafires and drought
2) Strengthen communities, protect wildlife, and expand access to natural spaces
3) Boost climate resilience by safeguarding carbon-storing old-growth redwoods
That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million for the Redwood Resilience Fund before year-end. Your gift will be matched by an anonymous family with deep ties to the League.
Recommend a DAF Gift to the League now. [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/donate/donate-stock/]
There are many ways to give to the redwoods. Check with your employer to see if they’ll match your donation and double your impact—many do! Explore all the ways to give [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/donate/all-the-ways-to-give/] .
Thank you for standing with us as we work to protect life-sustaining redwood forests today and for generations to come.
Photo of Georgia Young [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Georgia-Young%201.png] With gratitude,
Georgia Young
Director of Development
Save the Redwoods League
Help restore and protect the redwoods

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/20/2025
body:
Griswold Leads Democratic Secretaries of State Pressing DOJ and DHS Over Federal Use of Voter Data
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado grappled with financial strain and safety concerns this week: Denver police requested an [$11 million overtime bailout](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), state ethics officials opened probes into [17 Democrats over a Vail retreat](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and new footage showed [suspects in a stolen shuttle bus](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) nearly hitting first responders on I-70. Advocates sounded alarms over [Medicaid cuts tied to a $1.2 billion shortfall](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Secretary of State Jena Griswold [challenged federal demands for full voter-roll data](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) amid fears of privacy breaches and past non-citizen registration errors.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Newly surfaced posts from the man who attempted to assassinate Donald Trump raised fresh questions about how the FBI missed years of violent rhetoric, with the White House acknowledging [Americans still “deserve answers.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Meanwhile, six Democratic lawmakers released a video [urging troops to “refuse illegal orders,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) an unmistakable shot at Trump’s incoming agenda and a sign of deepening partisan tension over the military.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Commentary writers blasted the media’s [handling of the Epstein scandal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), argued the Sierra Club’s [pivot to social activism](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) has hollowed out its mission, and condemned CU Denver’s Gaza panel as an ideologically loaded event that mocked dissent, silenced recording, and [openly celebrated pro-Hamas slogans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 20, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Griswold Leads Democratic Secretaries of State Pressing DOJ and DHS Over Federal Use of Voter Data](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold is leading a group of Democratic election officials challenging the Trump administration over how federal agencies are using requested voter roll data. Their concerns are detailed in a four-page letter to Attorney General Pam Bondi and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem.
The U.S. Department of Justice issued requests earlier this year for state-wide voter registration lists from multiple states, including Colorado.
In several cases, DOJ asked for “the full, unredacted statewide voter registration list, including registrants’ dates of birth, state driver’s license numbers, and last four digits of Social Security numbers.” Colorado’s request is documented in a May 12 letter from DOJ’s Civil Rights Division, which cites 52 U.S.C. § 20701 and orders the state to produce records and internal policies within 14 days.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[CU Denver Puts Its Pro-Hamas Hate on Full Display](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY AHNAF KALAM, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **CU Denver panel exposes ideological bias:** A Gaza event advertised as a balanced discussion instead featured three anti-Israel speakers against one Israeli professor, whose attempts to present October 7 evidence were mocked and heckled by students, faculty, and fellow panelists.
* **Campus culture suppresses dissent and truth-seeking:** Recording was aggressively prohibited, false historical claims went unchallenged, and critics of Hamas were shouted down—showcasing an academic environment that tolerates misinformation while silencing opposing viewpoints.
* **Pro-Hamas sentiment on full display:** The event ended with a student shouting “Long live the Intifada,” which the author argues reflects a campus culture that normalizes extremist rhetoric while vilifying Israeli perspectives and avoiding accountability for ideological bias.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[The Press Has Become the Enemy of Truth and The Epstein Pattern Proves It](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Writer argues the modern press has abandoned truth:** The commentary claims today’s media no longer exposes corruption but “manages” it, using the Epstein scandal as proof that coverage shifts depending on whose political interests are at stake.
* **Epstein case used as a political weapon, not a pursuit of justice:** The author says the press amplifies accusations only when they damage opponents, but goes silent when revelations threaten powerful allies—calling this pattern “information laundering.”
* **Lack of transparency reveals institutional rot:** With major questions about Epstein’s network still unanswered, the writer argues journalism is “dead” because media outlets refuse to demand full disclosure, fearing truths that implicate the wrong people.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Trump said release the Epstein files—now Congress agrees**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 18** _Congress finally did what Washington avoided for years. The House went 423 to 1 and the Senate—unanimously. Washington doesn’t move like that unless people feel something shifting under their feet. Whatever held this shut is starting to give way._
__
[**TPUSA approval sparks chaos at Fort Lewis College: Assault reported after professor emeritus erupts**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 18** _Fort Lewis College in Durango erupted into chaos on November 7th after the Associated Students of Fort Lewis College (ASFLC) reversed an earlier decision and voted to approve a Turning Point USA (TPUSA) chapter on campus. What began as a routine appeal meeting ended with a reported assault, shouting, and a professor emeritus’s profanity-filled outburst—all recorded on video that has since gone viral._
__
[**Colorado’s auto theft reckoning: A crisis we built, a crisis we can fix**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 17** _Colorado didn’t become the nation’s auto theft capital by accident. It got there through a decade of choices that treated working families’ cars like disposable assets. Lawmakers downgraded the theft of “low-value” vehicles to a low-level offense and sold it as reform. They never explained the part where families would carry the cost._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
**🖋️ DID YOU KNOW?** The Declaration of Independence was **signed in Philadelphia**.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "A nation of well-informed men who have been taught to know and prize the rights which God has given them cannot be enslaved. It is in the region of ignorance that tyranny begins." – Benjamin Franklin

Colorado grappled with financial strain and safety concerns this week: Denver police requested an , state ethics officials opened probes into , and new footage showed nearly hitting first responders on I-70. Advocates sounded alarms over , while Secretary of State Jena Griswold amid fears of privacy breaches and past non-citizen registration errors. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... Newly surfaced posts from the man who attempted to assassinate Donald Trump raised fresh questions about how the FBI missed years of violent rhetoric, with the White House acknowledging Meanwhile, six Democratic lawmakers released a video an unmistakable shot at Trump’s incoming agenda and a sign of deepening partisan tension over the military. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... Commentary writers blasted the media’s , argued the Sierra Club’s has hollowed out its mission, and condemned CU Denver’s Gaza panel as an ideologically loaded event that mocked dissent, silenced recording, and . This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 20, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY SHAINA COLE, Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold is leading a group of Democratic election officials challenging the Trump administration over how federal agencies are using requested voter roll data. Their concerns are detailed in a four-page letter to Attorney General Pam Bondi and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem. The U.S. Department of Justice issued requests earlier this year for state-wide voter registration lists from multiple states, including Colorado. In several cases, DOJ asked for “the full, unredacted statewide voter registration list, including registrants’ dates of birth, state driver’s license numbers, and last four digits of Social Security numbers.” Colorado’s request is documented in a May 12 letter from DOJ’s Civil Rights Division, which cites 52 U.S.C. § 20701 and orders the state to produce records and internal policies within 14 days. | BY AHNAF KALAM, CU Denver panel exposes ideological bias: A Gaza event advertised as a balanced discussion instead featured three anti-Israel speakers against one Israeli professor, whose attempts to present October 7 evidence were mocked and heckled by students, faculty, and fellow panelists. Campus culture suppresses dissent and truth-seeking: Recording was aggressively prohibited, false historical claims went unchallenged, and critics of Hamas were shouted down—showcasing an academic environment that tolerates misinformation while silencing opposing viewpoints. Pro-Hamas sentiment on full display: The event ended with a student shouting “Long live the Intifada,” which the author argues reflects a campus culture that normalizes extremist rhetoric while vilifying Israeli perspectives and avoiding accountability for ideological bias. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | BY C. J. GARBO, Writer argues the modern press has abandoned truth: The commentary claims today’s media no longer exposes corruption but “manages” it, using the Epstein scandal as proof that coverage shifts depending on whose political interests are at stake. Epstein case used as a political weapon, not a pursuit of justice: The author says the press amplifies accusations only when they damage opponents, but goes silent when revelations threaten powerful allies—calling this pattern “information laundering.” Lack of transparency reveals institutional rot: With major questions about Epstein’s network still unanswered, the writer argues journalism is “dead” because media outlets refuse to demand full disclosure, fearing truths that implicate the wrong people. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 18 Congress finally did what Washington avoided for years. The House went 423 to 1 and the Senate—unanimously. Washington doesn’t move like that unless people feel something shifting under their feet. Whatever held this shut is starting to give way. BY SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 18 Fort Lewis College in Durango erupted into chaos on November 7th after the Associated Students of Fort Lewis College (ASFLC) reversed an earlier decision and voted to approve a Turning Point USA (TPUSA) chapter on campus. What began as a routine appeal meeting ended with a reported assault, shouting, and a professor emeritus’s profanity-filled outburst—all recorded on video that has since gone viral. RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 17 Colorado didn’t become the nation’s auto theft capital by accident. It got there through a decade of choices that treated working families’ cars like disposable assets. Lawmakers downgraded the theft of “low-value” vehicles to a low-level offense and sold it as reform. They never explained the part where families would carry the cost. __ Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share? Email submit@rockymountainvoice.com. | | 🖋️ DID YOU KNOW? The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "A nation of well-informed men who have been taught to know and prize the rights which God has given them cannot be enslaved. It is in the region of ignorance that tyranny begins." – Benjamin Franklin | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. | Peter,

Finally, one chamber of Congress is showing some backbone on tariffs and standing up to Trump.

The Senate voted to terminate Trump’s reckless tariffs on Brazilian imports. These tariffs have hurt American workers, farmers, and families, while damaging our economy.

Here in the House? Speaker Mike Johnson is blocking us from even holding a vote.

I introduced an amendment to last week’s government funding bill to repeal Trump’s tariffs that are driving up the price of everyday goods, but House Republicans refused to even bring it up for debate.

Our economy can’t wait while the House hides behind partisan rules. It’s time to end Speaker Johnson’s blockade and get back to work delivering for the American people.

name: Derek Tran
subject: The American Dream
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119669073/583837328/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZkYWUzYWMtNTFjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h0D_EWiLO0PXW5KTo1v0eMMfmKCIJWYtItSgi0hf4zs=)
**[This is a longer message about how the promises of this country changed my life. I hope you’ll take the time to read it the whole way through, but if you’re short on time, please consider chipping in $3 to keep me in Congress fighting for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119669074/583837329/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZkYWUzYWMtNTFjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h0D_EWiLO0PXW5KTo1v0eMMfmKCIJWYtItSgi0hf4zs=)**
| **[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119669075/583837330/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZkYWUzYWMtNTFjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h0D_EWiLO0PXW5KTo1v0eMMfmKCIJWYtItSgi0hf4zs=)**
---

For my parents, the American Dream was everything -- fleeing war-torn Vietnam to give me and my siblings a better shot, they arrived in this country with nothing but hope.

They worked tirelessly and opened a corner store where I grew up stocking the shelves and behind the cash register learning the value of hard work. Through their sacrifice, my parents built a life for me and my siblings.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119669076/583837331/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZkYWUzYWMtNTFjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h0D_EWiLO0PXW5KTo1v0eMMfmKCIJWYtItSgi0hf4zs=)
_My mom at our corner store._
Today, that dream is out of reach for so many working families across Southern California -- despite people working hard, saving money, and having multiple jobs to make ends meet.

This reality is unacceptable to me. **Without the American Dream, my parents couldn’t have opened their small business and have a son serving in Congress. That’s why I’ve always been a fighter for working families.**

We’re losing the very fabric of what made our country great -- our welcoming spirit, commitment to hope, and the belief that if you work hard, you can achieve your goals.

It’s made worse by the chaos of the government shutdown and the broken promises from this administration and House Republicans on tackling the cost of living and healthcare crises.

**[I’m working hard in Congress to make the American Dream a reality, but in all honesty, change will only come with a Democratic majority to hold the GOP accountable. Will you stand with me by donating $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119669077/583837332/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZkYWUzYWMtNTFjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h0D_EWiLO0PXW5KTo1v0eMMfmKCIJWYtItSgi0hf4zs=)**

clean_body: | = = | = For my parents, the American Dream was everything -- fleeing war-torn Vietnam to give me and my siblings a better shot, they arrived in this country with nothing but hope. They worked tirelessly and opened a corner store where I grew up stocking the shelves and behind the cash register learning the value of hard work. Through their sacrifice, my parents built a life for me and my siblings. = My mom at our corner store. Today, that dream is out of reach for so many working families across Southern California -- despite people working hard, saving money, and having multiple jobs to make ends meet. This reality is unacceptable to me. Without the American Dream, my parents couldn’t have opened their small business and have a son serving in Congress. That’s why I’ve always been a fighter for working families. We’re losing the very fabric of what made our country great -- our welcoming spirit, commitment to hope, and the belief that if you work hard, you can achieve your goals. It’s made worse by the chaos of the government shutdown and the broken promises from this administration and House Republicans on tackling the cost of living and healthcare crises. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: New priorities survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
My team put together a new survey so you can share your thoughts and concerns with me.
| | |
---
Friend,
Health care premiums for many are about to double, even triple. Tariffs are causing the price of everything to skyrocket. And electric bills are through the roof.
Meanwhile, Trump’s White House is building a $300 million ballroom and his cabinet is spending taxpayer money on hundred-million-dollar jets.
The split screen is baffling – and frankly, it’s unconscionable. Billionaires are busy making a fortune, while everyday folks are struggling just to make ends meet.
**I refuse to accept this, and it’s clear that Georgians and Americans across the country refuse to accept this too. That’s why Democrats won decisive victories in key races right here in Georgia and throughout the country earlier this month. Now, I’m using every tool at my disposal to push back against Trump and the GOP’s dangerous agenda in the Senate. But to fight for you and your family as best as I can, I need to hear your latest thoughts directly.**
**[My team put together a new priorities survey so you can share your thoughts and concerns with me, and I’m counting on your response. Will you take a quick moment to let me know what’s top of mind for you right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119669210/583837810/475082512?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5638-su-nd&refcode=jtk5638-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzUyNGVjOC01MWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5Fgxd0S4gCZHlCWOW5vjaXrkFXlI-UTk52DGm-kq8A=&emci=b30ba2f8-66c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ec524ec8-51c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**

Sincerely,

Rev. Raphael Warnock

The idea that a sitting member of Congress would lend her name and face to a video telling troops they can pick and choose which orders they’ll follow is outrageous. It’s reckless, and it undermines military discipline.”

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: It’s Trans Day of Remembrance. Add your name to fight for equity and protect our trans neighbors:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Stand up for our trans neighbors in this time of crisis. Sign to demand Congress pass federal protections for trans people. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWe_kHyw4Ay15ldPrXT5z-U96YMH751tQg77Hvw-bz1kyCD6e76U4U-So8xwv6CPgLtioPw_ekuptta8FE-cPJ78vf2qwrY5e5jwnZ5BVmikKOtqYrHlrqgC0vvypsttciy5zAC_ZSu0n62uBdB0mYGcLvJmKImgEmKcsYqbF32TxX__NUwzQI0-uxNvpA-Q_UNGlLCDDGfVoXAE70Qt6GTbzi8ISHFy23KbcC6c36931SQAXLHqTnIOkBOQboudzxTHoRMrGUUHf3khyCZrfxEqKTK1lJlLXK-VzGeQl-ZJERP5hyfC7s5axY7Ze6jLicDjvIf3kh1nfN-ShREGzfQQ/4lr/aEeKrPSXRzKB-wcSapkvYg/h0/h001.CdjxHBYhQFGZ4f4hdUEP38ok6MBnMFVLdy3yWz6V0IQ)
---
Friend, Today is Transgender Day of Remembrance. Each year, people around the world mark this day by honoring the trans people who’ve lost their lives to violence in the previous year. In my community, we remember Tahiry Broom of Southfield and Karmin Wells of Detroit who were murdered simply for living authentically. **As trans people have fought for their rights and secured more widespread acceptance, a dangerous backlash has been growing.** Political leaders are dehumanizing trans people and debating their very existence, leading to a rise in anti-trans hate crimes.**** Trump and MAGA Republicans are targeting trans people, including by taking away trans people’s access to medically necessary gender-affirming care. The time is now to speak up: Trans people have always been here, and trans people belong here. **We must protect our trans neighbors’ rights** and demand a world where all people can live safely as their true selves. [**Will you stand up for our trans neighbors in this time of crisis? Please sign our petition to demand Congress pass federal protections for trans people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Wh3eyFHawWhdjVFjduwP6dY-9MmEa--4KtUfBl3FUPJpCj0Dsf6zA6LdKVr9OHWGsuu8pMIAW4YyRHb077gaAgIjg4HXANAIx2U4CPQu6n5urzMoBSTUr_Lxtnt3PLJLexRSRqXfiUoXzfg4Vbn0JJ8WJlxM4ykY3m9o1Y-dlCNw-fYAbbcREjPBgyP31WVgjmU5dw62fpne-svoe8-4NWYG1xlafiDs3Typ0ocYgScEYrPsD1_g8e69MtMJ30OvPjO_5d6HKfAhnP3e_505JPenocJU8GjuBpLhwuppHWILTKsqpD3OqOFceidTKzwscLirES3pppsIEY5e9LvE170vg4IyBmB-ab6_0dw_4KNSqfR8Y7xDdan1NZzUs_mc-2zzBVsVyPqQtjtXVSjqJCVkNlR1vPeP6LOEAkCoZISbuEJzyaExhAtEZTlPBdg0/4lr/aEeKrPSXRzKB-wcSapkvYg/h1/h001.XuaV4UF5_1NL77yxlxfM2CQ2IaJdLbYn8qvQy6OTMU0) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Wh3eyFHawWhdjVFjduwP6dY-9MmEa--4KtUfBl3FUPMeTO2rWsOBFJvDOnkRqd88mtRFfpfwomn7HEtJeUevMOnx2G12JjKj_MYKBCn-Ou9mF_yDfc2MJ-NokcRBDC2NOK606_SE9GcIpHSAWkbU3AUuYl12qGNbLGNsftCNTxuot4B1MDdoZaldCyuudcmK8cVz6z3xB_pB8YbFYMK0QXXooY58e_fEdCmyMHF-k6aRrvPaZ20TnUg2IyunTb-pEycOygIgMH2y8ui3se6bu05yuKpeX1VwPtz9J9alR5or0hIz44QxzXjWk5473KYrt2OysmuOwCTk4y6dmWWneLKLIdPZ4051Yb21jrnkghXy-fHztLGkdkmt0fSypnfePK8yAH1MUs6OyljCRcVwiXNpxi0HwLBJG-wVWG9KBfYuXei_CaNuJic6bFOxakz0/4lr/aEeKrPSXRzKB-wcSapkvYg/h2/h001.VUFOIYLfH-Y418P4oJ6hfOCZWIxyBxH7aLPEe4yj81o)

**Our trans neighbors urgently need more federal protections**.
As part of the Equality Caucus in Congress, I’m fighting for and alongside LGBTQ+ people. But too many of my colleagues in Congress are willing to cede our power to fascists and discard the most vulnerable members of our communities.
**We need massive public pressure to push Congress to defend trans people and pass policies such as:**
* The******_Equality Act_** and the **_Justice For All Act_** ,**** which would **expand civil rights law** to include anti-discrimination protections for people on the basis of gender identity and sexual orientation.
* The **_Transgender Health Access Act_** , which would **increase access to life-saving gender-affirming care** and invest in training providers to deliver that care. More than half of U.S. states have enacted some kind of ban on evidence-based, medically necessary healthcare—endangering the lives and well-being of more than 40% of all young trans Americans.
* The** _Fit to Serve Act_** , which would **reverse Trump’s ban on transgender people in the military** and protect trans servicemembers from being disqualified or removed from the military simply because they’re transgender. Right now, trans members of the Air Force are suing the U.S. government for illegally revoking the retirement pensions they’re owed.
* The **_Pride in Mental Health Act_****** to i**mprove mental health care for LGBTQ+ youth**. According to the Trevor Project, about 40% of trans young people seriously considered suicide in the past year and only half who wanted mental health care were able to access it. Adding to this emergency, Trump has shut down the national LGBTQ+ suicide hotline.
* The **_Youth Homelessness Guaranteed Income Pilot Program Act_** , which will **address rising youth homelessness** by providing unhoused people with monthly direct cash assistance for two years. LGBTQ+ youth have a 120 percent higher likelihood of experiencing homelessness compared to others.

I’m proud to keep leading the _Justice For All Act_ and the _Youth Homelessness Guaranteed Income Pilot Program Act_ , and co-sponsoring related bills.**** This kind of legislation has been needed for a long time.
But now these policy changes are especially urgent, with Trump trying to spread fear and designate trans people as terrorists—and the Supreme Court joining Trump’s administration in threatening people’s passports and basic rights.
[**Please add your name now to demand Congress pass policies to protect trans people from growing attacks.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Wh3eyFHawWhdjVFjduwP6dY-9MmEa--4KtUfBl3FUPKTqm0a_aovmsCNVFcVnbxuvzHCsn_QfFguNgIqd3wIfBKcpan9RmQfER_CP6AWSwjGN1w3grUCy2pdQym_ZY8EvMXIddlI6nGp8mfm5kA8ELBc7cyasGo_n2_pSS_Ls1_cjdFfQTCW_bbHKgLM5oryLA3f7ePuPEBgk3vBrdomypWox8ASk86_LDmthADY9xCaGx6_CCKRl0oOvaA9GHucJuhyKt4faxFxH5owMDn3FlrwRXWsaa2O1aS1f6lxEXNlII58_6YFc0T_eVREpnMsk7rKEYSohAgE6veyywGfsFsazL5nR_lo3wYaB9QpXGbgmvDN146hLhAGn8sdLfZ0Xnr01Nelv2ChVUckQYbbJuKziaEM2ehDsoXug2DaCKXECWUYlqa2KdhQfpT65_nY/4lr/aEeKrPSXRzKB-wcSapkvYg/h3/h001.73NlGBktOCRhPi2emr2GIwG-_MkLiEVcX4XwE_gJ1lU)
Thank you for fighting for equity and liberation for all.

It's also been an honor to fundraise for trans-led groups and secure $1 million through legislation for the Ruth Ellis Center, which provides safe, affordable, identity-affirming housing for Black and brown LGBTQ+ youth in my district.

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: What was the point?
body:
Caving for nothing.

| |
---
Team, Another shutdown vote, another cave. And the deal didn’t deliver the healthcare subsidies we insisted on — so what was the point? No extension of healthcare subsidies.
No progress on affordable housing.
No relief for working families. **Nothing.** This deal does nothing for the people Democrats promised to fight for and everything to prove why Washington is broken. Seth has said it from the start: the status quo isn’t working. We can’t keep giving up our leverage, calling it a compromise, and pretending it’s leadership. If we want results, we need a new generation of Democrats willing to lead, not follow, and new leadership in the Senate that’s ready to fight for real progress instead of settling for the same old excuses. clean_body: Caving for nothing. | | Team, Another shutdown vote, another cave. And the deal didn’t deliver the healthcare subsidies we insisted on — so what was the point? No extension of healthcare subsidies. No progress on affordable housing. No relief for working families. Nothing. This deal does nothing for the people Democrats promised to fight for and everything to prove why Washington is broken. Seth has said it from the start: the status quo isn’t working. We can’t keep giving up our leverage, calling it a compromise, and pretending it’s leadership. If we want results, we need a new generation of Democrats willing to lead, not follow, and new leadership in the Senate that’s ready to fight for real progress instead of settling for the same old excuses. That’s what this campaign is about: demanding better, fighting harder, and refusing to accept “status quo” as the best we can do. name: Tobias Read
subject: The federal government does not get to seize state elections
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Let me be blunt: What we’re watching right now from the Trump administration isn’t oversight, integrity, or transparency. It’s federal overreach designed to intimidate voters and hijack the way states run elections.
In the recent elections in California and New Jersey, Donald Trump’s DOJ announced it would deploy federal “monitors” into local elections in an attempt to chill turnout, scare voters, and normalize federal interference in elections that do not belong to them:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em]
That’s not all. Here in Oregon, we’ve been put directly in Donald Trump’s sights.
This lawless administration is actively working to abolish vote-by-mail and do away with the very voting systems that Oregon has used securely and successfully for decades.
As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I’m standing up and saying NO .
The federal government does not get to seize state elections. The federal government does not get to shut down vote-by-mail. The federal government does not get to silence the voices of voters that it wishes would stay home.
That’s why I’m fighting back. But I can’t do it alone. So I’m asking you personally to chip in today to ensure Oregon has the strength to resist federal intimidation, protect vote-by-mail, and defend our elections from political interference. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251119em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025]
Team,
FIRST: We launched our campaign to protect the rights of Virginians from MAGA extremism – even while being outspent more than two-to-one.
THEN: On Election Day, Virginians across the Commonwealth showed up to the polls and voted for Democrats up and down the ballot – and WE WON.
NOW: As I enter the first leg of my term as Attorney General, I need your support to start strong.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: This is my least favorite part of campaigning...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I didn’t run for Congress to raise money. I ran to deliver results for West Michigan, protect our freedoms, and make government work for the people again.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119671790/583845476/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTMyMmQ0OC01NWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UMOE-DuPLsg_6ipJHjic0Tuq52MqO39n01-QfuvAmdA=)
---
| Hey there, it’s Hillary.

My least favorite part of campaigning is asking for money.

I didn’t run for Congress to raise money. I ran to deliver results for West Michigan, protect our freedoms, and make government work for the people again. But the reality is, running a competitive campaign in one of the most closely-watched districts in the country means I can’t avoid fundraising.

In the short amount of time I’ve been in Congress, I’ve seen just how much damage Republican chaos and dysfunction can do. Democrats only need three seats to take back the House next year. If we want to take back the House majority, we need to build a firewall right here in Michigan.

[_**Our November fundraising deadline is just four days away, so I have to respectfully ask: Will you chip in $15, or whatever you can, to help us hit our monthly fundraising goal so we can take back the House next year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119671791/583845477/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-20_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTMyMmQ0OC01NWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UMOE-DuPLsg_6ipJHjic0Tuq52MqO39n01-QfuvAmdA=)
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119671792/583845478/32658279?&refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTMyMmQ0OC01NWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UMOE-DuPLsg_6ipJHjic0Tuq52MqO39n01-QfuvAmdA=)
---
Every time I press send on an email like this, I wish I didn’t have to. But when I remember that our campaign is about delivering for West Michigan, it makes it worth it.

Thank you for always sticking by my side and reading this note.

Gratefully,

Hillary

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: It’s simple: tariffs are taxes on Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119671803/583845547/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251120_FR_tariffs_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Y4OGQ4OC01NWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sI1bPPhaRtmftGKt4acMMBGI0LwAirnphxiPfMys1Vo=&emci=722e1282-55c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=77f88d88-55c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Four-fifths of the tariff burden is being paid by Americans.

From families in the grocery store to farmers and contractors, car buyers and car dealerships, every sector of our economy is feeling the weight of Trump’s reckless tariff policy.

Tariff rates are at their highest **_since the Great Depression!_** That means working families and small businesses are paying for it and hurting.

The uncertainty of this Administration’s tariffs have brought higher prices to grocery stores and is hurting our job market.

**We continue our fight in Congress to make California affordable again, repeal Trump’s tariffs, and reclaim Congress's _constitutional_ authority.**

**_[Working families deserve someone who puts them first, who makes lowering costs a priority.

Will you support me, Peter, so we can keep fighting in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119671804/583845548/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251120_FR_tariffs_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Y4OGQ4OC01NWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sI1bPPhaRtmftGKt4acMMBGI0LwAirnphxiPfMys1Vo=)_** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119671805/583845549/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251120_FR_tariffs_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Y4OGQ4OC01NWM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sI1bPPhaRtmftGKt4acMMBGI0LwAirnphxiPfMys1Vo=)
---
By standing together, we can stand up to tariffs, reduce prices, and help working families.

Jimmy
