name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96904?t=6&akid=21940%2E878179%2EUDpWMW) Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest.

He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress.

Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of a law.

I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.

[**If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and me →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96904?t=7&akid=21940%2E878179%2EUDpWMW) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96904?t=8&akid=21940%2E878179%2EUDpWMW)
---
I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress.

That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.

So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath.

[**I believe in our country and our Constitution. If you do too, chip in anything you can today to help the Voter Protection Project and me defend democracy, protect our freedoms, and stand up to this insurrection president →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96904?t=9&akid=21940%2E878179%2EUDpWMW)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Chris Deluzio and VPP will go through immediately:

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21940%2E878179%2EUDpWMW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21940%2E878179%2EUDpWMW).**

name: LeftNet
subject: 2028 presidential survey
body:
We want to hear directly from you.
#
We’ve got a big question on our minds:
[**Which Democrats should run for president in 2028? Take our poll now.**](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/2028-presidential-poll?source=em20251120-1361&t=1&akid=1361%2E2118727%2EeRUv7n)
We’re gathering insights from folks from across the country to understand how voters are thinking about their satisfaction with national leaders, the direction of our democracy, and the future of our country.
**And we’re asking folks like you to share which potential Democratic primary candidates are most inspiring, electable, and ready to take on the GOP.**
Your voice matters, and hearing directly from you will help us better understand how people are engaging with the political process, what matters most to you, and which potential candidates have you fired up right now.
The more people we hear from, the clearer picture we have of how voters are approaching elections in the next few years. [**Take our 2028 presidential poll now to guide our efforts to strengthen our democracy →**](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/2028-presidential-poll?source=em20251120-1361&t=2&akid=1361%2E2118727%2EeRUv7n)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/2028-presidential-poll?source=em20251120-1361&t=3&akid=1361%2E2118727%2EeRUv7n)**
Thank you for your participation!

clean_body: We want to hear directly from you. We’ve got a big question on our minds: We’re gathering insights from folks from across the country to understand how voters are thinking about their satisfaction with national leaders, the direction of our democracy, and the future of our country. And we’re asking folks like you to share which potential Democratic primary candidates are most inspiring, electable, and ready to take on the GOP. Your voice matters, and hearing directly from you will help us better understand how people are engaging with the political process, what matters most to you, and which potential candidates have you fired up right now. The more people we hear from, the clearer picture we have of how voters are approaching elections in the next few years. Thank you for your participation! — LeftNet LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.

name: Team Pramila
subject: Trump just extended the National Guard’s deployment in D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump’s militarized occupation of D.C. will now stretch into next year.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251120-5641-footer&t=1&akid=5641%2E420207%2E-uMWjm)
Peter,
**Donald Trump just extended the National Guard’s deployment in D.C. through at least the end of February. And now officials are signaling troops could stay through next _summer._**
That would be a full year of military occupation in a city home to more than 700,000 Americans.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251120-1._Z-chm&refcode=em20251120-5641&amount=3&t=2&akid=5641%2E420207%2E-uMWjm)
Let’s make something clear: This was never about public safety. Violent crime in D.C. was at a 30-year low when Trump originally sent the troops in.
**This is about _control,_ intimidating Black and Brown communities, and a wannabe dictator flexing his authoritarian power.**
And it’s doing real harm to D.C. residents who are avoiding public spaces. Local businesses are losing customers, immigrant communities are afraid to leave their homes or go to work, and families are keeping kids home from school.
Meanwhile, Trump’s deployment has cost taxpayers more than $250 million. A _fraction_ of that could’ve funded community safety programs, violence interruption, or mental health care.
This is how authoritarianism takes root, Peter. Trump has already proven he can deploy armed troops into American cities to punish dissent, push his political agenda, and intimidate the communities that dare to oppose him.
So what’s next? Troops at polling places? Military crackdowns in every city that votes blue? We cannot let this continue to escalate and become our new normal.
**Pramila is fighting back by speaking out in Congress and organizing nonviolent resistance across the country** — but she can’t do it without your grassroots support. And with Trump threatening to send troops to even more cities with Democratic leadership, now is _not_ the time to back down.
[**If you’re ready to power the work Pramila is doing to build the resistance and defend our democracy, will you chip in $3 to power her campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251120-1._Z-chm&refcode=em20251120-5641&amount=3&t=3&akid=5641%2E420207%2E-uMWjm)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251120-1._Z-chm&amount=3&refcode=em20251120-5641&t=22&akid=5641%2E420207%2E-uMWjm)**
Thank you for being with us in this fight.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251120-5641-footer&t=23&refcode2=5641_420207_-uMWjm&akid=5641%2E420207%2E-uMWjm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

# [When Women Lead, the Planet Wins](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=179497073&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NDk3MDczLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM2Nzc0MDcsImV4cCI6MTc2NjI2OTQwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.z1auBJTA_aDsZ5NW2Rp7KgkmiF95hEjDdoqMM8lZb04)

I'm excited (and a little nervous!) to share that my TEDx talk is now live on YouTube.
Watch here ➡️
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2ba9fa20-8efd-47e3-81d5-394c25eb5749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This talk comes from years of advocacy, climbing mountains, working with communities, and watching how decisions, good and bad, ripple across generations.
Here's the core idea:
**When women lead, the planet wins.**
_Data shows it. Communities around the world prove it._
And yet, we continue to treat women's leadership as optional instead of essential.
In the talk, I introduce a concept I call **Auntie Intelligence** , a different kind of AI.
It's a leadership style rooted in care, courage, community protection, and thinking seven generations ahead.
It's the kind of AI that doesn't crash, doesn't hallucinate, and always remembers to bring snacks.
My hope is that this idea resonates, challenges, expands or inspires you and you'll watch, share, and sit with this question:
**What could our climate future look like if women 's leadership wasn't the exception , but the norm?**

name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: You deserve a leader who has your back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
Here's why that matters. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119672537/583847612/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Motivation_112025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ0ZmEzNTktNTdjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zPmJ1ObMdGF4qb3tQZ3QgAznxK3B0trl34M9GDNKxzM=&emci=f7fbb5db-20c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5d4fa359-57c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter, people often ask what keeps me going when the work gets tough. The answer is always the same: I think about the people who need someone in their corner. This campaign isn’t about partisan labels. It’s about Floridians who want what every family deserves: a good job, affordable healthcare, and a safe place to live. People are worn out from political games while their daily costs keep rising. **[If you can, will you chip in $5 to help power this campaign and bring real leadership to the Attorney General’s office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119672538/583847613/1294119851?amount=5&refcode=em_JJR_FR_Motivation_112025&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ0ZmEzNTktNTdjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zPmJ1ObMdGF4qb3tQZ3QgAznxK3B0trl34M9GDNKxzM=)** | **[CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119672539/583847614/1294119851?amount=5&refcode=em_JJR_FR_Motivation_112025&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ0ZmEzNTktNTdjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zPmJ1ObMdGF4qb3tQZ3QgAznxK3B0trl34M9GDNKxzM=) **
---
Throughout my career as a workers’ rights attorney and public servant, I’ve seen that most people aren’t asking for much. They want someone who listens and someone who will take their fight seriously.
Right now, Floridians are facing the highest insurance rates in the country, surging utility bills, and a cost of living that feels like it’s always climbing. Meanwhile, our current Attorney General sits on his hands while corporations pick your pocket.
I’ve spent my entire career challenging powerful interests that hurt working people. I’m ready for this fight because it’s the work I’ve always done.
But I need your help to win this race and bring real leadership to Florida's top law enforcement office. So I'm humbly asking for your support: **[Will you chip in a few dollars right now to help me defeat James Uthmeier and restore integrity to the Attorney General's office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119672540/583847615/1294119851?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Motivation_112025&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQ0ZmEzNTktNTdjNi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zPmJ1ObMdGF4qb3tQZ3QgAznxK3B0trl34M9GDNKxzM=)**

clean_body: Here's why that matters. | Peter, people often ask what keeps me going when the work gets tough. The answer is always the same: I think about the people who need someone in their corner. This campaign isn’t about partisan labels. It’s about Floridians who want what every family deserves: a good job, affordable healthcare, and a safe place to live. People are worn out from political games while their daily costs keep rising. = | = Throughout my career as a workers’ rights attorney and public servant, I’ve seen that most people aren’t asking for much. They want someone who listens and someone who will take their fight seriously. Right now, Floridians are facing the highest insurance rates in the country, surging utility bills, and a cost of living that feels like it’s always climbing. Meanwhile, our current Attorney General sits on his hands while corporations pick your pocket. I’ve spent my entire career challenging powerful interests that hurt working people. I’m ready for this fight because it’s the work I’ve always done. But I need your help to win this race and bring real leadership to Florida's top law enforcement office. So I'm humbly asking for your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for believing in this fight. Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

clean_body: If we keep this up, she doesn’t stand a chance... | Friend, The outpouring of grassroots support I’ve received since officially announcing my gubernatorial campaign has been truly incredible. Within just a few hours of my announcement, we raised over $1 MILLION for my gubernatorial campaign and the New York GOP! Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine. The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance! But that last part is key, Friend... To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day. That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $1,000,000 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we close out our launch week in the strongest possible position. Let’s CRUSH this goal and show Hochul that her days in office are numbered! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

---
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: But according to legendary former hedge fund manager Larry Benedict, the best Bitcoin opportunity is still ahead...| | | | November 20 | | | | | A rare occurrence is happening in Bitcoin right now... | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Including his 3-part, step-by-step system for getting started right away. | Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Norma Shulman and Bill Galvin
subject: Big Win for Voter Rights: Petition Y Qualifies for the Ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Election%20Day%20Voter%20Reg%20New%20Header.png]
Hello Peter,
We have great news!
Same Day Voter Registration (Petition Y) has enough signatures to get on the ballot!
Democrats, thank you for your hard work in getting enough signatures to qualify our petition to expand voter rights in Massachusetts.
Our grassroots effort reached across Massachusetts from the Berkshires to the Cape and Islands and everywhere else in between.
As Democrats, we can be proud of the fact that while the Republicans, at Trump’s urging, are seeking to limit voter rights, we are expanding them.
This initiative fills an existing gap in our present law. No qualified citizen will be deprived of the right to vote.
Hopefully, the energy demonstrated by this effort will persuade the legislature to act immediately on this issue, but if not, now we have an insurance policy - a recent poll indicates that 65% of Massachusetts voters support this change.
Thank you again for your good work.
Stay tuned!
With gratitude,
Norma Shulman, Chair
Bill Galvin
YES on Election Day Voter Registration
444 Washington Street
Brighton, MA 02135
www.electiondayvoterregistration.com [http://www.electiondayvoterregistration.com/]

name: Rachel
subject: God Told Me in a Dream: “You’re Up!”🤩❤️‍🔥
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/god-told-me-in-a-dream-youre-up?e=5fa0631807)
---
| |
---
| The holidays are supposed to be joyful... but for many of us, they can feel heavy. Loss, broken relationships, financial pressure, health battles, prodigal children, loneliness — whatever storm you’re walking through, it can feel even louder when everyone else seems to be celebrating. I just posted a new video that I believe the Lord laid on my heart specifically for THIS moment — for people like you and me who need fresh hope before the holidays hit. In it, I share a powerful prophetic dream the Lord gave me a couple nights ago. It was so clearly God speaking directly to His people in the middle of the storms we’re facing right now. The message of the dream? **“Keep your eyes on Jesus. The storm is real, but so is He.”** In this episode I also open up and share a very personal testimony from my own life — something painfully difficult I walked through with new information that I’ve never shared publicly before. If you’re feeling overwhelmed, discouraged, or like you’re barely holding on, I believe this story will meet you right where you are and remind you that God still moves, still speaks, and still has a purpose for your pain. Watch it here: https://youtu.be/AhVu23_oC8o This isn’t just another holiday video. It’s a lifeline of hope from the Lord for everyone who’s heading into this season carrying something heavy. Please take 18 minutes, grab a coffee (and a tissue), and watch it today. I truly believe the Holy Spirit is going to minister to you deeply. And after you watch, would you do me a huge favor? Forward this email or share the link with one person you know who needs encouragement right now. You might literally be the answer to someone’s prayer today. You are not forgotten. The storm is not the end of your story. Jesus sees you — and He’s already on the water, calling you into your miracle. Keep your eyes on Him. P.S. If this video strengthens you even a little, leave a comment on the video and let me know. I read your comments, and I’m praying for everyone who watches.
---

Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine.

The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance!

But that last part is key, Peter...

_**_To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day._**_

That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an **additional $1,000,000** by _midnight tomorrow_ to ensure we close out our launch week in the strongest possible position.

clean_body: If we keep this up, she doesn’t stand a chance... | Peter, The outpouring of grassroots support I’ve received since officially announcing my gubernatorial campaign has been truly incredible. Within just a few hours of my announcement, we raised over $1 MILLION for my gubernatorial campaign and the New York GOP! Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine. The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance! But that last part is key, Peter... To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day. That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $1,000,000 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we close out our launch week in the strongest possible position. Let’s CRUSH this goal and show Hochul that her days in office are numbered! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

| | Peter – Bumping Marie’s message in case you missed it.

Marie has spent the past 3 years showing up for Southwest Washington as the unwavering, independent voice we need in Congress. She’s not letting up on this fight, but national groups are spending big to replace her with someone who will toe the line.

[We can’t let them drown out everything we’ve built. Will you help us stay on track by giving $10 toward our November goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674351/583854140/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251120_1_2&refcode2=5ec6aa05-5dc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM2YWEwNS01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfUX22CYOhEC6OoYnm_v72kWe7W7SYMSfbJBe4KbVIs=)

_Begin Forwarded Message:_

Peter – Three years ago today, I was on a plane back from New Member Orientation in D.C.:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674352/583854141/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251120_1_2&refcode2=5ec6aa05-5dc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM2YWEwNS01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfUX22CYOhEC6OoYnm_v72kWe7W7SYMSfbJBe4KbVIs=)
After days of counting ballots, we won this race by a razor-thin margin: _**less than one percentage point, or just two votes per precinct.**_ Our upset victory shocked the analysts and pundits who counted us out from the beginning.

It sent a powerful message: everyday people here in Southwest Washington and nationwide want representatives who will seek to build rather than destroy, who will listen and do the work rather than bask in celebrity, and who will focus on substance, not slogans or sound bites.

That’s still true three years later, and it remains central to my work in Congress.

But now that we’re less than a year out from the next election, pundits and pollsters are counting us out once again – let’s prove that we’re not going anywhere. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for sticking with us, Peter. Let’s keep fighting. – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor.
|

Peter,

It's me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for those who depend on me. By the end of next year, I'm hoping you'll be able to call me Governor, too.

**This email is a little longer, but it's worth your time.** [**I’m humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my campaign for Alabama’s next Governor when you’re finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRYadqgpqUKmXG-FnpRHnKxGpszssAyRbPmuERCuYG2HicFi3b8bVItJpLvHdTwfd1EpZO1xgkgJg_E_tBIidxX-zmb4wLiCKkr3BYJA-d8iiY6W6D8qT58PiM0ZfdetMpG58WZvVhX8Z8-svMOUbt9LYOA81G5qxrtoNQ2B7hZVAY3w8hYtgq8py1tAle3cxEmi9d27H78Ff7Upw2doa_zPLdV_hScDQjIYR-F5sd4l0tkoJT4xiIe3LaxFbgs7KGuXnmBmX2lbyXy61TzlfBSet0bTsuHLoe9JGmF08__VBzvQJ3kIwgAeIgVZ12uh6UwACWoVUwM2evLncdAqHi4jr9D5T4ydKc7NN0We0XSKIhC66eYftGkWop1-PyO4SWc)

I was born in Camden, Arkansas, as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to consistently work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. _**They continue to make me proud every single day.**_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRYsKOuC8pTDzdmtUlA4WiqOTxtycZWEhfty6ABU8XgybrSXaS0rCCg8ZWcjAMj0AqkBCSjilYrC0sH8PZ31xRLhJiHVS_u71K_FVyXQlrhtufSL8GwbQ1PKoLsozt1Gzk6m6_FIzlAQ6iJ3xrSzHirZJjIbgdQaEeMz0g08AvZ3Yzt0jbAaw_R9kQBpk6cRmfpP4q1-0DoraLA0fco1oatcxsfQu_0weBP0PHOTfjtRrTImkx_dANBptD72DNAbMD6-J5gz5Dth8GURI912rVmGgIo6AGZ7CPU6JX2uMZq1g3Udl9iZ3vv8dKfEz01UxrIbUNGcA4BCGqyqs_KC6Uu0j6hmw2YA3uxoXZRce5NBJ2BFvhASeL1DuLwWjKRF9a8)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRY6XUYE3n2qGpwoQpZAAHUNMc9k0PtiDvMVwjKQo81f781zVbzkXpxvRVA_x4hR1hJtaEd9tn0CITys7yWK_rFqTJYMM8QNC-w16LlSagYdEWxST8WrYk1blyMkXEcHqgokCoFiJi47E5zHkFJkugxbeMEJQYS_U04AwJ-coXD_FpnKlbcaV1fNexbwJJd2vdDJRT6Y90DpRkfQQpU0j9le5vLgL3MNKpBJR_PPBn1q4GZ4eVTVT_fw3EH_JBh3Q1IyrRIVXJq2mLHZlhmjk63GRzk5GSRAha9G0hMt9rVos67uecs0pISdeim0vzxcd-ujotDWshAHcszjLMocWLjSVWTM_NAzlZUZWOu0i6CcXhv5dQbCQKww50VhxcXolXv)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

**Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf.** Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRYMEpmf6MhL-f8j1_VI6u19gobHATdBIxziPeDkyt65j2nNEG3jTCbQ4mRdZItUCIpEX0aOhlYnaYnzARRRwxVY9ISKqyt3DKOLzQxwmlrZwrjkcmit_KWtd9mhIgU0LwRug8V7rW5j9oBaHnBtvmrC5h-TgIHVr3BgysirCYD94ObSydAyDGoqO7qGgPGhWd085-MyEVQsqAr4fjYBnQfG-YsC9a5AwHisDTD7_EWCQQCaWVYVY2RM4pXXEEJKbqccYtGV_Kdb6GttuI0M0sYQ3vvy8Jgv9Xfc5oY2PbTfupR03BMA6e4G4QhvfdGfYFXNndy4XtF8zzpnJQzEuGLxJCNigckIIfC1eaSgKkR4o-PrtE0aEQs2928OpXkSIUB)
**Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and protect America First Alabamian values?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRY7CLcbaiVDao-X7Tv91NNXT3Gv1yoUVmByk9A0dGg-03lrnXjIA5DLPD3jMKt0t7RdYMTQFYIf82CbS0XQkN6hpofYkeoGkdK7RrK3O8qvyZFMY3daqWnSBTCrxuTugmVADUoBw4SpFHTbyU2CLJQqUQ56Ir2I069aOHsdYqFJxr4Ov-mvkrnsp_VOpuHd4W52ctrZPEKlCGzfZetuZoGOGpG9LrCL8fqAxbjWqwFq6K_tt-1PZG-aIhClKt5kfQxb_ZrOsuLmmefvDsS8TvSHq3ezvzOAf60nmRb8ilHtQ9VPLFueLsGVx4m2ig3BX9SRl378ueAXaaXyDU8UJHxeClz-PMJvpl-BzALEOik15uvKAOMrBu5Cbvf-7jb1y-I)

I won't take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRYpTj1O5cEG7Uvh517bASLL04Odr2Jh8fnmr1URL0iTCnphE_OYpnmdQ6iFF62zvAlAIn4oM6z9xU8DIJElYkM3gYZ3OcxT2NMifHybEH3VJE6TMf6TkmgOAH0xHd5F74PA-Pz8W3Q1kNkw1TGFyvDnfkv2OYVqCdGMMv84SUuQQa-9fF8OqAynahH2jSw9JOOZunsliOOoGBrApdq2fk3EeoJgBIqIqJHll6mMCa-pt7JuKCPhhcizq_L9chYzTNKwb7YVUSa_TyAS4SZ5TUmo2886umyLrWhC_emYjvBSYvcKQVtAHqJRzgWpttSwddghEAq3EBvnz_lqdxlxV6twmTOWPfWMEZkQEXaGDB3xpy1QCOPm71p02xlDV8rNXMx)

_Coach Tommy Tuberville_

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRYz5u7LaNHetRNGFg1BeQuKA8F7hIBnnzTeh-dOIsS-I6ZLBiE8OBttc9VB5kCmtnA4rzGX2xHG8U9Fr7WtEwtgj3xswfWl_NmL_ROAoPHSfNbh8E0srCA0oEi1CAi98yyqpDnObXziIUVF6w8VEf2Q_ltMyV-BJV-1KWCfewC64AN2eFdQBG3goT5dYD2VvpjOmeINgsjIMHvQcfX29tdBVF-zu0TQK4EQxSZgdTojcOVnhfBqFXmY_JOot3MnQFP2PR5mKuqaYXgQOp8NoSQW6qnMD1XjsGX7GcgtLR-GI5RqkvN0o49WHBdpSRAL7MsJLlJcN9481oGw9m7-UA2nrOcNlwUgkJ_DIk5cQAXY8GKrrgvXm4TAcMKQxsdj9Tz)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eff7de4b0c54483a8e23908de85443ed&_e=X_gYc08tyHqfLezJmg0u9dGs7w09wFTuCLr2mj4dl5YRKY190pGzs-1i0ZIo_hhh88KwXE2LLBYU7uN-gkyaKXaa_Mj-KOHAsPToLjYpQioIwbqSihnS8ew-mMR8oF6Lye2Regnqhdei2iJPpBfcIOZOLzYG-kpo5cSzA4158vJrjBLfJBcW-CrE9kEjBlRYxI3WasPmLYeKi4iTYHv7CW8oMLWrVz_biuntxFtC8j2cfBmTBc5H9hQbH03DRCxoMK6mUn6PUX_3vWBd3-hCCoS3bHXoyI0bpeVnfCNrA-IwiXfJT0vl-RLrAjlciBT1RCvuaJTSdA0Iq6ig6AZmNAb3JjR4NpzluPysgWxmfZZ1HV50zcFhTPVgmPmCPLo_JjzFtJWzfZTCopaUJgwFq4pEe_PLjnKG1DE_ZEH8eYChF_9On7kiv3bs2JwfH20T57_YcUpxzTA9wyFndRj0TpeOMb6znbk41kSV8AnvtUAlDKUuMrL-6AEP6YAU-Gc7uHjhar4NejGbFsoq0shCG_8X8Md-sbqnA9sNpkqT8VMFiaayU_k-6yC7ha3z5GBT)

In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: This is a longer email about the threats of political violence made against our Squad, and how we're not backing down.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251120-1630-foote&t=1001&akid=1630%2E342411%2EhJPnpi ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Our Squad members are out there every single day — fighting for bold
progressive change, standing up for their communities, and challenging the
status quo.

And while they refuse to back down, the reality is this: standing up for
what’s right is not without its risks. From day one in office, they have
received countless security threats — and with anti-Blackness, xenophobia,
Islamophobia, and misogyny on the rise, these threats are only increasing.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida need to go above and beyond what’s
required for most elected officials to keep themselves and their loved
ones safe. Hiring security and implementing safety protocols come with the
job of truth-telling and justice-seeking.

These steps are necessary because the threats they face are real,
targeted, and escalating. And while these measures protect them and their
families, they also pull resources away from the work we all depend on:
community organizing, mutual aid, and fighting back against the rise of
authoritarianism.

That’s why the Squad Victory Fund is stepping up — and why we’re coming to
you today.

We need to protect these women at all costs. When you give to the Squad
Victory Fund, you help ensure that our leaders can stay safe and keep
fighting. Your support will fund the resources the Squad needs to continue
their work without compromise, including increased security measures to
make sure every one of them and their families stay safe.

Supporting the Squad empowers them to keep moving forward fearlessly. Our
champions refuse to be intimidated, and with your help, they won’t have to
be.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251120-movement.a8yfww&refcode=em20251120-1630&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1630%2E342411%2EhJPnpi ]So, Peter,
will you chip in $3 today to help keep the Squad safe,
strong, and unstoppable? Together, we can protect their safety and power
the fight for progressive change at the same time.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251120-movement.a8yfww&refcode=em20251120-1630&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1630%2E342411%2EhJPnpi ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1630%2E342411%2EhJPnpi

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Phil Weiser
subject: Friend, we don’t have to live like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
3 day-one improvements I’ll make as governor.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674511/583854492/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_GovtThatWorks_112025_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUxYjg0OC01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=02KiEwiv43Keka8iaSlDSlfU_QyaQUmRDLCikyJeyes=&emci=3d021850-58c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0d51b848-5dc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=51844520) Friend, what would it look like if we made our state government more responsive and accountable to the taxpayers who fund it? **This will be a day-one priority of mine as Colorado’s next governor.** **[If you’re already on board with our vision, you can show your support by chipping in right here — but if you’d like to learn more first, read on 👇](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674513/583854494/109727453?refcode=em_WEI_FR_GovtThatWorks_112025_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUxYjg0OC01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=02KiEwiv43Keka8iaSlDSlfU_QyaQUmRDLCikyJeyes=)** All of us have known what it’s like to _really_ not look forward to interacting with a government agency.
* 🚗 We’ve all heard the jokes about the frustration that comes with renewing a driver’s license at the DMV.
* ☎️ We’ve come to expect hours of waiting on hold before we can speak to a government official.
* 📆 We budget for weeks- or months-long delays when trying to get authorizations for a business (and hope we’ve followed all the processes correctly).
* ⚠️ We might report a road pothole, but we wonder whether a response — much less an action — will ever come back.

Whether you’re a private citizen or a public sector employee showing up and doing your best, we could all benefit from making our government more responsive and less frustrating to navigate. **_We don’t have to live with the status quo — there is a better way._** On day one as governor, I will change how our state government operates by:
1. **Directing** that any taxpayer who calls, emails, or contacts an agency must receive a response within 48 hours
2. **Establishing** a team within the governor’s office dedicated to improving state operations and performance management
3. **Calling** for a rigorous review of all our state regulations, so we can make them more understandable — and reduce or even eliminate any that don’t serve a useful purpose anymore

**[I have spent my career in public service focused on making government work better for people. I am energized to do just that as Colorado’s next governor, friend — and thanks to the time I’ve spent as your attorney general, I’m ready to hit the ground running on day one. So I’m humbly asking: will you support our campaign today with $5, $10, or whatever fits your budget?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674515/583854526/109727453?amount=5&refcode=em_WEI_FR_GovtThatWorks_112025_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUxYjg0OC01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=02KiEwiv43Keka8iaSlDSlfU_QyaQUmRDLCikyJeyes=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674518/583854553/109727453?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_WEI_FR_GovtThatWorks_112025_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUxYjg0OC01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=02KiEwiv43Keka8iaSlDSlfU_QyaQUmRDLCikyJeyes=)

name: Congressman Bennie Thompson
subject: I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
We need to stand up to Trump’s lies.| |
---
| | Dear Peter – it’s Congressman Bennie Thompson.
---
| | I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren.

After the violent attacks on the Capitol, our Committee worked diligently to uncover the threats to our democracy and deliver justice.

Since that day, Donald Trump has never stopped undermining the rule of law, degrading our democracy, eroding our Constitution, or lying about the work of our Committee.

In the face of Trump’s lawless contempt for our justice system and our democracy, Zoe Lofgren has led the resistance, fighting to uphold our Constitution and stop Republicans’ far-right policies.

__[_**Peter, will you join me in supporting Zoe’s re-election campaign by making a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119674710/583855097/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-11-20_J6C_BEN_ES-35661_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGFiNmVhOS01ZGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HeIaUBxLmfKI96Qec0LhabVaCx2QYI9K9zNqr5XDO3A=)

Trump is a criminal who is determined to undermine our democracy — from attempting to overturn the results of the 2020 election, to pardoning January 6th, 2021 rioters, to threatening to jail Zoe and me along with the other former members of our Select Committee.

Now, Trump’s Justice Department hired a January 6th rioter who encouraged the murder of police officers.

**This is an insult to every honorable law enforcement officer in our country, and to our democracy itself.**

Zoe and I are outraged, but this follows the same dishonorable playbook Trump has followed his entire time in office — so the fight continues.

But I need your help today to ensure we don’t lose Zoe’s principled voice in Congress, Peter. name: =?iso-8859-13?q?Ken=FFTravius?= Coleman, United for Democracy
subject: What happens when SCOTUS gets involved?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
An urgent gerrymandering decision before the Supreme Court could determine who controls Congress during the last two years of Trump’s presidency. | |
---
Peter, **BREAKING: A panel of lower court judges just struck down the gerrymandered Texas map that would have redrawn five seats in favor of Republicans.** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJxpTJE3HIHzGke8tGHrJP6XXa640Zb7hMYvW6bxzrSWNfXYnKBR4cVCJA9k2qV7453KeO3DlJ9yCaZJZ20xf81IN24oTqUiafXyBP2EdMJNizhVpRX34q7YTaHSWnarF9L3W9sY97bvgVVc-YYOdgNALDKhyMBm_EVqSBLiOKe9JhduneNh1vVCnnJqC7XgrqpJFiYBYfLA8jL8HHb3uKJB8AZ2_WcSWvxbM_nEfSx4tFIolzflhF2Ymem8WbYco9aFT9r98HscNMNcXxmT-4Am2-0CzBsTpqZWWpy693jsJwxS_7whIP9oCyA8l3e5VVDq930kZGl-W8l7FJojPgM6gmAWo51Pgs4E9S-oLjXaB5uv3BHv_j1a4n_qiwFsvu/4lr/MS_263jWRiWXRsOJJNfF9Q/h0/h001.IWM_NvVacEubHIHfdENnQYoUREEnYzggZ9F9LM0zDjM)** The Texas legislature gerrymandered the state’s congressional maps at Trump’s request. His goal was to tip the scales for Republicans in the midterms so the party could hold on to Congressional power for the last two years of his presidency, despite the GOP’s massive unpopularity. **Now, a lower court has declared the maps unconstitutional.** **But we’re not celebrating yet—the Supreme Court now has the chance to step in and overturn the decision in favor of Trump.** Within hours of the lower court ruling, Republican Texas Governor Greg Abbott sent the case straight to the Supreme Court. **The Court needs to decide on this case soon, since candidate deadlines are approaching.** At the same time, they’re preparing their decision in the Louisiana case that could rip apart the Voting Rights Act. [**We can't allow our democracy to live or die based on the MAGA Supreme Court's decisions. We need Congress to step in and protect our voting rights. Tell them to pass the**** _Redistricting Reform Act_****now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJxpTJE3HIHzGke8tGHrJP6XXa640Zb7hMYvW6bxzrSWNfXYnKBR4cVCJA9k2qV7453KeO3DlJ9yCaZJZ20xf81IN24oTqUiafXyBP2EdMJNizhVpRX34q7YTaHSWnarF9L3W9sY97bvgVVc-YYOdgNALDKhyMBm_EVqSBLiOKe9J3w6Bg_HoeQrUxmB-Ah69pNCmRbNi3wnx6jclb-H2oDIvjBWrJeetmZEi-UOYSiyYYoP5OOUYbruqmNycAdnlBzTTYPQGuF1k6R1qFCu5ZKulB3bnnSjRNGGu9SrXqZG58PABAjmVf5u3enY5sJaWosgZ4BAvr3RMZ-ugBxf4BakD5cvesArhCsAUWMLdyEtfjU6LZaV0zGTA0aKREHSUa/4lr/MS_263jWRiWXRsOJJNfF9Q/h1/h001.-doqj-GBJOznu0KJntQZy56MVdD0QSFWJO93rGTu7iY) [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJxpTJE3HIHzGke8tGHrJP6XXa640Zb7hMYvW6bxzrSWNfXYnKBR4cVCJA9k2qV7453KeO3DlJ9yCaZJZ20xf81IN24oTqUiafXyBP2EdMJNizhVpRX34q7YTaHSWnarF9L3W9sY97bvgVVc-YYOdgNALDKhyMBm_EVqSBLiOKe9Iw_awnS-7SvHXxi5SpLy3JELWeGvNR_9lv7unIprGIh5ofLIoAU7Hvaop-rWgmkfXYKbyGGQcCQiV2R1wwgvhe0JQuPUrggAUqhWAL0AhgZSCq3K-xJfMIsuWHJAYps_Uimg1-dREltYxsYWkx2B6gQSTt-Oaev5LcBsFWrIfhuP9du5SOlLOcsspfA1WxfWMlEild3B6MQUMqJ8dtF7wW/4lr/MS_263jWRiWXRsOJJNfF9Q/h2/h001.taU7Zn1yAjWaWrt5BpfOcrsGczTbuYSREvzV6BMa3FY) **Trump has been playing chicken with the Supreme Court over redistricting since day one.** He urged red states to gerrymander their maps right before filing deadlines—making it inevitable that the Supreme Court would have to weigh in, and fast. But the lower court struck down Texas’ map because it was prompted by a Department of Justice letter asking the state to redraw four districts explicitly with voters’ race in mind, making it unconstitutional. Republicans believe that less minority representation means fewer votes for Democrats.**But this is a democracy—and everyone has the right for their vote to hold equal weight, not just the white and wealthy.** That’s why Rep. John Larson (CT-1) and Sen. Alex Padilla (CA) have introduced the Redistricting Reform Act, which would ban mid-decade redistricting efforts and require states to establish independent redistricting commissions. [**We can't trust the MAGA Supreme Court to uphold the voting rights of minority groups. Congress needs to step up and pass the Redistricting Reform Act and ensure no one's vote can be gerrymandered away. Send a letter to your members of Congress now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJxpTJE3HIHzGke8tGHrJP6XXa640Zb7hMYvW6bxzrSWNfXYnKBR4cVCJA9k2qV7453KeO3DlJ9yCaZJZ20xf81IN24oTqUiafXyBP2EdMJNizhVpRX34q7YTaHSWnarF9L3W9sY97bvgVVc-YYOdgNALDKhyMBm_EVqSBLiOKe9I854CViO8Yz0twJd7xj9S5_0rbqhTHLyCeILsmRNFq217ZH11bz8kpttinkAg6sCxo5rkL9Z3_mJsNgHnJ41OOQe7WhJu782FDhq_fPy83BslZrpqjpvg1N8Kt2hOgobL8rSlrILrKeP3N9K9T8wGYCVmwUGP7V7MchXBnCozFkA33AqpfDF9kH4uYaHcvZ2SdIofuMsCGOFu3P65PCyHp/4lr/MS_263jWRiWXRsOJJNfF9Q/h3/h001.aciQpQdNueVJ8Hk8E30amLHxFOy3MbTxPxb-lu6Uks4) Thank you for fighting for voting rights, Ken’Travius Coleman
United for Democracy

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Starbucks workers in PA shut it down yesterday— and we’re with them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Peter, Yesterday in York, Pennsylvania something extraordinary happened — the kind of people-power that shows what solidarity can really do. More than one hundred Starbucks baristas from across Pennsylvania gathered with union siblings, community supporters, and allies to block trucks from entering Starbucks’ largest East Coast distribution center. Trucks turned around. Workers held the line. And their message was unmistakable: **No contract. No coffee.** Across the country, more than 550 union Starbucks stores are striking. Workers have filed over 1,000 unfair labor practice charges against the company. They are fighting for dignity, stability, and a real contract — and they’re not backing down. And yesterday in Pennsylvania, they showed what that fight looks like in action. This wasn’t symbolic. It was strategic, disruptive, and powered completely by workers standing together. clean_body: | | | Peter, Yesterday in York, Pennsylvania something extraordinary happened — the kind of people-power that shows what solidarity can really do. More than one hundred Starbucks baristas from across Pennsylvania gathered with union siblings, community supporters, and allies to block trucks from entering Starbucks’ largest East Coast distribution center. Trucks turned around. Workers held the line. And their message was unmistakable: No contract. No coffee. Across the country, more than 550 union Starbucks stores are striking. Workers have filed over 1,000 unfair labor practice charges against the company. They are fighting for dignity, stability, and a real contract — and they’re not backing down. And yesterday in Pennsylvania, they showed what that fight looks like in action. This wasn’t symbolic. It was strategic, disruptive, and powered completely by workers standing together. Here’s how you can stand with Starbucks workers right now: 🔥 Shop local for your coffee — support small businesses instead of Starbucks during the strike. 🔥 Tag on Instagram when you do — we’ll amplify your solidarity. 🔥 Talk with your friends and neighbors about why workers are striking and what they’re fighting for. 🔥 Share messages of encouragement using #NoContractNoCoffee to help boost worker voices. What happened yesterday in York was more than a protest — it was a declaration of power. Workers across our state are rising, and the PA Working Families Party stands with them every step of the way. In solidarity, Pennsylvania Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member! Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party | | Sent via . Fellow American,

Let’s cut to the chase — **Democrats just used the courts to try to rewrite Texas’s elections.**

A panel of federal judges blocked our congressional map. Not because it’s unlawful. Not because it’s unconstitutional. But because it threatens the Democratic Party’s grip on power.

This is not about “protecting voters.” This is about **protecting Democrats**.

And they’re hoping Texans just roll over.

**Here’s my response:**

**I’m _STILL_ running in Texas’ 35th Congressional District.**

**I’m _STILL_ fighting.**

**And I’m _STILL_ going to win this race.**

This ruling is a blatant attempt to interfere with our election — to slice up real communities and force Washington’s will on Texas. The Legislature passed a fair map. It finally reflects the people who actually live, work, and raise families here.

But Democrats can’t win TX-35 on the issues. So they’re trying to win it with lawfare.

_Not a chance._

If they think this ruling is going to scare us out of this race, they’re dead wrong. All it does is light a fire under our campaign — and make this fight even bigger.

clean_body: A panel of federal judges blocked our congressional map today. Not because it’s unlawful. | Fellow American, Let’s cut to the chase — Democrats just used the courts to try to rewrite Texas’s elections. A panel of federal judges blocked our congressional map. Not because it’s unlawful. Not because it’s unconstitutional. But because it threatens the Democratic Party’s grip on power. This is not about “protecting voters.” This is about protecting Democrats. And they’re hoping Texans just roll over. Here’s my response: I’m STILL running in Texas’ 35th Congressional District. I’m STILL fighting. And I’m STILL going to win this race. This ruling is a blatant attempt to interfere with our election — to slice up real communities and force Washington’s will on Texas. The Legislature passed a fair map. It finally reflects the people who actually live, work, and raise families here. But Democrats can’t win TX-35 on the issues. So they’re trying to win it with lawfare. Not a chance. If they think this ruling is going to scare us out of this race, they’re dead wrong. All it does is light a fire under our campaign — and make this fight even bigger. The Left is already fundraising off this ruling. Texans — NOT unelected judges — will decide who represents this district. Josh Cortez Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-35 | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Team Cori
subject: While they politicize hunger, Cori’s out in the community.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251120_fooddriverecap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251120_fooddriverecap_act]
Peter,
While Trump and his cronies were playing political games with people’s livelihoods, Cori was out in the community to help provide food for those who need it:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251120_fooddriverecap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251120_fooddriverecap_act]
Cori showed up as someone who’s lived the experience of going to bed hungry. Year after year, Cori shows up because she believes in the dignity and worth of every family in St. Louis.
However, while community organizers like Cori are stepping up, families nationwide continue to struggle. Food insecurity is rising. The cost of living is too high. Though the shutdown is over and SNAP is back (at least, in part), Trump and his allies are still pushing restrictions that would deny millions of families access to these essential programs.
That’s why Cori is running again: to fight for families who rely on SNAP, protect food assistance programs, and make sure no one has to go hungry while folks in Congress put big money over the people.
But she can’t do it without you. Your donation fuels Cori and our team with the resources we need to be on the ground, organize, knock on doors, and connect families to the programs and resources they rely on. We need you with us because every dollar makes our campaign stronger.
Will you chip in today to support Cori and our movement to fight for the families who need a proven champion? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251120_fooddriverecap_act]

With gratitude,
Team Cori

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: Election Interference in Nebraska
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Outside operatives are pouring money into Nebraska. We need to respond fast.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-WfA/s6nacf613de)
---
| | Peter,
I need to alert you to something serious. National liberal groups are quietly moving huge amounts of outside money into Nebraska, and they’ve flagged **my race as a top target.** ****
Before I go further, please take a moment to help us push back:
---
[Counter outside interference →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-WfA/sdn04ff262f)
This is not a rumor. It’s already happening. These groups are using national donor networks to overwhelm local voters and tilt our election in their direction. They believe Nebraska won’t respond and that they can buy influence here without anyone pushing back.
We cannot let that happen.
If we don’t act quickly, their spending will drown out Nebraska voices and reshape the outcome of this race long before Election Day. Your support right now is the only way to match their influence.
Please step up if you can:
**[Fight back against outside groups →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-WfA/s2l2b6f637d)**
We’ve set a goal of bringing in **500 supporters in the next 12 hours** to show that Nebraska grassroots won’t be pushed aside by national operatives. Every contribution moves us closer.
Nebraska elections must belong to Nebraskans. I’m counting on you to stand with me and protect the integrity of our race.
Thank you,
Brett Lindstrom
[STOP OUTSIDE INTERFERENCE HERE →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.-WfA/scs0300cf8c)
| | |
