name: Forward Party
subject: Is America Ready for a Woman President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's what's happening in the Forward world...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=1)
---
Thursday, November 20, 2025 | Peter -- Last week, I attended the Reykjavík Global Forum in Iceland along with some of the world’s most forward-thinking women leaders. I returned energized by what real leadership can look like when built from collaboration, not rivalry. So, it struck me when former First Lady Michelle Obama [publicly stated](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=egVypF8EV9qjJ3_Cbm6dbgl1TgbnaHoJgBm0T8fPbTGa9TfV_znzn4KklMFg9PwGixB6MWww0nYAuMKtDzzRtjpVIbnV21A3JOS3-VNhfUbG7ZO0S8YXClfsfswiwrY1ppC5xS0-8HbRUSWeFUS3Lw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=2) that America isn’t ready for a woman president and urged the audience “don’t waste my time” on speculation about her candidacy. Her blunt critique of our inability to elect a woman president when so many other countries have or had women atop their government reflects something old and entrenched: the binary, gridlocked system that still keeps many women from running and many voters from having meaningful choices at the ballot box. I was invited on MS NOW (formerly MSNBC) on Monday to discuss First Lady Obama’s remarks and discuss why the system still fails women and how Forward is charting a new path. Watch it [here .](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=c1vIqT8LaeJ1yAWpG61iLtGyC2L6itbhE2W0OR0wUcTyuwNLM3xWxqJTXYNECcGJnrmLOFURW1imoXQILYQT9w&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=3) At the Forward Party, we believe the two-party duopoly is not just outdated, but that it actively restricts opportunity and limits ambition. We work hard every day to reverse that system that limits the ability of women to grow into leadership roles in this country. Our leadership team features many strong, experienced, and inspirational women and we actively recruit and empower women to run for office at every level across the country. It’s one reason we’re hosting our upcoming event: She Runs, We Win: A Roadmap for Forward Candidates on December 9, 2025 (RSVP here:[ link](https://home.forwardparty.com/she_runs_we_windec92025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=4)). It’s designed to amplify voices that the major parties ignore, to flip the script, and to give women the tools, the network, and the platform they deserve. Also this week, one of our founders and inspirational woman leaders, Governor Christine Todd Whitman penned this piece on how this moment demands a reset and a forward thinking future. I invite you to read it [here](https://www.forwardparty.com/media/blog/embracing-change-a-call-for-a-forward-thinking-future/%C2%A0). All of these things got me wondering how you all feel about our country’s readiness to elect a woman president. I would love for you to weigh in:
****[](https://home.forwardparty.com/female_president_poll?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=6)
Your voice matters. Because when women lead — without permission from the old parties — we all win. Thank you, Lindsey Williams Drath, Forward Party CEO
* * *
**[Utah's Forward Party introduces five candidates, lays out voting plan to replace Sen. Thatcher](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=rtTPSgvEp6UWncw5WXVsjNDKtx-CxaKThXqD9cR028nWcfQZF4a8vfpAEr33uoJWPtCIrEVpNHUUCf4DSI0WDK5NmeAl9dn0S-m83PGL7nR2XN7rXctW9qqrnm-ogN3HpVXT9PnqeqxoYtr5D0iYLw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=7) | Utah News Dispatch** With Utah’s only third-party legislator looking to resign before the 2026 legislative session, the Forward Party of Utah has released its first-of-a-kind plan for a midterm approval vote open to all registered voters in the state’s Senate District 11, regardless of their affiliation. **[A new political club is forming at Duke. Behind it is Andrew Yang](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Y0cIiWCNui9xPLcN2uq8O1i3hJIfm8FfILetbU_kaFgKBZiAI-ezZVB33fnxUwBuKf6jkDMqnmSafRZWdMC-C1UBZ39665M-0ghGRloeCy1vwU93Mqlg3sl_FFjJNOihdraUMaUDNziJ90ZUXuV1vR7FWLI_6JuiLKOZhQfDVsIqC-FHnDJ1xrAl3hvyva7R&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=8) | The Chronicle** Students at Duke recently formed a chapter of the Forward Party. Yang, now the party’s co-chair, visited Duke Law School Monday to meet with a group of those student leaders, as well as 10 North Carolina Forward Party representatives, to discuss the future of the party at the University, in North Carolina and across the country. **[Third p arty governor candidate Newcome enters race with big personal money infusion ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=xjo7Y3VkUAKyhPkyv-sD4BWLvhkEahyLRbD_w2FKzWs-MekZQaJ-BAydlee3UZnCoMICdATzBlEstJ9SP9wC89u-aDalexXduTVgazNrG1bHRTpzsRVHPEQyd8m-vB_6&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=9)| MPR ****News** Mike Newcome filed paperwork late last week to begin building his campaign as a [Forward Independence Party candidate](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=FoNDizCGIqwZxX3_MhWcMD7cmzl50HpeLfF8GR2Q6IFpPjg1CRaTBpX3Ntk97phW&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=10). Newcome, 56, of Lake Elmo, said he’s convinced that every 25 to 30 years there’s a bit of a “tectonic shift” when people start to want a bigger change than DFL and Republican nominees offer.
**[She Runs, We Win Event](https://home.forwardparty.com/she_runs_we_windec92025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=11)** This virtual event, hosted by the Forward Party Women’s Committee, will feature several women who have been elected as Forwardists or Forward-aligned candidates to their respective offices. We will also be featuring a representative from a national, nonpartisan organization dedicated to supporting women in their pursuit of public office. This forum is designed to inspire and empower Forward Women to consider running for office. For more information and to register, click [here](https://home.forwardparty.com/she_runs_we_windec92025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=12). **If you’re tired of waiting for the system to fix itself — this is your moment.****
**👥[ Volunteer ](https://home.forwardparty.com/your_dashboard?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=13)| 🗳️ [Run for Office ](https://www.forwardparty.com/runforoffice/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=14)| 💸[ Donate](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=15) | 🌐 [forwardparty.com](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=jBnsgtW36mAL7APXvIBDIH9UBFQynkqNd5w2mIH3Wu4&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=16)
[****](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KsRbRlupkMENFsDlxp7flkcx8_xxQzkKAb7MgB1YMrByhnj4sje4BRVQM1-uGNHhgFi8N7bFbeE6G0P5bRxqrlqS-sG8Z0siEuI44bo4m-9-zr39gcVm7G_9hKi2QA_Yxu1cqhF01-zsM_s_xwFwMg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=17)**[UW-Madison conference weighs fusion voting can make politics healthier](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=eC4c_LkZ2N1Yk73o4uwfLrSKjZ_rkKb3FB9k_2g1YGTC2Fbrx2LSWWyChV4oGJCRc1GOs_bz8T1-G1wDCx1nYWzh2qCtbhj0iw8cFYVlHNrzHrz94VnxAqF_2NfvLS3Dt4aLXE7ECvFqnfHQVQ-IJ0ue91vGmfD54GqMRpC1yBw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_85b&n=18)** | Wisconsin**Examiner** Dozens of political scientists, election experts and members of the public gathered in a UW-Madison conference room Friday to debate whether returning to a 19th century election process could empower voters and help turn back the United States’ slide toward authoritarianism. The event centered around fusion voting, which is the practice of allowing more than one political party to nominate the same candidate on a ballot. Currently used in Connecticut and New York, the fusion voting system means the candidates on the left can appear on the ballot under both the Democratic Party and the smaller Working Families Party while candidates on the right appear for the Republican Party and the Conservative Party.
* * *

clean_body: Here's what's happening in the Forward world... | | Thursday, November 20, 2025 | Peter -- Last week, I attended the Reykjavík Global Forum in Iceland along with some of the world’s most forward-thinking women leaders. I returned energized by what real leadership can look like when built from collaboration, not rivalry. So, it struck me when former First Lady Michelle Obama that America isn’t ready for a woman president and urged the audience “don’t waste my time” on speculation about her candidacy. Her blunt critique of our inability to elect a woman president when so many other countries have or had women atop their government reflects something old and entrenched: the binary, gridlocked system that still keeps many women from running and many voters from having meaningful choices at the ballot box. I was invited on MS NOW (formerly MSNBC) on Monday to discuss First Lady Obama’s remarks and discuss why the system still fails women and how Forward is charting a new path. Watch it At the Forward Party, we believe the two-party duopoly is not just outdated, but that it actively restricts opportunity and limits ambition. We work hard every day to reverse that system that limits the ability of women to grow into leadership roles in this country. Our leadership team features many strong, experienced, and inspirational women and we actively recruit and empower women to run for office at every level across the country. It’s one reason we’re hosting our upcoming event: She Runs, We Win: A Roadmap for Forward Candidates on December 9, 2025 (RSVP here:). It’s designed to amplify voices that the major parties ignore, to flip the script, and to give women the tools, the network, and the platform they deserve. Also this week, one of our founders and inspirational woman leaders, Governor Christine Todd Whitman penned this piece on how this moment demands a reset and a forward thinking future. I invite you to read it . All of these things got me wondering how you all feel about our country’s readiness to elect a woman president. I would love for you to weigh in: ** Your voice matters. Because when women lead — without permission from the old parties — we all win. Thank you, Lindsey Williams Drath, Forward Party CEO | Utah News Dispatch With Utah’s only third-party legislator looking to resign before the 2026 legislative session, the Forward Party of Utah has released its first-of-a-kind plan for a midterm approval vote open to all registered voters in the state’s Senate District 11, regardless of their affiliation. | The Chronicle Students at Duke recently formed a chapter of the Forward Party. name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged. I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders. Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection. At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged. It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged. As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you. There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome. Peter,

**My name is Star Parker, and I 'm running to represent California's 49th Congressional District.**

For over 30 years, I've called San Clemente home: the "Spanish Village by the Sea." I've spent my life fighting for what matters most: **faith, freedom, and opportunity for all.**

Now, I'm stepping up to serve because I see our community -- and our country -- at a crossroads.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Our communities shouldn’t live in fear.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Protecting New York’s immigrant communities from Trump's authoritarian, masked immigration agents is one of my top priorities. ICE agents have used military tactics to illegally assault, arrest, and deport numerous American citizens and lawful permanent residents since January. I’m fighting Trump on several fronts, including demanding that the New York City Police Department enforce city and state laws against ICE agents when they illegally arrest and detain New Yorkers. I’ve also introduced the _No Secret Police Act_ — a bill that requires all DHS and ICE agents to clearly display their official identification and badges during civil immigration enforcement operations. And I just introduced the _Stop Excessive Force in Immigration Act_ to ban ICE’s use of crowd control munitions, mandate body cameras, and protect our communities from the abuse of power. It is simply unacceptable for masked ICE agents to throw tear gas on the streets of American cities. **The current secretive and abusive practices of this administration undermine trust, sow fear in communities, and put vulnerable Americans at risk.** Today, I’m asking you to stand with me in demanding an end to rogue operations, making it clear that no federal agency is above the law. **[I will not cower in the face of Trump’s authoritarian tactics. We the people will always stand up and fight back. Peter,

With Thanksgiving next week and the holidays just around the corner, many of us are planning gatherings with friends and family... This season stirs up memories of our childhood celebrations -- decorations, our favorite family meals, the traditions we grew up with. You may be dreaming of hosting your family in your own home this year - but do you have the space? **Many don 't. And that's the problem. For millions of Americans, hosting the family holiday in your own home is now just a dream.** The average age of a first-time homebuyer in America - including right here in Washington State - is now 40 years old. A record high. That's an entire generation being locked out of homeownership until middle age. **And Donald Trump's boneheaded "solution" is fifty-year mortgages.** So buy your first home at 40 and keep paying until you're 90 years old. **You'll never actually own your home. You're just renting it from the bank**.
---
[ **HELP ME FIGHT FOR REAL HOUSING SOLUTIONS** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAHm-EJzNWarZuk7y9ulnE9SJeg_CgBrD2PrdvZD7XD4wiyAWjNNFAr0ZKdU-r8df_SSbmzFA8ZSHV2GiuLzvH7nftPokujND2GJek8R8Th73bZM802aW9u0u9-Th9CKwu7Munw7NLVjq8P7r3fwCOW_CfcAZbj-m88e4zvZk6EM9agAZoeNvAcI9efz1Fh0zprRTUZkt_sOXpiy40AJ_6KELIZi7Gtz6gDU9YRqSzieFE9KrqKrO6qIwoJILNYPCY/4lr/fKqJaK8LRiu06LL8TyzQFQ/h1/h001.Bq8uKKOT5UW-bOnxxeRXLC5Bmd5p2Yi7yjik96V_EP8)
---
Here's what Trump won't tell you: **His plan doesn't address why housing became unaffordable in the first place**. Private equity firms and corporate investors are buying up single-family homes by the thousands, turning entire neighborhoods into rental portfolios. They outbid regular families by paying cash, driving up prices and locking out first-time buyers. Meanwhile, government policies have made it easier for Wall Street to gobble up housing stock while doing nothing to help working families compete. **My opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, has no answer for this, either. Her solution is to pump up the stocks of manufactured home dealers**. That's right, her big solution to the affordable housing crisis is basically pushing prefab trailers as the path to homeownership for working families in WA-03. Look, there's nothing wrong with prefab homes. But I believe families should have the freedom to choose the home that fits their lives - not be forced into a choice by Wall Street investors hoarding houses. [**Can you chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now to help elect someone who will fight for actual affordable housing - not 50-year debt traps and manufactured homes?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAHm-EJzNWarZuk7y9ulnE9SJeg_CgBrD2PrdvZD7XD4_YdTcl48IGSiEhhXEsL8MS4bnUzblW5l3mxtNmw3FZ4jMaGqqwb4o1BbCBFhqn5W6QJ4HdHHfKRwQE11dqyZgQBxiv5mXjergbnBbcBEK5yRk5EG8ExiWNC8Kn3RYd1eelEotgT3lKZtACPJIF7ib0WnyWj-rNFjplf2YgqxuxSCSEsBAvVG-YYaBsvBY-gMfaZAGYKHzj9sYx1NhcjNvY/4lr/fKqJaK8LRiu06LL8TyzQFQ/h2/h001.1UD4WcMNIOCw8m_ie8fifU5qyUaPQ1dHAz4qTy1DFXQ) A home is more than just a place to lay your head at night. It is stability. It is memory. It is your past, present, and future. It's where you build equity and stability and can finally stop worrying about a landlord raising your rent. **It's the foundation of the American Dream, and when I 'm in Congress, I will fight for an affordable path to homeownership starting with a ban on corporate ownership of single-family homes.** [**If you're with me, then donate to our grassroots campaign now and help me fight for affordable housing for all of us.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAHm-EJzNWarZuk7y9ulnE9SJeg_CgBrD2PrdvZD7XD44X-i2a22VVoU67jgwCgSSyKG46DbuwVTC-55Rs_3OxyMQRAjSTj7EaI6qwp_5ovn-KkFVDvsOet2sXC1H5b-Rwu2UwvQxvsGdNhvX_suj6AFc-Bc4k6aNzShy8yYWGQHcY7a7iQYiTXmbKxnieUVFtEzp9Ee-5P-nnnHhu_0Ayc7WHr8kwG4HEWFuCOX_cIModT5MJlJbWCrO9kDlueG40/4lr/fKqJaK8LRiu06LL8TyzQFQ/h3/h001.JkZGJw3siVuQHUnDClwGK6wDnvR58iLg2uKi3C2jyS8) Let's Heal Washington!

Brent Hennrich

subject: It might be a holiday, but Dad's not taking time off

body:
We're cooking up a little surprise for when Dad gets home from Washington tonight 🤫
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119676356/583860162/43140476?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk988-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5NDk0MC02M2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8R6RyApZ26tpaamsJMRz5zdRT1rdbgFbuN_Nbxov4FY=)
Hi there!

It's the Bennet girls here ⬆️ – Halina, Caroline and Anne reaching out ahead of the Thanksgiving break.
After watching our dad fight to protect affordable health care for Coloradans over the last few months in the Senate, we can't wait for him to get back home for the holiday.
But now that he's running to keep up the fight for Colorado as our next governor, his schedule is going to be packed with campaign trail stops starting first thing tomorrow a.m.
Then leading up to Thursday's big feast, he's likely going to be stuck in the kitchen cooking his infamous _(and delicious!)_ turkey vindaloo – so he won't be getting much rest this week until he can finally settle in for a post-turkey nap.
And even though his birthday is the very next day, we know he’ll be back to thinking about the campaign, because his **biggest end-of-month deadline yet is next Sunday.**(We're exhausted just thinking about it! 😮💨)
So to show him a little appreciation for the insane amount of work he's doing for all of us in Colorado – and let him enjoy a little more time relaxing at home on Friday – we want to help out by raising 20% toward his $30,000 end-of-month goal from this email before his plane touches down in Denver tonight.
**_[So friend, will you please be the first Team Bennet member to chip in $5, or anything you're able, right now to help us go all out on this extra-special Thanksgiving/early-birthday secret surprise? We've got about 4 hours until he gets home, so there's not much time!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119676357/583860163/43140476?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk988-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5NDk0MC02M2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8R6RyApZ26tpaamsJMRz5zdRT1rdbgFbuN_Nbxov4FY=)_**

name: John Fetterman
subject: love is love 🏳️‍🌈💪🩷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10437%2E434096%2E8afsuW ]John Fetterman

From The New York Times → “Supreme Court Denies Request to Revisit Same-Sex Marriage Decision”

Folks, marriage equality is the law of the land.

So earlier this month when the Supreme Court respected that and refused to reopen their same-sex marriage decision – especially while Trump and his cronies constantly attack LGBTQIA+ rights – I was thrilled.

Love is love. Don’t f*ck with it. 🏳️🌈💪🩷

Back in 2013, when same-sex marriage was still illegal in Pennsylvania, I didn’t wait for permission. I threw on a nice shirt and officiated a gay wedding in Allegheny County because it was the right thing to do.

I caught heat for it – didn’t care then, don’t care now. Everyone deserves the same d*mn rights and freedoms.

In the Senate, I’ve backed the Equality Act, pushed to protect trans kids, and voted to defend LGBTQIA+ rights every chance I get. This fight is about real people – not cheap political points.

If you're with me in this fight to protect our LGBTQIA+ friends – especially our trans brothers and sisters these days – you can pitch in $5 or $25 using this link to help me keep up the fight against the spew of hateful bullsh*t.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52336?t=1002&akid=10437%2E434096%2E8afsuW

If you're queer and live in PA – or anywhere in this country – I want you to know: I've got your back. Always. 🌈

Love yinz,

John ❤️

# Judges orders Trump to end National Guard presence in DC
A federal judge has order President Trump to end his[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/777c3188-e3b7-40b4-a520-d5508139da2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[crime crackdown](https://substack.com/redirect/777c3188-e3b7-40b4-a520-d5508139da2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the nation's capitol.
Biden appointed US District Judge Jia Cobb approved the request, giving the Trump administration a Dec. 11 deadline to make a decision.
The request references Trump's ongoing crime crackdown, releasing over 2,00 federal National Guard troops across the city to combat the severe high crime rates in the city.
United States Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro announced o Wednesday that since Trump's deployment, the city has made over 6,300 arrest and seized over 600 illegal firearms.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fb3d138f-7176-4567-966e-b655fb262f26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Federal immigration crackdown in North Carolina tops 250 arrests**
Federal agents have arrested **[more than 250 people](https://substack.com/redirect/9dd6dfc6-33d2-499c-962d-066095caccca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an ongoing immigration enforcement operation in North Carolina, with the crackdown spreading from Charlotte to the Raleigh area as part of President Trump's mass deportation efforts.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/dd08b218-49bf-488c-98d6-ffe8d68dac67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Operation Charlotte 's Web: **The Department of Homeland Security operation that began over the weekend has doubled its initial arrest count, targeting what officials describe as "some of the most dangerous criminal illegal aliens." The enforcement push expanded to areas around Raleigh on Tuesday before the mayor announced border patrol enforcement appeared suspended in the capital city, though DHS did not confirm any changes.
* **Communities face effect:** School attendance has dropped and small shops and restaurants have closed to avoid confrontations with federal agents. At one Charlotte laundromat, customers abandoned their clothes after agents appeared at the shopping center Sunday, with the Mexican-American owner saying neighboring businesses shut down while his customer base has evaporated.
* **New Orleans next target for federal sweep.** Around 250 federal border agents are expected to descend on New Orleans by the end of the week to prepare for a two-month immigration crackdown beginning December 1. Border Patrol Commander Gregory Bovino, who led the North Carolina operation, has been tapped to head the Louisiana sweep, which has drawn support from state Republicans while civil liberties.

* * *
# **Vance teases Trump healthcare plan to lower costs**
Vice President JD Vance said Thursday the Trump administration has a **["great" healthcare plan](https://substack.com/redirect/97486acc-938b-4d86-bcce-1be10b04decd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in development that will bring down costs for American families, claiming it will garner bipartisan support despite political risks for Republicans.
* **Trump prioritizes fixing system over political concerns.** Vance told Breitbart that advisers have warned Trump that healthcare is "a graveyard for Republicans," but the president responded by saying he doesn't care and praised Trump's leadership approach of putting families first, willing to work with Democrats if they're willing to fix what Democrats "broke."
* **Premium hikes loom as ACA subsidies expire.** Americans face sharp healthcare premium increases in 2026 as Affordable Care Act subsidies are set to expire at year's end. Those using the ACA marketplace already face a projected 26% premium hike, but if subsidies lapse entirely, monthly payments for subsidized patients could jump 114%, according to a Kaiser Family Foundation analysis from October.

**Shutdown fight centers on subsidy extension.** Democrats initially refused to support funding without making subsidies permanent but eventually backed a short-term bill, with Senate Majority Leader John Thune agreeing to hold a December vote on continuing the credits. Trump signaled opposition to extending subsidies, posting Tuesday that the only healthcare he'll support is for money going "directly back to the people."
* * *
# **MS-13 gang leader deported after Biden admin allowed asylum claim**
An El Salvadoran MS-13 gang leader wanted for murder who attempted to exploit the U.S. immigration system under the Biden administration has been **[deported to his home country](https://substack.com/redirect/15187813-12ef-4410-a92c-817d1f0b8468?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , the Department of Homeland Security announced Thursday.
* **Biden admin let wanted murderer claim asylum.** Wilmer Alexy Garcia-Manzanarez was arrested by Immigration and Customs Enforcement in February 2024, but the Biden administration allowed him to claim fear of returning to El Salvador despite having a final removal order and three prior deportations.
* **Gang leader committed multiple crimes on U.S. soil.** Garcia-Manzanarez committed several crimes in America including burglary, menacing with a weapon, driving under the influence, property damage and driving without a license, according to Homeland Security. Authorities in El Salvador issued a warrant for his arrest, and Interpol issued a public Red Notice for his apprehension in January 2020 before ICE Boston arrested him in Foxboro, Massachusetts.
* **Illegal entrant deported four times since 2001.** Garcia-Manzanarez first illegally entered through the Canadian border in March 2001 and was released into the country before an immigration judge ordered his removal a year later. ICE removed him to El Salvador three times between 2007 and 2012, but he committed a felony by illegally re-entering a fourth time before his final deportation on November 3.

* * *
# _' Burn B ---'_: Chicago man charged after allegedly lighting train passenger on fire
A repeat offender who was released after being accused in a violent August attack has been federally charged with terrorism after allegedly[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/0bdfd24e-0a63-4f24-9905-f24755feb8e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[dousing a young woman with gasoline](https://substack.com/redirect/0bdfd24e-0a63-4f24-9905-f24755feb8e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and setting her ablaze on a Chicago Blue Line train while yelling "burn b----."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8fb45c38-e41b-41fe-91b4-8ab26f590218?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Suspect planned attack, purchased supplies beforehand.** Lawrence Reed, 50, is charged with committing a terrorist attack against a mass transportation system after prosecutors obtained photos showing him at a gas station 20 minutes before the Monday night attack purchasing gasoline and a lighter, then train footage captured him approaching the victim from behind, pouring gasoline on her head and body, and igniting her with a lighter.
* **Victim in critical condition as bystanders failed to help.** The woman, engulfed in flames, tried to extinguish the fire by rolling on the floor while Reed allegedly watched, no passengers coming to her aid until she exited at Clark and Lake station still on fire, collapsed on the platform, and two Good Samaritans finally put out the blaze, leaving her in critical condition with severe burns.
* **Career criminal had "no business being on the streets."** Reed has been arrested by Chicago police at least 13 times since 2017 on charges including aggravated arson and multiple batteries, and in August was released with an ankle monitor after allegedly assaulting a woman at a psychiatric hospital despite prosecutors requesting detention, prompting ATF Special Agent Chris Amon to say Reed "had plenty of second chances" that resulted in an innocent victim fighting for her life.

name: Matt Van Epps
subject: You probably don’t know me yet. That's okay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
True leadership emerges in the heat of battle
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=367a3fcb76694193aa8f70a88beb444e&_e=TVuX7B5rHWU4BxoSPnwFtlYqCp4NZYm6p_AqQUQTclYnD7bxRo7ftHms759ZlN0wWJO85PIsjaclgnsmKFU47vn5nqQGY_KZo6upQCTaWQ18KsZiGM8w6AeNFphBituDA8Tj3Z0vy5RQNfig8iRxGrLSm_VJkUxtKol3gQRippYO28vNqcljJi3mP1569aTbMoU80PI6vDdIg9_F7NfX6O5kE2sLuS24j67GcWuoQ5feHVPjD-ePxvOYFewVICz2l06-5GlZSVOE4oWQmrDHq6x509OEzydM7XbCMuRXFCs3yIHA5NyTn-SzfN8PG-qRN2tEl-h2v_w7JJ6f0BeDzcnMbOtI5BvSN-sWmQNzfv0wge7e0g5LW5IwFgiw0aFbdEOvfWISJbhjG3YvsbpNX5FdOmSqpa693_rJ5n4ro1w4KJ_bzWOvK2U-YZwbFa7-dNK0-aoN0zUyHTBWCkdxHuF7cXwCg_LvuagIsVSyt_bfC4mdCBuwvPBSWHIba84yIVlOG00lDwhY-rdsbN5Raw%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Hey, Matt Van Epps here.

You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay.

**What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:_Night Stalkers Don’t Quit._**

We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks.

What I learned was this: **true leadership emerges in the heat of battle.** Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – _no matter the odds._

**Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance.**

**On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast.[_Will you rush in a donation now?_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=367a3fcb76694193aa8f70a88beb444e&_e=TVuX7B5rHWU4BxoSPnwFtlYqCp4NZYm6p_AqQUQTclYnD7bxRo7ftHms759ZlN0wWJO85PIsjaclgnsmKFU47vn5nqQGY_KZo6upQCTaWQ18KsZiGM8w6AeNFphBituDA8Tj3Z0vy5RQNfig8iRxGo3hJxAodl_znXHytrm912WyMNSVRMuroDCIhjv9IwZ0H3UTq1KN-QYIk_hTI900dzpYi14kkgFXBTLhcmE0sFRyNA62X5Ra5zKQ_cuHmim6STd6oS4SZHHNar4ZifULnhonKufs8GxtYLIZe5tgdjL3sye-gVn-mz7rZl9rNKyfP9c57eGmhiokAjq5Kv-Co-m5aGt0GzS7n2cOxkax8xtEKKj-SLjVwbf3QWvYbOVghfvnO6TUlX6S4gZXNyHjLium8O0x_cLmafuHgmY36KmSGjYvtdhZrdx0S5aej0T_pQtGZkoOn6JAEUvbZTe5oaQNKfzW0EQ_oiGJ0osMg5tc9CbjlW9-Y4gw8h4SuwyAXnD4bmYepXrQ7bOVHluMCw%3D%3D)**
|
---
[PITCH IN ASAP](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=367a3fcb76694193aa8f70a88beb444e&_e=TVuX7B5rHWU4BxoSPnwFtlYqCp4NZYm6p_AqQUQTclYnD7bxRo7ftHms759ZlN0wWJO85PIsjaclgnsmKFU47vn5nqQGY_KZo6upQCTaWQ18KsZiGM8w6AeNFphBituDA8Tj3Z0vy5RQNfig8iRxGlnBIp1K2XEBaZPwdeYxNjZoD4v1RSEqL40IaqM2Q_nhHwqbU_WJi-AFg6mrz0rjvDhqc-6IaJbPDNo_X7xAG6y3khYeZoaISauTmiqW5cxeVONbZUVvMuvIaIRG-EwcEW-QJ644KR6NoaxjTHUwyxSNQTsPx6WK4vxKR6SEhlbC0eHwExC0JkCDjlnjmYX6VmGFMsJutjj0-kwRnpljttJDk0poUe0b9oa6qmva8bxxaILdnQQk_pBKyRKeZ3FkP2NllOr47TsQh0vrp-n6UKronE6AKjW-WiVG-LuXY0B4A8CFsEiYVDp7vmI0YXbViP79uNQ0xlBirwGgGo-icP3D3eX8-4uzdJu82XONIxEJg2Cy_kgEL7RjOO4kjSEcwA%3D%3D)
|
---
The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside **Jasmine Crockett** , was previously **endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America** , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal **bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement.** She's already being called "_**the AOC of Tennessee**_ " and is gunning to be the **newest member of "The Squad."** _No thank you._

**I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government.**

**President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.”**

_I’m running to prove him right._

Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. **This race, right now, is the firewall._And it's the only game in town._**

**[I’m not asking for much – just your endorsement and whatever you can pitch in right now. $5 keeps a door-knocker on the street. $25 fuels a mail piece. $100 runs digital ads that could flip undecideds.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=367a3fcb76694193aa8f70a88beb444e&_e=TVuX7B5rHWU4BxoSPnwFtlYqCp4NZYm6p_AqQUQTclYnD7bxRo7ftHms759ZlN0wWJO85PIsjaclgnsmKFU47vn5nqQGY_KZo6upQCTaWQ18KsZiGM8w6AeNFphBituDA8Tj3Z0vy5RQNfig8iRxGl7exWg3_jpwQXkU-S3ma8A15aiLYLQg62yq1Uri4a-hQsfkdjNRz4OuaICt-2xpjKcHKBIKFO3-HSXX7PayDRua6R6e725T3EeoVhrgxo2d1I-A9920ZpK1sBafduUb_egv8TZxLffC-PcyKTCZ8EWU-PpRWGVErCVY-FKP6fV-7BqwJWYTwAVcSrJbanAgNvi6gWiz-evUQjG4zP8RvdX5yoWXQOaIPRUZ0sCaGmslDI8_fnk9EdkzKaAaisshDTGnQZOtrmH7Q75OF7apfDT7yKp4kidQoqEkRFfbrDLuqmZsBU3VxYGXv9TkIpSO85d_j0OJFEMIsNH698E-KrtAO5On6Urgrk8y2UlQe_agd9j3QFXbcZ4i6pCXeTmrnw%3D%3D)**

_**Night Stalkers Don’t Quit.**_

**But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time.**

Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,
Matt Van Epps
|

|
---
|
---

If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $5 you ever spent?
I know that $5 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
**But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $5 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.**
With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.

That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. = | | = If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately? If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in? If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $5 you ever spent? I know that $5 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts. But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $5 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same. With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Sherrod = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. # [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3606%2E582294%2EAONl9f)
It’s no secret that national Republicans want to flip this seat.
That’s why they recruited John Sununu to jump into the race, and it’s why they’re “all-in” to defeat Chris Pappas.
**No matter what they throw his way, Chris won’t back down from the fight.**
Chris was elected to Congress four times (in one of the swingiest districts in the country, don’t forget) because he is grounded in the people, places, and values of New Hampshire. He has a record of fighting for working families, lowering costs, defending reproductive freedom, and standing up to MAGA extremism.
That’s why the NRSC, Donald Trump, and GOP super PACs will do anything they can to flip New Hampshire red next year. **We need your help to stop them.**
**[So if you’re with us, chip in $5 to back Chris Pappas and help elect him to the Senate to fight for New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251120_1_nrsc.s9QGGg&refcode=em20251120-1&t=2&akid=3606%2E582294%2EAONl9f)**

name: Redistricting Update

name: Truth Social Post (via Team Abdul)
subject: "punishable by DEATH!"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1328%2E251025%2EkOBcHQ ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1328%2E251025%2EkOBcHQ ]Abdul for US Senate

[ A ]A graphic that reads: 🚨BREAKING: Trump calls for DEATH of top Democrats
in Truth Social post. 🚨 Followed with a screenshot of Trump's Truth Social
post: SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!

He is out of his mind. Acting like a complete dictator.

— FIRST, in a new video, Michigan Sen. Elissa Slotkin said members of the
U.S. military aren’t required to follow unlawful orders. This is an
undisputed fact supported by law and Supreme Court precedent.

— THEN, in a fit of rage, Donald Trump called her statement “SEDITIOUS
BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!”

— NOW, we see how the Democrats will respond to this dictator crap.

Are we going to be the same weak-willed, quiet, passive Democratic Party?
Like the one that got rolled by Trump last week on the shutdown? Or are we
going to finally show some fight?

Our imperative in 2026 is to send a wave of fighters to Congress who will
constrain Donald Trump as he tries to take more and more power.

But we will not be able to stop Trump if the Democrats nominate a bunch of
quiet, milquetoast candidates who don’t know how to meet this moment. So
it’s critical that Democrats support Abdul El-Sayed for U.S. Senate in
Michigan.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251120-2-ak.S-SDFo&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-1328&t=1004&akid=1328%2E251025%2EkOBcHQ ]Peter,
these elections are critical for the
future of our democracy. That’s why we’re asking so urgently: will you
please send $10 or as much as you can to get Abdul elected
and send him to DC to fight Trump from the U.S. Senate?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251120-2-ak.S-SDFo&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-1328&t=1023&akid=1328%2E251025%2EkOBcHQ ]Donate $10 ››

Michigan’s Senate seat is a MUST WIN for Democrats to retake the majority
and be able to stop Trump from passing whatever bills he pleases. Abdul is
the strongest candidate to beat the Republicans, because he’s the only one
showing the appropriate level of urgency to meet this moment.

That’s why fighters like Bernie Sanders are endorsing him. That’s why he’s
surging in the polls. And that’s why he’s building a grassroots movement
with us that will be unstoppable come November.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251120-2-ak.S-SDFo&amount=10&refcode=em20251120-1328&t=1024&akid=1328%2E251025%2EkOBcHQ ]Abdul only makes it to DC with our support. And this month is a
critical time for our campaign. So, please, make a $10
donation right now to elect Abdul.

Every contribution helps — whether it’s big or small. In a close race (and
we’ve seen plenty of those these past 10 years), your donation could make
the difference between victory and defeat.

Thank you for meeting this moment with us.

In solidarity,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1025&akid=1328%2E251025%2EkOBcHQ

name: Deb Haaland
subject: A personal phone call from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Pitch in to this email for a chance to receive a call from me!
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5805%2E400544%2Ev4Dsew)
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/895?c0=em_ms_dh_20251120_1_donorcall.cN98nX&refcode=em20251120-5805&t=2&akid=5805%2E400544%2Ev4Dsew)
Hi — Deb here.
Since launching my campaign for governor, I’ve been traveling, listening, and connecting with folks about the challenges they’re facing and the hopes they have for the future.
These conversations are a reminder of why this important work matters and how much strength and support exist in this grassroots community.
I’ve been deeply moved by the support people like you have shown for my campaign, and**I want to say thank you in a more personal way.**
**That’s why I’ll be making personal phone calls to some supporters![If you’re able, will you pitch in $5 or whatever amount you can to my campaign? Once you do, you’ll be added to my call list, and you may receive a call from me!](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251120_1_donorcall.cJammB&amount=5&refcode=em20251120-5805&t=3&akid=5805%2E400544%2Ev4Dsew)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251120_1_donorcall.cJammB&amount=5&refcode=em20251120-5805&t=22&akid=5805%2E400544%2Ev4Dsew)**
Thank you. I hope I have a chance to talk to you soon!
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251120-1&t=23&refcode2=5805_400544_v4Dsew&akid=5805%2E400544%2Ev4Dsew)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=25&akid=5805%2E400544%2Ev4Dsew)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
I emailed you yesterday about a video I put out alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.
Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.
At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.
It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.
As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.
There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.
[**Can you make a donation to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251120-2-800k&t=1&akid=6250%2E6688874%2EW1whvg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

It’s a serious abuse of federal power, and it’s already being used to suppress the vote and target voters in key states. **This is a critical moment.** The Trump administration’s misuse of federal power to hoard private voter information is a serious threat to our elections. **That’s why we’re demanding immediate answers, and where you can help.** [**Add your name if you agree: The American people deserve to know what data is being collected, how it’s being used, and why this administration is hiding it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119678217/583866312/-83737232?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQwZGNmNy02OGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTgF2mg6Uo9wplvJ3gFAVTqCLhWuepQbc8qy_6NJXXw=&emci=0e6a2969-60c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2ad0dcf7-68c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26828920) | | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119678218/583866313/-83737232?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQwZGNmNy02OGM2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTgF2mg6Uo9wplvJ3gFAVTqCLhWuepQbc8qy_6NJXXw=&emci=0e6a2969-60c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2ad0dcf7-68c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26828920)**

That’s why we’re demanding immediate answers, and where you can help. | | | Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Katie Porter
subject: $2 MILLION in ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
He launched his campaign yesterday and has already spent the second-most on ads in the race for California governor—only trailing behind... another billionaire.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40449%2E3422442%2EX0BcSl)
**BREAKING: Our newest billionaire opponent just took out a _massive_ $2 MILLION ad buy.**
He launched his campaign yesterday and has already spent the second-most on ads in the race for California governor—only trailing behind... _another billionaire._
Based on the fact that he spent nearly $350 million running for president in 2020, _we know we can expect a lot more to come._
**[I’m a single mom who doesn’t have unlimited resources to spend on my campaign to lower costs for Californians, so I need your help to keep up. Can you donate $5 today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251120_1_ak.Aa9q9h&refcode=em20251120-40449&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40449%2E3422442%2EX0BcSl)**

I’ll be honest: this ad buy changes the dynamics of our race. In a state as large as California, getting your message out early and often could make the difference in winning or losing. _We have to act now._
When facing billionaires who can spend nearly unlimited amounts on their campaigns, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us scale our efforts right away.

Katie Porter

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Young leaders stepping up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We were registering voters at the University of Texas at San Antonio,
where I met one of our newest Powered by People volunteers, Elio. She’s a
first-year student originally from Houston who is now a Volunteer Deputy
Registrar, bringing new voters onto the rolls.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251120.TTqTDU&refcode=ema20251120-240477&t=1002&akid=240477%2E444211%2EM1bLbF ]Beto talking to Elio, Volunteer Deputy Registrar for Powered by People

We talked about what it means not only to register and vote, but to be on
the ground meeting and registering the people we need to win elections.

Elio told me something that really stuck with me: She’s happy that her
generation is getting involved with voting. She said that a lot of people
her age don’t get registered because they think it’s tedious and don’t see
the point. But in her time volunteering, she’s seeing more students
connect the dots between getting registered and voting and bringing about
the big change they want to see.

Elio gets it. We’re going to win through people talking to people,
students inspiring students, and young leaders stepping up to save our
country at this moment of truth.

I told her that she’s going to be more effective at turning out her fellow
students than I ever could. That’s not modesty; it’s the truth. This
movement will succeed because it belongs to those who have the most to
gain or lose in the next election.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251120.TTqTDU&refcode=ema20251120-240477&amount=3&t=1003&akid=240477%2E444211%2EM1bLbF ]That’s the power of organizing on college campuses across Texas. Will
you chip in $3 to keep the work going?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251120.TTqTDU&refcode=ema20251120-240477&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1022&akid=240477%2E444211%2EM1bLbF ]DONATE $3

Doing the work with volunteers like Elio makes me hopeful. Thanks for
giving her and all of us a shot at putting that hope into motion through
our work on campuses across Texas.

Beto

P.S. You can watch my whole conversation with Elio [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67420?hl=en%3Fsource%3Dema20251120-240477&t=1023&akid=240477%2E444211%2EM1bLbF ]here.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240477%2E444211%2EM1bLbF

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Here are a few things I believe to be true:
body:
You deserve nothing less. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119678676/583867939/1573338254?refcode=ea.3210ca06-6cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3210ca06-6cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEwY2EwNi02Y2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1ruyiT7EJCaajmbVlFAuB1N_JeB1WW0YS5WTvB6NM=) 1️⃣ Politicians are supposed to work for _you_ — not themselves or their party 2️⃣ Sending insurance premiums skyrocketing for millions of Americans so the richest can get a tax cut is wrong 3️⃣ Children in this country shouldn’t go hungry, and they deserve to get a quality education, no matter what Peter, these are just a few of the beliefs that I’ll take with me to Washington. Maybe they make me one of the few, _but they shouldn’t._ **It’s just the bare minimum Americans deserve from our representatives: loyalty, honesty, and the courage to stand up for what is right.** I’m fed up with what’s happening in Washington. If you are too, we can start to change things right here, right now. This is the most competitive U.S. Senate race of 2026. The outcome will determine who controls the Senate — and whether or not we can stop the far-right from doing more harm to this country. I know that we can win. I wouldn’t be in this race otherwise. _But I also know it will be close._ **[Pitch in anything that’s right for you to join me in the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119678677/583867940/1573338254?refcode=ea.3210ca06-6cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3210ca06-6cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEwY2EwNi02Y2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1ruyiT7EJCaajmbVlFAuB1N_JeB1WW0YS5WTvB6NM=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119678678/583867941/1573338254?refcode=ea.3210ca06-6cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3210ca06-6cc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEwY2EwNi02Y2M2LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1ruyiT7EJCaajmbVlFAuB1N_JeB1WW0YS5WTvB6NM=)

clean_body: You deserve nothing less. | = 1️⃣ Politicians are supposed to work for you — not themselves or their party 2️⃣ Sending insurance premiums skyrocketing for millions of Americans so the richest can get a tax cut is wrong 3️⃣ Children in this country shouldn’t go hungry, and they deserve to get a quality education, no matter what Peter, these are just a few of the beliefs that I’ll take with me to Washington. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: a cornered rat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey, Peter —
Today the President called for elected Democrats to be EXECUTED.
Yes, the Trump presidency is failed. He’s massively unpopular.
But a cornered rat is even more dangerous.
Now is no time to start feeling comfortable. Nor do we have the luxury of despair!
**Victory is the only answer.**
So what I’m asking is: Are we all still wide awake?
I hope we don’t think big wins in Virginia and New Jersey mean it’s all under control.
We have a lot going for us right now. We should win the midterms in a landslide. We MUST win the midterms in a landslide.
But if we get complacent we will lose! And maybe lose our Republic.
So please — and I can’t believe I have to write these words:
[**If you oppose the President of the United States calling for the execution of Democratic Members of Congress...if you see this man and his cabal for the threat they represent to our Republic...if you’re wide awake and in fighting shape and not resting on our laurels...please contribute now to the highest-stakes U.S. Senate race in the midterms.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251120-1-f&t=1&akid=1122%2E5691347%2EmKqoFS)
Win Georgia again.
Keep this Senate seat out of MAGA’s crazy little hands!
Thank you,
Senator Jon Ossoff
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251120-1-f&t=2&akid=1122%2E5691347%2EmKqoFS)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
